name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: As a nurse, Cori has seen firsthand the inequalities in our healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Cori is fighting for a health care system that prioritizes humanity over greed and compassion over exploitation.
#
Peter,
As a nurse in St. Louis, Cori has seen firsthand the stark health inequities faced by uninsured and under-insured folks. Every day, people are forced to ration or go without expensive medication like insulin, as they are left to choose between this life-saving medication or groceries, child care, and even rent.
**No one should have to ration or go without insulin in our country. That’s why last week, Bernie and Cori introduced a bill to cap the price of insulin at $20 per vial for everyone.**
This fight is personal for us, and we’ll always fight to put people before profits. Cori has been fighting for Medicare For All and lower prescription drug costs since before she was elected to Congress in 2020. Just last year, she made history and chaired the first House Oversight Committee hearing on Medicare For All — and the first Congressional hearing on the need for a single-payer health care system since the start of the pandemic.
**[Will you join Cori in fighting back against corporate greed and sign our petition to lower the price of insulin for all?](https://act.coribush.org/signup/em-insulin-for-all/?source=em20230321-2370&t=1&akid=2370%2E1082990%2E5N9Vn_)**
**[SIGN ON»](https://act.coribush.org/signup/em-insulin-for-all/?source=em20230321-2370&t=2&akid=2370%2E1082990%2E5N9Vn_)**
Millions of people of all ages and backgrounds depend on insulin to survive. But because of Republicans bowing down to corporate greed, it is unaffordable for too many people, especially Black and brown people, low-income people, uninsured and under-insured communities, and people with disabilities.
**_Why?_**
Because Big Pharma squeezes as much money as they possibly can out of vulnerable people to make record profits. **We deserve a health care system that prioritizes humanity over greed and compassion over exploitation.**
**We can't let Republicans and their Big Pharma donors get in the way of this important progress.[Sign our petition now: No one should have to shoulder an extreme financial burden for essential health care, especially for life-saving medication like insulin.](https://act.coribush.org/signup/em-insulin-for-all/?source=em20230321-2370&t=3&akid=2370%2E1082990%2E5N9Vn_)**
It’s time for Congress to side with everyday people and make insulin affordable for everyone who depends on it. Together, we can bring the pressure to make sure that it gets done.
In solidarity,
Cori Bush HQ

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230321?refcode=em20230321-2370-footer&t=4&refcode2=2370_1082990_5N9Vn_&akid=2370%2E1082990%2E5N9Vn_) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.coribush.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.coribush.org/signup/update-your-information?t=5&akid=2370%2E1082990%2E5N9Vn_)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.coribush.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2370%2E1082990%2E5N9Vn_)

name: Faith and Liberty News
subject: Anti-American teaching in our schools
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.)
---
| | Fellow intelligent patriot,
I hope you're having a great day so far!
It's been busy here at Hillsdale College because we've finally completed a project that's been in the works for a long time.
You're probably wondering what I'm talking about, so I won't keep you in suspense any longer.
Here it is:
Our _**Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum **_for K-12 students is ready for classrooms across the country!
We're all very excited and hopeful about this project's potential impact, and I know you will be as well...especially after I give you more details!
The _**Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum**_ is a K-12 history and civics curriculum that covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively.
The curriculum was not designed by activists or ideologues but by teachers and professors at Hillsdale College. It's so important that we are making it available absolutely **free of charge**.
The massive 2,200-page, 85-lesson curriculum comes from years of diligent study of America, its history, and its founding principles. And it was developed and tested in school classrooms around the country.
As I mentioned, our K-12 Education Office at the College built this curriculum over many months of intense and focused effort-in many ways, its roots extend back to the beginning of the College itself in 1844.
I'm sure you've noticed how far too many politicians, media personalities, and sadly even educators are pushing an anti-American narrative on our children.
This means there is now a choice before us: will we allow these education bureaucrats to choose what schoolchildren learn?
Or, will we teach them the **whole** truth through a sound curriculum that presents a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation's history?
Personally, and I hope you agree that this choice is **obvious**.
When we provide students with the unbiased history of our country, they will naturally recognize that America is not a place of "oppression" and "injustice" but an exceptional nation worth defending.
**You can make the _Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_ a success by helping us blanket the nation with promotions about it and our other outreach efforts like _Imprimis_ , free online courses, and other educational programs. **
Our K-12 education staff spent months putting the curriculum together. And our marketing team has already designed the print and online ads, and we've recorded the radio commercials...
...all we need now is your support to keep these promotions running so we can place the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_** into the hands of as many teachers and homeschool families as possible.
**Oh...and did I mention that educators (and you) can download the full curriculum for FREE? Well, you can! **
The **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum _**is available for absolutely no cost because it's a part of our 179-year-old-mission: to provide "sound learning" of the kind needed to preserve "the inestimable blessings of civil and religious liberty."
**We've set a goal to raise $1,500,000 for this vital and important effort, and I hope you'll join us. With students around the country back in their classrooms, we cannot lose a moment promoting this curriculum and our other educational outreach.**
**Please give your best tax-deductible gift toward our goal at this secure link:**
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum**_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-YLyYmuy_qWR9vt2xQ)
Everything we do to **reach** and **teach** Americans of all ages about the principles of liberty **depends on the support of informed patriots like you! **
That's because we refuse to accept any government funding...EVERY PENNY-even indirect aid like federal or state student loans and grants.
I'm thrilled to tell you about the _**Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum. **_It's part of our promise to redouble our efforts to restore and defend liberty this year.
Hopefully, you're as excited as I am to present a fair, unbiased, and comprehensive view of our nation's history to our nation's schoolchildren.
Please help us reach our $1,500,000 budget goal. And thank you in advance for preserving liberty for our children and grandchildren!
For our children,
Bill GrayClass of 2001Vice President of National Donor OutreachHillsdale College
P.S. We've just made a big announcement. After 18 months of work, the _**Hillsdale** **1776 Curriculum**_ is available for free to educators, homeschoolers, and concerned citizens like you. It covers the triumphs and tragedies of American history fairly and comprehensively.
It's a part of our effort to defend liberty through education, but we need your help putting the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_** into the hands of as many teachers and homeschool families as possible.
Will you give a special tax-deductible gift today to promote the **_Hillsdale 1776 Curriculum_** and our other outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide? We have a budget goal to raise $1,500,000 for this vital effort**. Would you please join us today using this secure link: **
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-hillsdale-1776-curriculum**_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.-D7YAHbEhdlHUVmA)
---
Faith & Liberty PO Box 455 Leesburg, VA 20178If you no longer wish to receive sponsored promotional emails from us [_click here_](http://trk.faithandlibertymail.com/uu/3/eyJhaSI6OTkyNjA2OTcsImUiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsInJpIjoiMTM1MDI1NTcxMSIsInJxIjoiMDItYjIzMDgxLWMyY2YzZTUzMzFmNjQyYzk5M2Y5MTM4Y2UwZDA0MTE5IiwicGgiOm51bGwsIm0iOmZhbHNlfQ/FfgG5WFsk4PFrWOr4AU7SQ) to unsubscribe.
---

name: Paul "Bud" Haedike, American Veterans Center
subject: What I saw on D-Day
body:
My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II.

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj4uoc4fmrh7ivibe9nr6c30l91nlaraarip3oo0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5jm9oj5c5h2bs)
---
Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions.
---
[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zm08gcqklcdlnpoajec420nhmibcsp1c8gk7vi20_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5jm9oj5c5h2bs)
---
_Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II._
---
**A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II.** I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. [**May I ask you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today to help fund the American Veterans Center** ’**s critical video documentary project? As a non-profit, AVC depends on the contributions of patriotic Americans like you.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za3gdm926jf5k6fu0kllbokvj5qoi818jave3n9g_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5jm9oj5c5h2bs)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zgau48oba2jnln99m8hp92mlc69723fmvvadgau8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5jm9oj5c5h2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me:
• The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans’ homes – of course, at no cost to the veteran.

• AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available – for free! – these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. [**Can I count on you to help the American Veterans Center record even more video documentaries with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today? Your gift is urgently needed for AVC to continue their efforts.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqovfefg6hh079mm744jvmhqjv3amha5hq5md3m0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5jm9oj5c5h2bs)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9ucptfos8fan5ev4ftq7bednjodsdb4iejetki0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5jm9oj5c5h2bs)
---
The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. _Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history._ [**To help preserve the legacy of more World War II veterans like me, please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zntc1vq1ig7jn1fu18094np88otv916kl2p3nmk8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5jm9oj5c5h2bs) I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does – and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. [**That** ’**s why I** ’**m asking for your support of the American Veterans Center today.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za426mjpg60kqi65kklsrj93eu5tdtppj3lvvlco_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5jm9oj5c5h2bs) Thank you,
---

---

clean_body: My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. | | | Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions. Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II. A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II. I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me: • The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans’ homes – of course, at no cost to the veteran. • AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available – for free! – these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history. I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does – and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. Thank you, Paul "Bud" Haedike World War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. name: Harmeet Dhillon
subject: They used her like a lab rat
body:
Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy.

| |
---
| | Fellow Patriot,Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when activist doctors decidedshe was “trans”... _... and fast-tracked her into Kaiser Permanente’s multi-billion-dollar_ _industry to “transition” her from a girl to a boy._
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zoetsprih86adv46vhlf1l9g2ssapjajlsslr3u8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5jm9oj1c9h2bs)
---
| |
* She was given weekly testosterone injections.
* She was injected with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders.
* And finally, at age 15, the doctors at Kaiser Permanente removed Chloe’s healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.

---
| | Chloe and her parents were coerced by these doctors into thinking she was a boy. They purposefully lied to her about the side effects of the experimental treatments they were forcing her under. **And they effectively used Chloe as a lab rat to “test” their “gender affirming care.”** Now for the rest of Chloe’s life, her voice will always be deeper, she’ll never be able to breastfeed – if she can even have children – and who knows what cancers, fertility problems, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more lurk in her future. **Bottom line: The doctors at Kaiser Permanente destroyed Chloe’s healthy body for profit.****And this is happening to children across America.** My non-profit, the Center for American Liberty, is helping Chloe Cole SUE Kaiser Permanente for permanently destroying her body... **...and finally bring justice to those who have suffered the same fate at the hands of doctors they should have been able to trust.**

name: Paul "Bud" Haedike, American Veterans Center
subject: D-Day from a paratrooper who was there
body:
The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like.

| | | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z42pvmma7rma34n2p7c5aqekvjlvn4sa61p98vv8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5ge4o71chh2bs)
---
Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions.
---
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zh75lvqfer0jquqhg10cnjc1t2oilncrvu57c0f8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5ge4o71chh2bs)
---
_Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II._
---
**A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II.** I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. [**May I ask you to chip in $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today to help fund the American Veterans Center** ’**s critical video documentary project? As a non-profit, AVC depends on the contributions of patriotic Americans like you.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlmp25fcsdo107b9o5ajqva29le2n7rqa5sttr3o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5ge4o71chh2bs)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zio6cea3oaa99cpjjlns55q8oshcriqjna040ad0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5ge4o71chh2bs)
---
When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me:
• The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans’ homes – of course, at no cost to the veteran.

• AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available – for free! – these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. [**Can I count on you to help the American Veterans Center record even more video documentaries with your gift of $25, $50, $75, $100, $250, $500, or more today? Your gift is urgently needed for AVC to continue their efforts.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfmop19hvhmhh9a57dhv0ih4g7qd998gc9hqugoo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5ge4o71chh2bs)
---
[Help the American Veterans Center](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zici64bbisau2q7crs6398bh22qtgds4lan8f2h0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5ge4o71chh2bs)
---
The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. _Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history._ [**To help preserve the legacy of more World War II veterans like me, please make your most generous gift to the American Veterans Center today.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zaavp6v7cgug6ogj1toi0mnns65etddbfod26h30_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5ge4o71chh2bs) I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does – and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. [**That** ’**s why I** ’**m asking for your support of the American Veterans Center today.**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zb3482b7fvddsla1ubuc30j7ejnkiff1mdu9g9ug_rp22sh2s8i66pr4s5ge4o71chh2bs) Thank you,

clean_body: The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. | | | Fellow American, My plane was shot down by the Germans in my first combat mission in World War II. Our rookie B-17 crew was in "Tail End Charlie," which is what we called the last plane in the formation to pass over the target. The Germans had zeroed in on us with 88 millimeter cannons -- which could fire five miles up -- and they hit our number one and number two engine. A B-17 is not made to stay up on two engines. But with skill, determination, and good fortune, we crash-landed in Belgium just over the Nazi lines. Five days later, we were rescued ... and I went on to fly 22 more missions. Above: The American Veterans Center recorded and released a 30-minute video documentary with me about my service in World War II. A few years ago, my friends at the American Veterans Center invited me to record a video documentary about my experience in World War II. I was proud to share my story with the American Veterans Center (AVC), both to honor the memories of the brave men I served with and to pass on our hard-fought lessons to the next generation. Right now, the American Veterans Center is working around the clock to interview and record as many video documentaries as possible with World War II veterans like me. When the American Veterans Center records video documentaries with veterans like me: • The experienced AVC video team coordinates travel plans with the veteran and his or her family. Oftentimes, AVC will even send out their staff to veterans’ homes – of course, at no cost to the veteran. • AVC records a beautiful, professional-quality video documentary that lets veterans tell their own stories in their own words. A keepsake copy is also given to the veteran and their family to enjoy. • AVC makes available – for free! – these powerful video documentaries to be used as part of our shared American history. These videos reach millions on YouTube and have been used by the Library of Congress, presidential museums, and award-winning films. The history books will teach you the facts, but only the servicemen and women of World War II can tell you what it was really like. In the beginning of the war, they said if a guy flew six or eight missions, he was on borrowed time. There were many men who served with me who didn't come home. They didn't get to be husbands, didn't get to be dads, and none of them got to be grandfathers -- which you can't understand until you reach that point in your own life. Thanks to the American Veterans Center, and generous Americans like you who made my video documentary possible, my story, and the story of the young men in the Eighth Air Force, has entered our shared American history. I understand first-hand what good, important work the American Veterans Center does – and why their mission to record video documentaries with more veterans like me is so urgent. Thank you, Paul "Bud" Haedike World War II Veteran For the American Veterans Center | The mission of the American Veterans Center and the World War II Veterans Committee is to preserve and promote the legacy and experiences of America's veterans and active duty service personnel from World War II through today. A non-profit educational organization, the AVC and WWIIVC are funded solely through generous contributions from people like you. name: Mark Meckler, COS Action
subject: Sign the National Convention of States Petition!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Convention of States Action
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.secureandprosper._dz9B58m70w0vFoQRQ08nw)
---
Fellow Patriot, [**I urge you, right this second, to sign the National Petition for an Article V convention to save America**.](http://trk.secureandprosper.) An army of conservative heroes including **_Mark Levin, Ben Shapiro, Sean Hannity,_** and** _Lt. Col. Allen West_** have joined our movement to call for an Article V convention. [**Just click here to add your name to this national petition. And then PLEASE forward this email to every single person you know.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://trk.secureandprosper.-Niya7x_7EH7w)
---
Our nation is spiraling out of control. Debt threatens to cripple our economy. Federal spending has never been higher -- nor has our deficit. And our leaders in Washington won't do anything to save us. _In fact, most of them are part of the problem!_ An Article V convention is our only hope. You see, our Founding Fathers were brilliant men. They left an emergency clause in the Constitution in case the federal government got too big and out-of-control. **Article V of the Constitution allows the states to bypass Congress and the President to call a convention to propose amendments to our Constitution that will rein in the federal government.** Well, conservative leaders all across the country - along with over **_FIVE MILLION_** grassroots patriots - believe it is time to invoke Article V and call a convention for the express, _limited_ purpose of imposing fiscal restraints and term limits on Congress and limiting the power, scope, and jurisdiction of the federal government. And I hope you do, too. With the socialists in control in Washington, it's time to take action before it's too late! It's time for "We the People" to use the most powerful weapon in our arsenal - the Constitution - to fight back against Washington's overreach. [**Please sign the National Petition for an Article V convention right now, and please ask everyone you know to do the same.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.--QzxXMiSqHfgHlMvVUWA) Here at Convention of States Action, we are working overtime to convince the required 34 state legislatures to call for an Article V convention to place limits on the power and jurisdiction of the federal government. **We have already passed in 19 of those states - bringing us over HALFWAY to calling a Convention of States and taking the power back from the "ruling class" in Washington!** In 2022, we saw huge victories in Wisconsin, Nebraska, West Virginia, and South Carolina all passing the Convention of States (COS) Resolution. The legislative sessions in many states have started for this year and our grassroots army has been right there, pushing our Resolution through in this General Assembly! NOW is our window of opportunity to double down and secure the needed victories to cross the finish line! We have a citizen activist army operating in all 50 states, working tirelessly on the front lines to urge their state legislators to act in accordance with the will of the people and demand that they pass this critically important Resolution. **An Article V convention is our only chance to pass important and long overdue measures like a balanced budget amendment, term limits on Congress and the Supreme Court, and limits on the scope and jurisdiction of the federal government.** The politicians in Washington wouldn't dare limit their own power. Therefore, we the people need to do it! But in order for that to happen, we need millions and millions of patriotic Americans like you to sign this important national petition. We need to show the members of the state legislatures that the American people are ready for a constitutional solution as big as our nation's problems, an Article V convention. [**Simply click here to sign and we'll deliver it directly to your state legislators, free of charge. This is our best chance to save America from an out-of-control federal government.**](http://trk.secureandprosper._vluk-sFafB_UGr5Q) Washington won't fix itself. The federal government is too big, and our leaders are too invested in its growth. We the People must take control through our state legislatures. [**Please join the fight to call an Article V convention. Sign the petition today, and urge every freedom-loving American to do the same.**](http://trk.secureandprosper.-tw3qO8xg_dA)
---
[**Sign The Petition**](http://trk.secureandprosper.)
---
For America, Mark MecklerPresidentConvention of States Action

name: Victor Riches
subject: Nightmare: child forced to transition behind mother's back
body:
I want to challenge your assumptions about public schools.

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653861%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GHz%2b%2fTL6xhkFqrb5dp9Rlg&sysid=1)

Friend,

I want to challenge your assumptions about public schools.

It's a different world from when we were kids--when schools were safer and teachers were there to help students learn and better themselves.

We cannot give schools the benefit of the doubt anymore. Even in red states, you have radical gender ideologies and Critical Race Theory in the school curriculum.

[_**The Goldwater Institute is suing schools that violate parental rights. Can you please support our urgent work by donating $10, $35, $100, or more? **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653862%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=s8uATdC0SxoyKBaux5veNw&sysid=1)

Here’s one story from a school in Maine:

Last December, Amber Lavigne was in her 13-year-old daughter’s room when she found a chest binder--an undergarment used to flatten breasts.

Amber was alarmed, and when she started investigating she was shocked to discover that a school social worker, who had been seeing Amber’s daughter since October, secretly gave the child the chest binder and advised her about gender transitioning.

**The social worker told Amber’s daughter the school wouldn’t inform her parents about any of it and that she shouldn’t do so either.**

**Friend, the school violated Amber’s parental rights as protected by the Constitution. **

Now the Goldwater Institute is stepping in to hold the school accountable.

Let me briefly introduce myself and our organization. I am Victor Riches, President and CEO of the Goldwater Institute, the nation’s leading liberty organization. We provide pro-bono legal support for parents like Amber Lavigne.

**I’ve set a goal to find 500 new donors to fund our American Freedom Network, which provides pro-bono legal support to protect parental rights and stop schools from indoctrinating children.**

[_**Your generous support makes a huge difference in our fight for parents’ rights. Select any amount below to rush your support.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653863%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=93z%2freRjuVeMXWAVRuEQsw&sysid=1)

Amber and her daughter’s story doesn’t end there, though.

When Amber contacted school officials, the administrators defended the counselor’s actions. She also learned that school personnel had already been referring to Amber’s daughter with a different name and different pronouns.

_**“This is unacceptable: a school employee secretly encouraged my daughter to change her gender and hide it from me. The school never stopped trying to keep me in the dark at every turn, repeatedly stonewalling me when I tried to find out what was going on. My parental rights aren’t up for debate: I deserve to know what’s happening to my child in school.”**_
-- Amber Lavigne

Now, we’re demanding the school board investigate the counselor’s actions and force them to accept parental rights as defined by law. **The school’s actions toward Amber and her daughter aren’t just wrong -- _they’re unconstitutional_.**

Parents have a fundamental right to control and direct their children’s education, upbringing, and healthcare decisions. The Goldwater Institute is leading the effort to protect parental rights in courts and force schools to stop this radical trend in gender ideology.

[_**You can help the Goldwater Institute support the rights of parents today with a gift of $10, $35, $50, or even $100. Friend, please help me support families like Amber and her daughter. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653872%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xInBKGMC6ljTDRsp6dmeEA&sysid=1)

No other organization has done more to defend parental rights than the Goldwater Institute:

* We helped concerned parents get the answers they deserved after school districts charged them thousands of dollars just to find out what was being taught in their kids’ schools.

* We’re actively dismantling the power of teacher unions by leading the nation in passing school choice legislation so that kids can receive the education that best fits their needs.

* We’re defeating Critical Race Theory (CRT) and woke nonsense in the classroom.

* We created the blueprint for conservatives to tie education funding to students instead of sending your tax dollars to radical administrators and school boards.

* We’ve transformed Arizona into the most pro-school choice state in the country and brought school choice legislation to 22 other states.

As schools try to ramp up woke indoctrination like CRT and gender ideology, _the rights of parents are more important than ever_.

Thank you,

Victor Riches
President & CEO
Goldwater Institute

name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: BREAKING: DOJ to prosecute up to 1,200 more peaceful protesters
body:
Joe Biden's lawless Department of Justice plans to prosecute up to 1,200 more innocent January 6 patriots. | | | | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62465810:6xeAYBGNl:m:1:3365131770:CD72471C43CD52C98C3A44CB6E1D32EA:r)
---
| |
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62465810:6xeAYBGNl:m:1:3365131770:CD72471C43CD52C98C3A44CB6E1D32EA:r)Dear Peter,

[ **Please give a crucial donation IMMEDIATELY to fully fund my two critical, class action lawsuits and other hard-hitting legal actions to FREE ALL JANUARY 6 PEACEFUL PROTESTERS and GET THEM JUSTICE.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62465810:6xeAYBGNl:m:1:3365131770:CD72471C43CD52C98C3A44CB6E1D32EA:r)

I had to share this breaking news with you right away:

**Joe Biden 's lawless Department of Justice plans to prosecute up to 1,200 more innocent January 6 patriots. **

The Bloomberg news article opens with this headline:

** "DOJ Told Court to Expect a Deluge of New Jan. 6 Prosecutions" **

And it only gets worse from there:

** "The Oct. 28 letter from US Attorney Matthew Graves to Chief Judge Beryl Howell, which came as the department neared its 900th arrest, estimated an additional 700 to 1,200 defendants. That could roughly double the number of cases filed so far - with this month marking the 1,000th arrest, ** [ **according to statistics** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62465811:6xeAYBGNl:m:1:3365131770:CD72471C43CD52C98C3A44CB6E1D32EA:r "Click to view webpage.") **from the US attorney 's office."**

Judge Howell also steps down this week.

**His replacement for chief judge will be the total hack, Obama appointee Judge James E. Boasberg ...the judge who just forced retired NYPD officer and peaceful protester Sara Carpenter to go to court without evidence that could've cleared her of all charges. **

As I told you earlier this week, Sara was just found guilty on seven counts, and gets sentenced in July.

These new developments are deeply alarming.

**Because the DOJ is doubling down on railroading innocent Americans even though they KNOW that the "deadly insurrection" narrative is a LIE. **

The DOJ KNOWS:

✓ The protester known as Q Shaman was not only not violent, he was escorted peacefully by U.S. Capitol Police throughout the Capitol building,

✓ US Capitol Police officer Brain Sicknick was alive and on the job after he had been allegedly murdered by protesters with a fire extinguisher,

✓ Someone doctored video footage of the protest, and added in yells and screams to make the event seem scarier.

**Our beautiful country is in deep, deep trouble ...so are each of the January 6 peaceful ** **protesters I 'm fighting for, peacefully and legally.**

I beg you to keep standing with me and Freedom Watch during these critical fights.

[**Please continue your vital support with your best gift now.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62465810:6xeAYBGNl:m:1:3365131770:CD72471C43CD52C98C3A44CB6E1D32EA:r)

Everything is on the line.

[**Please give what you can right away.**]()

Thank you for your prayers and financial support.

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. the DOJ is doubling down on bullying innocent Americans.** And the incoming chief judge just forced a peaceful, retired police officer to go to court without vital evidence that could've cleared her of all charges - so now she's headed to prison.

**[Please help me fight tooth and nail, peacefully and legally, for January 6 peaceful protesters with your very best gift now.]()**

* * *
| Freedom Watch
2020 Pennsylvania Ave NW, Ste 345
Washington, DC 20006

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ To unsubscribe from Nikki Haley for President, click here As a mom, moving 550 miles with my husband and two young boys, Aaron and Natan, to work on Nikki’s presidential campaign was not an easy decision. But the more I thought about Nikki’s candidacy and the opportunity to really change our country, the more I knew I couldn’t stay put. We had to move. We had to try. We had to fight. I met Nikki in early 2019 shortly after my first son was born. Nikki has always been extremely supportive of my life as a working mom and loves showering my kids with gifts. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8761d429702ccd83a2149b39769d61d248f743f246a49dad0042850832106e12c7ae47b3e9fa92e378eb4539eb85b9dfc0f6e44c8a0ae07ed2b8f8c704c55d84 Nikki and Aaron in Iowa, 2019 I love that Nikki embraces being a mom. She is tough as nails when she’s staring down Russia and China, but she happily talks with regular people in Iowa and New Hampshire about their kids and the cost of eggs. Being a mom changed my life and my perspective on the world. Moms are ferocious when it comes to protecting their kids. They are fierce and compassionate, and they are not pushed around. As Nikki says, “when you kick back, it hurts them more if you are wearing heels.” It’s high time we put a mom in the White House. I’m so excited that I have the opportunity to work on this race and with such an incredible, conservative icon. I know Nikki will put in 110% every day, and she inspires me to do the same. Please join our team and support Nikki. As a mom, I understand that a lot of people can’t contribute to the campaign. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8761d429702ccd83a2149b39769d61d248f743f246a49dad0042850832106e12c7ae47b3e9fa92e378eb4539eb85b9dfc0f6e44c8a0ae07ed2b8f8c704c55d84 But if you can—even $10 or $20—every dollar really does go a long way. Nikki has been on the road meeting voters since she announced and all that traveling to get her message out costs money. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8761d429702ccd83a2149b39769d61d248f743f246a49dad0042850832106e12c7ae47b3e9fa92e378eb4539eb85b9dfc0f6e44c8a0ae07ed2b8f8c704c55d84 Your support makes every day of this campaign possible. Please give whatever you can. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8761d429702ccd83a2149b39769d61d248f743f246a49dad0042850832106e12c7ae47b3e9fa92e378eb4539eb85b9dfc0f6e44c8a0ae07ed2b8f8c704c55d84 DONATE Thank you so much for your support! Best, Nachama Soloveichik Communications Director (And Aaron, 4, and Natan, 2) GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8761d429702ccd83fe0d93db2c3053607e1f0488be738a45da6a408ad2aba320457d5a7226564a2e70a398ea036cbc62901e5f78770e5b0a31421fce36221951 >">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President shirt today. >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8761d429702ccd83fe0d93db2c3053607e1f0488be738a45da6a408ad2aba320457d5a7226564a2e70a398ea036cbc62901e5f78770e5b0a31421fce36221951 Claim Your Shirt JOIN NIKKI’S TEAM https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=4a8ae9b452a2b432effc1e8a1ec2690abfdf7eccb01cd9018330a21836e85926d875cb8dd2de4ba1945ec5f9a2e9a350a8cbc024fc212e30e0fde04d3fb9f812 Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations…and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. In order to build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today? Thank you in advance for your support. Thank you, Team Haley P.S. But the more I thought about Nikki’s candidacy and the opportunity to really change our country, the more I knew I couldn’t stay put. We had to move. We had to try. We had to fight. I met Nikki in early 2019 shortly after my first son was born. Nikki has always been extremely supportive of my life as a working mom and loves showering my kids with gifts. Nikki and Aaron in Iowa, 2019 I love that Nikki embraces being a mom. She is tough as nails when she’s staring down Russia and China, but she happily talks with regular people in Iowa and New Hampshire about their kids and the cost of eggs. Being a mom changed my life and my perspective on the world. Moms are ferocious when it comes to protecting their kids. They are fierce and compassionate, and they are not pushed around. As Nikki says, “when you kick back, it hurts them more if you are wearing heels.” It’s high time we put a mom in the White House. I’m so excited that I have the opportunity to work on this race and with such an incredible, conservative icon. I know Nikki will put in 110% every day, and she inspires me to do the same. Please join our team and support Nikki. As a mom, I understand that a lot of people can’t contribute to the campaign. But if you can—even $10 or $20—every dollar really does go a long way. Nikki has been on the road meeting voters since she announced and all that traveling to get her message out costs money. Your support makes every day of this campaign possible. Please give whatever you can. DONATE Thank you so much for your support! Best, Nachama Soloveichik Communications Director (And Aaron, 4, and Natan, 2) GET YOUR NIKKI HALEY FOR PRESIDENT MERCH A great way to show off your support for Nikki Haley is by getting your own Nikki Haley for President gear! All of our merchandise is made in America. ">Contribute now to support Nikki Haley and claim your Nikki Haley for President shirt today. >> Claim Your Shirt JOIN NIKKI’S TEAM Nikki Haley is the daughter of Indian immigrants, a proud military wife, and the mom of two amazing children. She’s served as governor of the great state of South Carolina and as America’s ambassador to the United Nations…and she’s a grateful citizen who knows our best days are yet to come, if we unite and fight to save our country. Nikki Haley is running for President because our country is on a path of doubt, division, and self-destruction, and we need a leader who has proven time and again that she can rise to the occasion, offer solutions, and focus on serving the people. In order to build momentum and get Nikki’s message out, we need you on her side. Will you join Nikki’s team and pitch in a donation today? Thank you in advance for your support. Thank you, Team Haley P.S. If you don’t have $1 or more to spare, all we ask is that you take one minute of your time to share this with 5 friends today. | My friend,
---
| When I served in the U.S. Army and fought on battlefields in corrupt, war-torn countries overseas, I saw what it looks like when the rule of law is non-existent.

When political enemies are targeted and jailed.

When power is abused for political vengeance and nations are transformed into banana republics.

But friend - I never thought I would see this come right here to the United States of America!

Yet, that's exactly what is happening right now with reports of a woke, Soros-funded DA in New York **TARGETING PRESIDENT TRUMP FOR ARREST** due to politics, not the law.

Can you imagine if it was Joe Biden being arrested instead? The liberal media would be losing their minds about the end of democracy.

This abuse of power must be met with a swift reaction. That's why I'm launching the [_America First Defense Fund_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62465798:6EgfYBGnN:m:1:3391001263:39F1505F5E15AC04190A2D25BF14526E:r) effective _immediately_ before the greatest country on Earth is transformed into a lawless banana republic before our very eyes.

Friend, this is urgent... please help!
---

---
| To put an even finer point on this: the radical Soros DA up in New York that we're talking about here is the same one who downgrades felony charges left and right and allows violent lawbreakers to roam the streets.

_He won 't go after actual criminals - yet he abuses his power to go after political enemies to try to launch his political career!_

That is not the country we know, friend. That is third-world lawlessness. [_I 'm asking you to fight back_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62465798:6EgfYBGnN:m:1:3391001263:39F1505F5E15AC04190A2D25BF14526E:r) before this becomes the new normal in the United States of America.

Please direct reinforcements to the defense fund below - there isn't much time before they move to arrest Trump, and we can't afford to be caught empty-handed at an urgent moment like this!

subject: The J6 Committee was a show trial
body:
The January 6th Committee knowingly and blatantly lied to the faces of the American people.
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=b4c733a71e39eac5a3842636bbf6a2abe6e84fdc3dbba5bedb8c5ab941f444d31382dd6b75f36c3956cfb3d36d493972f66d38868c6eb0b4)

| | Peter, the truth _finally_ comes out.
---
| [](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=b4c733a71e39eac5a3842636bbf6a2abe6e84fdc3dbba5bedb8c5ab941f444d31382dd6b75f36c3956cfb3d36d493972f66d38868c6eb0b4)
---
| | [EXPOSE MORE DEMCRATS' LIES](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=b4c733a71e39eac5a3842636bbf6a2abe6e84fdc3dbba5bedb8c5ab941f444d31382dd6b75f36c3956cfb3d36d493972f66d38868c6eb0b4)
---
Nancy Pelosi, Liz Cheney, and Democrats on the January 6th Committee knowingly and blatantly lied to the faces of the American people. **_-> They deceptively edited videos to fit their narrative_** **_-> They withheld critical video evidence_** **_-> They released footage without the permission of Capitol police. _** This isn't just bad politics -**it 's a betrayal of their oath of office and the American people's trust.** I believe we're only just beginning to unravel Pelosi's tenure of lies as Speaker. **But what 's more important is accountability. _[I AGREE >>](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=b4c733a71e39eac52f73c7455328b594696615fb8f3e2284733ac41c7ee623632705304b036368fec8b1682439578f2f9e9500d1fcd45d2b "I AGREE >>")_** Peter, these revelations mean nothing unless we take serious action to make government accountable to the American people again.

**[If you agree, please consider donating any amount to help continue our fight>>>](https://click.email.claudiatenneyforcongress.com/?qs=b4c733a71e39eac5617b6053686eaac6d351bdb7b42edb6fb3cea440b317829713c2adeca04d07c8800007f20ef1aa88a635a31e1f2ba973 "If you agree, please consider donating any amount to help continue our fight >>>")**
---
Thank you, Team Claudia

| My friend,
---
| When I served in the U.S. Army and fought on battlefields in corrupt, war-torn countries overseas, I saw what it looks like when the rule of law is non-existent.

When political enemies are targeted and jailed.

When power is abused for political vengeance and nations are transformed into banana republics.

But friend - I never thought I would see this come right here to the United States of America!

Yet, that's exactly what is happening right now with reports of a woke, Soros-funded DA in New York **TARGETING PRESIDENT TRUMP FOR ARREST** due to politics, not the law.

Can you imagine if it was Joe Biden being arrested instead? The liberal media would be losing their minds about the end of democracy.

This abuse of power must be met with a swift reaction. That's why I'm launching the [_America First Defense Fund_](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62466164:JVsWuBGWN:m:1:3331421248:DF2CCE1E8D53EC600AA1AFB63590867E:r) effective _immediately_ before the greatest country on Earth is transformed into a lawless banana republic before our very eyes.

Friend, this is urgent... please help!

name: Shift WA
subject: Taxes: repeal or reduce?
body:
Did you see our previous email?

Our state's latest forecast showed a $194 million increase for the remaining four months of this budget period. That means our state is still overtaxing hardworking families across our state.

Jay Inslee and his fellow Democrats attempted to downplay the revenue increase for weeks leading up the release. That's because their latest budget proposals (now expected later this week) will not contain a single tax break - and they will spend every dollar available.

**Despite economic uncertainty and recent high inflation, Democrats still refuse to ease financial pressure placed on Washingtonians by reducing taxes.** And they now need to pretend that the revenue forecast is weak in order to excuse their behavior.

Of course, Democrats had help in their attempts to downplay the increasing state revenue forecasted. Mainstream media outlets willingly complied with the liberal narrative that the increasing revenue meant less spending than is needed.**That 's why outlets like Shift WA are so important.**

We are exposing the Democrats' irresponsible spending and the mainstream media's compliance. [**A contribution of $25, $50 or $75 today means we can keep up our efforts well after the 2023 legislative session is over next month.**](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61618868:WBLgUdDNq:m:1:2610672541:1C9215B912773C78F650FCD5C2CBF99A:r)

Exposing Democrats' falsehoods and irresponsible agenda means we're paving the way for public accountability. **Shift WA 's efforts depend entirely on grassroot supporters like you. [Will you help us today?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61618868:WBLgUdDNq:m:1:2610672541:1C9215B912773C78F650FCD5C2CBF99A:r)**[
](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61618868:WBLgUdDNq:m:1:2610672541:1C9215B912773C78F650FCD5C2CBF99A:r)
Thank you for your ongoing support,

The Shift WA team

Given the most recent revenue forecast shows Washingtonians continue to overpay billions in state taxes, here are a handful of positive actions Democrats could take if they would just cooperate with Republicans. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61618869:WBLgUdDNq:m:1:2610672541:1C9215B912773C78F650FCD5C2CBF99A:r "Shift Washington")
---
| Friends,

Our state's much-anticipated legislative-session revenue forecast was released yesterday. It showed that while the economy is slowing down, revenues are continuing to climb, with the state taking in $194 million more in the current budget cycle (ending June 30) than was projected last November.

That will bring total revenue growth to 20.7% for this two-year budget over the last one - the fifth straight biennial period featuring a double-digit increase in state revenue (thanks to the tax increases which Jay Inslee promised to veto when he first ran for governor in 2012). Though Inslee and his fellow Democrats attempted to downplay the latest revenue increase, by saying that they will now have less money to spend than they had planned - though it's more than they are spending now.

**The reality remains that our state is still collecting a record amount of taxes from hardworking Washingtonians.** The next state budget, which actually starts this July, is still projected to grow by 2.4%, and the one beyond that (for July 2025-27) will be up another 7.1%.

However, the reality is that most economic indicators point to unsettling times. **Recent high inflation on necessary goods means families have tightened their wallets.** If there was any time to reduce taxes and ease cost burdens, it's now.

**Yet the Democrats in charge of our state have proved - time and again - that they are only interested in gaining more power by expanding government. **They refuse to relieve economic pressure on Washington families.

Given the most recent revenue forecast shows Washingtonians continue to overpay billions in state taxes, here are a handful of positive actions Democrats could take if they would just cooperate with Republicans:

* Reduce the state's share of the regressive sales tax
* Ease the burdensome property tax
* Repeal the unconstitutional state income tax capital gains
* Suspend the state's excessive gas tax
* Repeal the oppressive cap-and-trade tax
* Abolish the unjust state death tax
* Reform the destructive business and occupation tax
* Repeal the long-term care payroll tax

**[We want to know- of these taxes - which one would you like to see repealed or reduced most?](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61618870:WBLgUdDNq:m:1:2610672541:1C9215B912773C78F650FCD5C2CBF99A:r)**

[**Take our poll and let us know today!**
](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61618870:WBLgUdDNq:m:1:2610672541:1C9215B912773C78F650FCD5C2CBF99A:r)
Thank you,

The Shift WA Team | [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/61618871:WBLgUdDNq:m:1:2610672541:1C9215B912773C78F650FCD5C2CBF99A:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14162832&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWBLgUdDNq).
---

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: Survey on an urgent matter.
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

This sponsored message from Freedom Nation Today is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9e467f78a43541fd9478ff569fb049e6&_e=sZs_2i0gNgdK7idXkNqPDCUnRYZ1Z6-Os-x7IPO7B-ynU4Qu-r3RkH0DaqtQu3HNOctvxEjzSKi60yCL7SrMOmyLhwJ24bNhmjtnGEScZEaVCtQwQqATAfLTAURkGOkAez8t6zaItRLh7ZBm6ZQBwKssqGe3lWFYa1wsKfXpI1LM5sQIxxNL3xuHMSiUTsSZsrSE1_VE_-EfI10i9rpJ_2O5CFoppniU1j8uy282mci8re_84GvYqZynIAXUuZYaOJSeXbKihIoUji6cbEes5MeOomqmfeJLyPQ4K9QMVZqGcO_RE8UgpF4Zd-jdvDaQWPBcpgJQuXEGzzYMOQp9O3zaQKpSqGaDY_HAsIgXcTQ8cpwJDsEhovtaRQBzVf-n7fiORCFZpfDn1HiNyt4w5w%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9e467f78a43541fd9478ff569fb049e6&_e=sZs_2i0gNgdK7idXkNqPDCUnRYZ1Z6-Os-x7IPO7B-ynU4Qu-r3RkH0DaqtQu3HNOctvxEjzSKi60yCL7SrMOmyLhwJ24bNhmjtnGEScZEaVCtQwQqATAfLTAURkGOkAez8t6zaItRLh7ZBm6ZQBwKssqGe3lWFYa1wsKfXpI1LM5sQIxxNL3xuHMSiUTsSZsrSE1_VE_-EfI10i9rpJ_2O5CFoppniU1j8uy282mci8re_84GvYqZynIAXUuZYaw-ajX62x-yzgovhJSbyofv7Q2qx4JHMYh82dPgXSdweluWDlyKmG_2BzLyCyqhjskDzdoe7bSd_7EbrxsT4g82gOZyPjJJXaMAel2HWTuVKLAZAocBFXIFMcaLnmanmG4j8Q369u_H7MmKiZ9k8tyg%3D%3D) For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** [https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9e467f78a43541fd9478ff569fb049e6&_e=sZs_2i0gNgdK7idXkNqPDCUnRYZ1Z6-Os-x7IPO7B-ynU4Qu-r3RkH0DaqtQu3HNOctvxEjzSKi60yCL7SrMOmyLhwJ24bNhmjtnGEScZEaVCtQwQqATAfLTAURkGOkAez8t6zaItRLh7ZBm6ZQBwKssqGe3lWFYa1wsKfXpI1LM5sQIxxNL3xuHMSiUTsSZsrSE1_VE_-EfI10i9rpJ_2O5CFoppniU1j8uy282mci8re_84GvYqZynIAXUuZYanoIBlHnXuiM5cJvwRTEA3ckDJlzv3n5ZCRALlLlPouzNL_mJg9C615_DpdBpoE2ZQ1Ythc4NVjjtrDH3fT5NEqP_fKUqPcT9NVmBOLvCzaOaNxhIMmj3XwsP6d_QXsAvKW9b-VvZDU5WIXfgFD7IiQ%3D%3D) And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers.
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection. By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below: For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty. This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;" Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty; Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people; Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers. Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future. So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below: And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: bad news from The Washington Post

body:
I'll get right to it, team: The Washington Post just named my seat in Nevada one of the most endangered seats heading into 2024.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
I'm vulnerable, and I'm counting on your early grassroots support to help me fight back against the GOP. That's why I'm asking you directly: So please, will you split $20 or more right now between my campaign and Serve America to keep Nevada and the Senate blue? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
There's no question that Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies will pour millions of dollars into Nevada to try to buy this seat. He has done it before, and he nearly succeeded. That's why I'm relying on grassroots supporters like you to step up right here, right now – today.
Because it's not just your $20. It's your $20 combined with $20 from your neighbor, your friend, a waitress in Las Vegas, a nurse in Reno, and a small-business owner in Carson City. Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to keep this must-win seat blue.
Senate control could all come down to what happens in Nevada – so please, team, we need all hands on deck: Will you split $20 or more now between my campaign and Serve America – every dollar makes a crucial difference in these early days of the election cycle – to fuel our reelection campaign to victory and defend our Democratic Senate majority? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-rosen]
I can't tell you how grateful I am for your support. Thank you.
– Jacky

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Cliff | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good ---|--- | | | | | Follow Us | | ---|--- | Blue Amp Strategies 1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212 513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | | | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | | or
