name: Margaret Mary Dunn
subject: Life in prison for doing his job?
body:
Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

I'm praying God will touch your heart as you read this letter to help me save my son, Michael.

Michael is a police officer who dedicated his life to keeping our community safe in Farmers Branch, Texas.

_**But now he might be facing a life sentence in prison for shooting a dangerous career criminal who tried to run Michael down in a stolen truck.**_

[**Will you help my son?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d33cfcbd5c748a9ab2ce88f93ec6393&_e=dfjteq_yL9OuuB8ErzdN77MrUoTdLaiV2RwTy6Dq6LcHVZvHmJrKAyiPhO6L2b9Z8nEMF7oJ3aqMzfxcnuMZ7_7F5ST5Jxk1HjlV-1pv_oV_Mmdt6Bby4iLw3KrJRoCpf1j2e5Sjj-rzIY0qcC4c30ZMR6y5DjmbFtHBfuR8CnaSxqgSL8HLtaLzBQtvRQXg4ibexXpMd2sxqd1QcuhPPV5pKjuLQe_F_aPl3gP4SH-3JR7thrsiYsnBIC9X7FFj3epWwTiNehXYE0wjFxCY_qe1KBz9SzM6VSgdKz2B1ugyyMzUw2hja6rQgPXUQr4LGLRX7deCu4Ry5Ky58YvA6bJBrxy82c9iVpsDKJgXbPU%3D)

That's Michael in the photo.

[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d33cfcbd5c748a9ab2ce88f93ec6393&_e=dfjteq_yL9OuuB8ErzdN77MrUoTdLaiV2RwTy6Dq6LcHVZvHmJrKAyiPhO6L2b9Z8nEMF7oJ3aqMzfxcnuMZ7_7F5ST5Jxk1HjlV-1pv_oV_Mmdt6Bby4iLw3KrJRoCpf1j2e5Sjj-rzIY0qcC4c30ZMR6y5DjmbFtHBfuR8CnaSxqgSL8HLtaLzBQtvRQXg44EeWe8wxwAWn7qQGd7QzQy2CX8ydDZVVE8JxwGaFZfgPEyL2ufx2bb2x9T_tnjbCQecZeEEXr3MfVrkCDG_vpen-09B3ISKipM-tJUjETclyqJ8_mkIXTVcsKW3VUwhywaNSwz6Y2XCEGqkihLJYT14Snks3Eq_tChiLCTUKGY%3D) [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d33cfcbd5c748a9ab2ce88f93ec6393&_e=dfjteq_yL9OuuB8ErzdN77MrUoTdLaiV2RwTy6Dq6LcHVZvHmJrKAyiPhO6L2b9Z8nEMF7oJ3aqMzfxcnuMZ7_7F5ST5Jxk1HjlV-1pv_oV_Mmdt6Bby4iLw3KrJRoCpf1j2e5Sjj-rzIY0qcC4c30ZMR6y5DjmbFtHBfuR8CnaSxqgSL8HLtaLzBQtvRQXgqvAhp9ArTAoH6hstJR1eW09zYhQUCQ0poIaw5KDpezigwX-k9nCl9bY9hwVUy0zML-fo0E01JNNcRc6DcFUNNGJ4uCZh1iDzYxbGIHLzT8JnUVqnTdx2yXtVobrA9wNnXDV4r6pXEjiwdxr3ugdr0b6fSza5qTWLuEfvqcCBi08%3D)

In addition to being a police officer, Michael is also a Master Gunnery Sergeant in the United Stated Marine Corps Reserve.

I knew when he joined the police department that it was a dangerous job.

Every night on the news I saw another story of a police officer ambushed or killed in the line of duty.

It's been a heart wrenching time for the families of police officers in recent years.

What I didn't expect was that so many Americans would turn their backs on Michael in his time of need.

I now realize that it's all about fear. Fear of being attacked as a racist.

Fear of going against woke politicians and bureaucrats.

Fear of losing their jobs.

I assumed that the police department, the prosecutor's office, and everyone else in the government and the community would have Michael's back.

**But I was wrong.**

_So_ _now_ _Michael 's_ _life_ _is_ _at_ _stake_ _for_ _simply_ _doing_ _his_ _job_ _and_ _we_ _have_ _nobody_ _to_ _turn_ _to_ _except_ _for_ _good_ _hearted_ _strangers_ _like_ _you._

**[Will you please help me save my son Michael?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d33cfcbd5c748a9ab2ce88f93ec6393&_e=dfjteq_yL9OuuB8ErzdN77MrUoTdLaiV2RwTy6Dq6LcHVZvHmJrKAyiPhO6L2b9Z8nEMF7oJ3aqMzfxcnuMZ7_7F5ST5Jxk1HjlV-1pv_oV_Mmdt6Bby4iLw3KrJRoCpf1j2e5Sjj-rzIY0qcC4c30ZMR6y5DjmbFtHBfuR8CnaSxqgSL8HLtaLzBQtvRQXgB1Wp1dbfXDqAc-ZP0cJ_SrVoOZQash-vH-n-sjNQ0IRwoPkXIPlmz8UygXt6yGv2KXUxLg29a--F1jlyM4kuqyBpNV4OoxJmsxyOMWu3DTKgo9qLY4fUhk8pC5vnE8DyiPTiKnSISb0GxZcs6cNZCF0QUhra8WDiJtyC8EHgLNw%3D)**

Let me give you some more of the details...

Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade."

The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police.

Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man.

When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car.

The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him.

Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired.

The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene.

My son suffered back and leg injuries.

Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck.

In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community.

There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day.

He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others.

But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years.

Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did?

That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. **[Even if that means asking folks like you for financial support to help my son afford the best possible attorneys and legal advice.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d33cfcbd5c748a9ab2ce88f93ec6393&_e=dfjteq_yL9OuuB8ErzdN77MrUoTdLaiV2RwTy6Dq6LcHVZvHmJrKAyiPhO6L2b9Z8nEMF7oJ3aqMzfxcnuMZ7_7F5ST5Jxk1HjlV-1pv_oV_Mmdt6Bby4iLw3KrJRoCpf1j2e5Sjj-rzIY0qcC4c30ZMR6y5DjmbFtHBfuR8CnaSxqgSL8HLtaLzBQtvRQXguEVRT6kE_S1iY64p327Bo6cchcZGAWlH2kMPi6XZOqj1IQOYf3Ti-NteRrb53puRAXfyKK0M1aOZvP136SJiVKxy2r6yfc8ujEeCK2wAciim5BOowAh4MAb5m1isxD_dnGHEsKm5N1vxDhynO0o51nF8aNcaGOCG5dYjPW2KwXI%3D)**

After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died.

But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified.

And then our whole world was rocked.

**Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted.**

Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said:

"We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never."

I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court.

We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense.

After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser.

They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service.

So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds.

No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process.

Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime."

Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael.

_With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading._

Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). **LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have.**

LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.

The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.

And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son!

**[Will you please consider sending a tax-deductible contribution to the LELDF so they can help my son beat his charges?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d33cfcbd5c748a9ab2ce88f93ec6393&_e=dfjteq_yL9OuuB8ErzdN77MrUoTdLaiV2RwTy6Dq6LcHVZvHmJrKAyiPhO6L2b9Z8nEMF7oJ3aqMzfxcnuMZ7_7F5ST5Jxk1HjlV-1pv_oV_Mmdt6Bby4iLw3KrJRoCpf1j2e5Sjj-rzIY0qcC4c30ZMR6y5DjmbFtHBfuR8CnaSxqgSL8HLtaLzBQtvRQXgn8-ZRMr5EovBeQo4zbA-CJsFeXaS7r0P-fu74Pik5cgqxat1wvrpxQ9qVuBzm970CWEi-xfRyQ1lriQ9SvtXm9dPJ8r4u-zm2PM9sXDOS7QBGIRInhCLSAkl1rJZC6EkukHeYOU6qdV1xVfiIEs44Iuq1WHNkOxOAZeK8IXpgvE%3D)**

You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers.

Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a **[gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more,](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d33cfcbd5c748a9ab2ce88f93ec6393&_e=dfjteq_yL9OuuB8ErzdN77MrUoTdLaiV2RwTy6Dq6LcHVZvHmJrKAyiPhO6L2b9Z8nEMF7oJ3aqMzfxcnuMZ7_7F5ST5Jxk1HjlV-1pv_oV_Mmdt6Bby4iLw3KrJRoCpf1j2e5Sjj-rzIY0qcC4c30ZMR6y5DjmbFtHBfuR8CnaSxqgSL8HLtaLzBQtvRQXgcAsXH-wMTgU-dQfphlu9YpN4HVM-VoYtVzh77Lvkb8--NfTlzZrU_6dCkhyJrBUOUi_29RoTri0WTFgHogxOvd93nVSzg1Q5ay3IUgT5ktmmx9vr9UwOzxUmPk-Zx0vE013irY6iAEpuN6m_xFRh5wgNy1B8B7a2ZtwGLiX5OGU%3D)** I pray you will consider doing so.

Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing.

If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers.

My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal.
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d33cfcbd5c748a9ab2ce88f93ec6393&_e=dfjteq_yL9OuuB8ErzdN77MrUoTdLaiV2RwTy6Dq6LcHVZvHmJrKAyiPhO6L2b9Z8nEMF7oJ3aqMzfxcnuMZ7_7F5ST5Jxk1HjlV-1pv_oV_Mmdt6Bby4iLw3KrJRoCpf1j2e5Sjj-rzIY0qcC4c30ZMR6y5DjmbFtHBfuR8CnaSxqgSL8HLtaLzBQtvRQXgokEIv6RaRl35aFLYGxi7AQI2XTNZGN9Wp7QLV18JyeptTGmPG2WfyI5tW0VansX7WY3QEu5Ehhj7R3lUbKJboR3XnIfjjCA1lEcxCVIiJDZSy3O-nvH-pxRqHQhu2PBM-lNpA8FBD325PY9vKJeISUgFhmuw0rxOnUhOOgM0sVQ%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn_
[](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d33cfcbd5c748a9ab2ce88f93ec6393&_e=dfjteq_yL9OuuB8ErzdN77MrUoTdLaiV2RwTy6Dq6LcHVZvHmJrKAyiPhO6L2b9Z8nEMF7oJ3aqMzfxcnuMZ7_7F5ST5Jxk1HjlV-1pv_oV_Mmdt6Bby4iLw3KrJRoCpf1j2e5Sjj-rzIY0qcC4c30ZMR6y5DjmbFtHBfuR8CnaSxqgSL8HLtaLzBQtvRQXguJydLu_yUv-qRkmMfcqdneY8ClHEOzamWutUmEJNfIRfvf-hJMCLlIdgAuEX0ZiNWqhH1DjN3HifvKck6O2FgIqAAtYXO8eQuNQlu3XXzzB6RGA2tjekFpd9tuA_AbfquOekT1_r2mXUi-rRaBOq7Uidedt-hNhy0cLzETavQWc%3D)
_That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William_

I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today.

Sincerely,

Margaret Mary Dunn

PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind **[donation today of $35, $50, or $100](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=3d33cfcbd5c748a9ab2ce88f93ec6393&_e=dfjteq_yL9OuuB8ErzdN77MrUoTdLaiV2RwTy6Dq6LcHVZvHmJrKAyiPhO6L2b9Z8nEMF7oJ3aqMzfxcnuMZ7_7F5ST5Jxk1HjlV-1pv_oV_Mmdt6Bby4iLw3KrJRoCpf1j2e5Sjj-rzIY0qcC4c30ZMR6y5DjmbFtHBfuR8CnaSxqgSL8HLtaLzBQtvRQXg4s4uhwYgMyP1DmEgtgUbFSjg99o-NkXsJq3UVPNHJQJsvZq1nB5RTOyJoccaPPJhX2As3bnx0ryMrYw2HXQZPM7ptCIH5MW5F46nymyvsBWChgkSIWHyTZs02Lt7kTKEDhnp6VUHypLSgtF_RHXJ7B1Ky9lr_WRSQqsxe-hZL0o%3D)** to help Michael will mean so much to my family.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Freedom Nation Today

So now Michael 's life is at stake for simply doing his job and we have nobody to turn to except for good hearted strangers like you. Let me give you some more of the details... Michael and other Farmers Branch Police detectives tracked a stolen pickup truck to the parking lot of an "adult arcade." The truck was stolen by a convicted felon who was well-known to the police. Michael was assigned the task of arresting this man. When the suspect came back to the truck, Michael pulled up and stepped out of his police car. The criminal sped the stolen truck toward him. Michael had to do what every police officer hopes they never have to do: he drew his weapon and fired. The man driving the stolen truck died at the scene. My son suffered back and leg injuries. Michael had a split-second to think about if the career criminal speeding toward him was going to crush him to death with that stolen truck. In that split-second, he did what he needed to do in order to save his own life and the lives of his fellow officers and community. There's no doubt in my mind, and many others, that Michael made the right choice that day. He should be considered a hero for putting his life on the line to protect others. But right and wrong seem to have been turned upside down in the last few years. Why else would they be trying to put my son in prison for murder for what he did? That's why I'm willing to do whatever it takes to clear his name. After the incident, Michael was distraught to hear the criminal died. But the other officers assured him the shooting was justified. And then our whole world was rocked. Just 8 days after the incident Michael was indicted. Experts described the indictment as "unusually swift." The president of the Dallas Police Association said: "We have never had an investigation completed in less than eight days ready to hand over to the District Attorney. Never." I knew in my heart something was wrong - and we would be facing the fight of our lives to defend Michael in court. We started a fundraising campaign on the internet site "GoFundMe" to raise money for a proper legal defense. After a few days, "GoFundMe" shut down the fundraiser. They claimed Michael's actions as a police officer were an "act of hate" - and helping him violated their terms of service. So in this anti-police climate, politically woke climate, the case was closed in their minds. No "innocent until proven guilty." No due process. Instead, my son was smeared as a "murderer" who committed a "hate crime." Since then, my husband and I spent half our life savings on legal fees and bills to help Michael. With the investigation devastating my family... seeing Michael, an American hero, being smeared on the internet... and our family quickly running out of money to pay mounting court fees... hope was fading. Until we heard about the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). LELDF is the best friend a police officer could ever have. LELDF defends good officers, like my son, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty. The group's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department. And praise the Lord, LELDF saw it fit to help my son! You see, LELDF is a non-profit organization. It doesn't receive any funds from the government to help our police officers. Or, if the Lord has blessed you with the means to help with a I pray you will consider doing so. Please know any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. If you can't help financially today, I understand. And please keep Michael and our family in your prayers. My son Michael is an American hero who served our nation and his community. He shouldn't be locked behind bars for defending his life from a career criminal. That's a picture of Michael with his daughter - my granddaughter - Mary-Kaitlyn That's a picture of Michael with his Son - my grandson - William I pray you never go through something like this. But if you do, may God touch the hearts of kind people to help you - just as I'm praying He'll touch your heart to help my son today. Sincerely, Margaret Mary Dunn PS: LELDF relies on caring people like you to send donations so they can fight tooth and nail to help wrongly-accused police officers like Michael. And because LELDF is a non-profit, all donations are tax-deductible. Your kind to help Michael will mean so much to my family. \---------------- More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit www.leldf.org. And remember - Blue Lives Matter! (C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 Freedom Nation Today 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you. I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me.
**The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking:** **[_Will you give $5 or more right now – split between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand's – to help defend this battleground seat and keep the Senate blue?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60564604/397505952/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3993-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjliNWNmNS1jMmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxKl3WBI2cSHuvfLP-fiwoWbglqlecnef112MG52mxs=)**

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American.
But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.”
**The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you.**
**[_That’s why I’m asking for your support today, friend: Please, will you chip in $5 or more now – split between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand’s – so we can win in Ohio and defend the Senate? _](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60564609/397505957/-431201696?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk3993-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjliNWNmNS1jMmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxKl3WBI2cSHuvfLP-fiwoWbglqlecnef112MG52mxs=)**

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60564614/397505962/1575385346?refcode=jtk3993-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjliNWNmNS1jMmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxKl3WBI2cSHuvfLP-fiwoWbglqlecnef112MG52mxs=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. clean_body: Hi, friend, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. | | | = Hi, friend, it’s Sen. Sherrod Brown from Ohio. I’ve spent my life fighting for the Dignity of Work – and I mean all work. Whether you punch a time clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips, are raising children or caring for an aging parent, I’ll fight for you. I’m running for reelection so I can keep fighting for workers and families in the Senate – but I need your help. As the only remaining statewide Democrat in Ohio, analysts at CNN say I’m one of the most vulnerable senators on the ballot – and national Republicans are already launching attack ads against me. The battle for Senate control could all come down to Ohio – so please, I’m personally asking: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio, in a community of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. And I’ll be honest with you: The Ohio I live in now looks a lot different than the one I grew up in. I’m fighting in the Senate every day to bring those jobs back, to build our economy by investing in the middle class, and to ensure hard work pays off for every American. But I’m facing my toughest race yet – in a state Donald Trump won by 8 points. Last year’s Ohio Senate race was one of the most costly and competitive in the nation, and NBC News reports that this one could be “even nastier and more expensive.” The long and short of it is, I can’t win – and Democrats simply can’t hold onto our narrow Senate majority – if we don’t have strong grassroots support from folks like you. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Sherrod Brown and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = With gratitude, Sherrod Brown | * | = A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. = And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, = Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

subject: - First Fetterman, Now Lorinser

body:
Democrats helped defeat Dr. Oz. Now it's time to support Dr. Bob. Let me tell you about my dad. | The Hoodie Army helped defeat an elitist G
| | **Can't see this message?_[View in a browser](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/9fOS8wOPm/c?w=iDdK1vwM0SPWcMcUsaLpo1GmtVxNOXtbH2gTuJoOXzs.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9zby85Zk9TOHdPUG0_bGFuZ3VhZ2VUYWc9ZW4iLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ)_**
---
| | |
---
| | Good morning, My dad, Dr. Bob Lorinser, isn't like any other physician. He's running for Congress, and just like John Fetterman, he isn't exactly your typical political candidate.
---
| | Democrats helped defeat Dr. Oz. Now it's time to support Dr. Bob.Let me tell you about my dad.
---
| | [](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/9fOS8wOPm/c?w=HJL5UP6tzAYABHn2NM7soBzoWJRtCrAItvv2IkKZ_VU.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvTUlSdXJhbEZ1bmQiLCJyIjoiYzM5NWY4NzItNDk3YS00MzU3LTkyZGYtMjdkOTgxNjQ5ZDdhIiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)
---
| | The Hoodie Army helped defeat an elitist GOP candidate in rural Pennsylvania, turning blue dots in a red sea into a tidal wave that gave a working-class champion a seat at the table he so deserved. [Here's why](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/9fOS8wOPm/c?w=NFxlLLySxmJjF-LxqPm670PD2js1WC_HXtKThnsVlg0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudm90ZWRyYm9iLmNvbS9wb3N0L2Zvcm1lci1kaXBsb21hdC1ob3Blcy10by1iZS1maXJzdC1mYW1pbHktcGh5c2ljaWFuLXRvLXJlcHJlc2VudC1ydXJhbC1taWNoaWdhbiIsInIiOiJhNjJkYjYyNi1jMjA1LTQ2OGQtYWVjNS1lNTA2MDNhMjIzYmIiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIxODY2MjZkNS1jYTVlLTQ2MzMtODM0YS1lODgzZDBiZGRkNzUifQ) we need to do it again for Bob Lorinser in 2024.
---
| | | [**CONTRIBUTE**](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/9fOS8wOPm/c?w=sxWdo8Zor3cjlpAlgC7VqkrzDJ3q4qOPECoCJFn6cxg.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvTUlSdXJhbEZ1bmQiLCJyIjoiMjBjZmMzZTgtYjA3Ny00YTA3LTgwYTEtYjA4NDcyNWQyOTQ5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0)
---
| | I grew up in a house where medicine wasn't just a career for a family physician. It was my dad's calling to make a difference, to help people, a true vocation. He would regularly visit with patients in our living room late at night who couldn't afford to go to the clinic.
His primary care focused on Medicaid and Medicare recipients, substance abuse victims, disabled Veterans, and working-class families with children with behavior issues.
In his favorite hoodies, he would administer vaccines for players on my hockey team for free because he knew a healthy team is a winning team. The same applies to his constituency. Citizens cannot thrive without preventative care. The healthcare system is failing. That's one of my dad's core messages for Congress. Outrageously high medical bills, insurance disputes, a lack of mental health services, or citizens avoiding care altogether because of unaffordability and inaccessibility. Before we moved to the rural heartland, Dad got his moniker "Dr. Bob" from Native children while he was working at a clinic in Navajo Nation, serving an impoverished and disadvantaged community. It's where I learned cultural competency. Dr. Bob grew up in a split working-class home with five siblings. My grandfather was a union railroad worker, and my grandmother was a union nurse. My dad considers himself lucky, working his way up from community college to medical school, and he wants to provide similar opportunities for all Americans.
He's running for Congress to make the future brighter for his grandchildren and the next generation. For the same reasons he was a social worker at a Veterans hospital, served in the State Department, and became a public health director during COVID, his motivation to get to DC is all from a sense of duty to the country. With your help, my dad is committed to healing policy. He wants to alleviate the pain of struggling rural communities, and his biggest initiative is universal healthcare. He needs you in his corner to lead in Congress and create a publicly financed non-profit national health insurance program that fully covers medical costs for all Americans — including palliative and mental healthcare. [Can you chip in](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/9fOS8wOPm/c?w=QBI6cI4D9S-DFLMBPlUNo2twQfMwhH3lRS8ivTaMzH0.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvTUlSdXJhbEZ1bmQiLCJyIjoiM2ZhZmJkODUtY2FmZC00ZGNjLWE0OWMtMDFkZDZjODQxNzc5IiwibSI6Im1haWwiLCJjIjoiMTg2NjI2ZDUtY2E1ZS00NjMzLTgzNGEtZTg4M2QwYmRkZDc1In0) for Bob Lorinser today? His opponent is MAGA Republican in Northern Michigan. Against dark money and Super PACs, we're creating a grassroots movement in the Midwest that will ignite and inspire quality Democratic candidates up and down the ballot.
---
| | If you've recently contributed, thank you. Please disregard our ask, accept our gratitude and consider this correspondence a campaign update. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.
---

name: Jessica, Heritage Action
subject: ALERT: Biden just issued his FIRST-EVER Veto
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Heritage Action for America |
body:
Joe Biden issued the first veto of his presidency, preventing a bipartisan resolution that would undo his extreme "woke" ESG rule from going into effect.

| | | |
---
[](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02775%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=dk%2fucsJTWa1IVmRPhXSUlw&sysid=1)

---
Fellow conservative, Joe Biden issued the first veto of his presidency, preventing a bipartisan resolution that would undo his extreme "woke" ESG rule from going into effect. This rule will help the ESG agenda... ❌Destroy YOUR 401(k) with higher fees and lower returns ❌Allow ESG funds to be the DEFAULT plan option ❌Force a social credit system on businesses ❌Use your savings to pay for woke investments. ** It's a bad deal for all Americans.** At Heritage Action, we’ve been sounding the alarm about the dangers of the ESG agenda and its threat to the financial security of millions of Americans. We can’t let Biden and his cabal of “woke” radicals dictate the rules for retirements, investments, and how we operate our businesses. That is why we need your support today to continue our fight against the ESG agenda and protect the retirement savings of millions of Americans. **[Please donate to Heritage Action and help us fight against President Biden's destructive ESG agenda >>](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02777%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=78pfQmXLSPOGzRLTTXkSqQ&sysid=1)**
---
| | [**STAND WITH HERITAGE ACTION: STOP ESG >>**](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c02778%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GwZaVUubd8URL8EHrsIa1g&sysid=1)
---
Thank you, Jessica Anderson Executive Director | Heritage Action

name: Josh Hawley
subject: China, not Donald Trump is the threat to America's future
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62467637:6KtmIBGvN:m:1:3331421248:38FEB0107DBD4A432720B638CC6AB570:r)

name: Karen Greenhalgh
subject: Greenhalgh- Supporting Law Enforcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Geenhalgh for Delegate**
body:
| | |
---
| | Friends, As a strong supporter of law enforcement, I was proud to serve on the Public Safety Committee in the House of Delegates this past legislative session. Our legislation this year included efforts to keep some of the dangerous felons they intended to release behind bars, give our local law enforcement agencies more tools to get dangerous criminals off the street, and keep those who commit multiple crimes of violence with firearms behind bars longer. While these bills all passed the House, they failed in the Democrat controlled Senate, which has remained more concerned about the safety and comfort of criminals than the safety and security of everyday Virginians. I will always _back the blue_ and have made it a priority to get raises for law enforcement, expand training opportunities, and hold violent criminals accountable. Law enforcement plays a vital role in protecting our communities. I will continue to support funding our law enforcement officers, to ensure that they have the resources and training they need to keep our families and neighborhoods safe. Unfortunately, radical liberals are working every day to attack the brave men and women in law enforcement. They were passing legislation to release violent criminals and even voted to stop reporting sexual battery to police before Republicans stepped in. Now they are attempting to make it tougher for police officers to do their jobs. This shouldn’t be so difficult; keeping our families safe and standing with law enforcement should be a priority for EVERY legislator in the General Assembly. Stand with me in supporting our police officers! Your contribution of [$500, $250, $100 or $50](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/23a9f17af7861f4f16f79d307c796b93/37923/1f2c34bbde5bc958/fca0ee0a885aead0c3d6b838967d376c/37923) can help get my message out that our law enforcement deserve to be supported and we MUST stand firm together against violent crime! Thank you, Karen Greenhalgh

name: Jackson Lahmeyer
subject: From President Trump! MUST SEE...
body:
Message From President Trump President Trump issued his statement regarding our National Prayer Call on Monday night through his Truth Social account
| | |
---
## Message From President Trump
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19417873.11238.1.75bd80c126324549288290100c757559)
---
**President Trump** issued his statement regarding our National Prayer Call on Monday night through his Truth Social account. The Fake News media called it "_horrible_ " but **President Trump** labeled it an "_honor_." **We had over 3,000 Pastors and 115,000 people live with us on the stream with just ONE days' notice.** We are preparing for the next one and _you will definitely want to be a part of it..._ You can register at [www.pastors4trump.com](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19417873.11239.1.a875258535b05c27b8bad671676fd423)! **President Trump** also shared on Truth Social my Tweet about how impressive it was for him to request pray for our country instead of himself.
---
| [ ](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19417873.11240.1.7fa048c81d64a80d9b5b41fd23ca2e62)
---
If you would like to hear me explain what happened on the call when _leftist trolls_ invaded our online backstage you can listen to my interview with **OAN's Dan Ball** here: [https://www.oann.com/video/real-america-video/pastors-4-trump-host-nationwide-prayer/](https://sable.godaddy.com/c/375205?id=19417873.11241.1.f77c3bdd770f3032f56218b46331bc50)
Please continue to pray for President Trump!
Thank you,
Jackson Lahmeyer

That’s why Hawley had insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee launch one of their very first attack ads this cycle against Lucas Kunce. And it’s why Tucker Carlson tried to give Hawley cover for running away from the Capitol on January 6th on his cable news show earlier this month.

Peter, This year, we have a real chance to take control of important municipal races and show what the future of Indiana is going to look like. There are great Democrats running for mayor across Indiana and in a number of cities we are in position to keep or take a Democratic majority on the city council. It’s easy to get caught up in national news cycles and get distracted by Republican culture wars, but the Indiana Democratic Party is laser focused on winning elections at the local level. [**Help us win important mayoral and city council races this year by electing Democrats who share our values. Make a donation to the Indiana Democratic Party and help us get a leg up on our Republican opponents.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60544826/397453033/1643342139?refcode=230321-FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZjE2OGFmZS1hZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vzGTx3llZBkUKdkTIrfPqA8cwDQp90Zu1L_CvLENDMw=) We believe that Indiana deserves better than what Republican leadership has done to our state. ---
Elon is right - our children are being indoctrinated to hate America and espouse marxist ideas, and most parents don't even know it. But thankfully, we have a plan to put an end to the radical indoctrination in our schools and stand up for parents who are being kept in the dark. You may already know that the 1776 Project PAC was the first PAC of its kind; designed specifically to replace left wing school board members across the country. But what you may not know is that 2023 is the biggest election year for our schools on record. We're endorsing and supporting 250 conservative school board candidates! Friend, this is the largest school board election effort from any conservative organization in American HISTORY! And if we're going to pull this off- we need to know whether or not we can count on your support this year... Can we count on your support in pulling off the largest conservative school board sweep in American History?

subject: Your 2023 Second Amendment Survey
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vsU7kgdDNN

The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's
history and undermine our Constitution....

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osU7kgdDNN

Please see a special message from our
sponsor:

Dear Friend of the Constitution,

The far Left in America is attempting to
rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution-with
a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment.

Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's
Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands
that education is essential to the defense of liberty.

We are reaching and teaching millions of
Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this
without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding.

Could you take a few minutes to complete our
Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below?
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61623134:sU7kgdDNN:m:3:2532013465:92A3350F4BAAABAC8A28C6FD65A21B40:r

Your timely survey answers will help us reach
and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year
about the importance of liberty-which includes the rights
protected by the Second Amendment.

There is no question that one of the Left's
most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our
liberty is ignorance.

Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing
truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in
1844.

Today our educational outreach efforts
include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty,
such as the Second Amendment.

As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler
observed in Imprimis, our digest of liberty that reaches millions
of Americans: "The Second Amendment is an expression of first
principles."

This means the Second Amendment is essential
for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of
defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom.

This kind of thinking is foreign to most
college and university campuses today, where "safe spaces" are
now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an
example…

Not long ago, the University of Virginia
canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day.

Why?

The administration was concerned that firing
guns in honor of those who served their country and did their
part to defend our freedom would cause "panic" among the student
body.

Unfortunately, there are many more such
examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the
ongoing decline in civics education in America.

But instead of just TALKING, it's more
important to DO something about it.

That's why we have been working to expand our
educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.

And this work continues today.

That's why I would like your answers to our
brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today
at this secure link:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61623134:sU7kgdDNN:m:3:2532013465:92A3350F4BAAABAC8A28C6FD65A21B40:r

We believe that an educated citizenry is
essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan
said, "Freedom is never more than one generation away from
extinction."

Do you agree? I hope so.

This is why we reach and teach millions of
Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution.
It's also why we need your help today.

As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept
ONE PENNY of government funding-not even indirectly in the form
of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from
much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation.

Our independence from the government means
that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of
citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to
liberty.

It also means your gift really matters.

Today, you have a great opportunity to help
preserve liberty-including the Second Amendment-for future
generations.

After completing your Second Amendment
Survey, please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous
tax-deductible gift today.

And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll
send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our
thank you.

This hat commemorates our partnership with
USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best
American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and
Paralympics. But hurry-supplies are limited!

Thank you for your time and attention. I look
forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since
1844

P.S. Our Constitution-including the Second
Amendment-is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take
our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will
only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve
liberty for future generations. Thank you!
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61623134:sU7kgdDNN:m:3:2532013465:92A3350F4BAAABAC8A28C6FD65A21B40:r

name: Lena Moffitt, Evergreen Action
subject: 📅 3 months and 7 ways to take action
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY EVERGREEN ACTION
body:
Sign up to be a Power Player and be the first in the know
| | [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/signup/EPA-Rules-Clean-Power-Sign-up/?utm_source=ema_2023-03-21_epa_rules_clean_power_signup_&source=ema_2023-03-21_epa_rules_clean_power_signup_&t=2&akid=13298%2E53494%2EexMls4)
---
Friend,
This past year, we've been urging EPA to go further, faster on critical climate rules. And now, we're finally seeing some movement. Just last week, EPA passed a final Good Neighbor Rule— _right in line with the recommendations Evergreen action-takers like you called for._
**In the next three months, we hope to see EPA make critical progress on seven more regulations that are key to cleaning up pollution from the power sector. This means we have seven more opportunities to shape these key EPA standards. EPA needs to hear from you, so they know that dedicated climate advocates like us expect them to finalize the most ambitious rules possible.**
[_**Don't miss an opportunity to advocate for our clean energy future. Sign up to be an Evergreen Power Player and you'll be the first to know how to take action on each of these upcoming rules.**_](https://act.evergreenaction.com/signup/EPA-Rules-Clean-Power-Sign-up/?utm_source=ema_2023-03-21_epa_rules_clean_power_signup_&source=ema_2023-03-21_epa_rules_clean_power_signup_&t=3&akid=13298%2E53494%2EexMls4)
[JOIN OUR LIST OF ACTION TAKERS](https://act.evergreenaction.com/signup/EPA-Rules-Clean-Power-Sign-up/?utm_source=ema_2023-03-21_epa_rules_clean_power_signup_&source=ema_2023-03-21_epa_rules_clean_power_signup_&t=4&akid=13298%2E53494%2EexMls4)
---
Your advocacy has already helped Evergreen secure climate wins and shape bold, actionable policy. Now, in the coming months, here are the seven key power sector rules you can influence so we all have cleaner air, cleaner water, and healthier communities:
* Carbon Standards for New Power Plants (111(b)) & Carbon Standards for Existing Power Plants (111(d))
* Mercury and Air Toxics Standards (MATS)
* National Soot Standard
* Closing Startup Shutdown and Malfunction Loopholes
* Toxic Water Pollution Rule
* Coal Ash Rule

Once you're on our list, you'll be the first to know about opportunities to push for the strongest possible versions of these rules.
[JOIN OUR LIST OF ACTION TAKERS](https://act.evergreenaction.com/signup/EPA-Rules-Clean-Power-Sign-up/?utm_source=ema_2023-03-21_epa_rules_clean_power_signup_&source=ema_2023-03-21_epa_rules_clean_power_signup_&t=5&akid=13298%2E53494%2EexMls4)
---
The U.S. is making progress towards the clean energy future we need, but it's going to take all of us to get there. We're not giving up until the job is done, and we know you aren't either.
Onward,
Lena Moffitt
Executive Director, Evergreen Action
P.S. Big Polluters are already gearing up to push back against robust climate rules. They are not going to sit this one out—so we can't either. [_Join our list to ensure EPA fully seizes this opportunity to rein in pollution with strong standards._](https://act.evergreenaction.com/signup/EPA-Rules-Clean-Power-Sign-up/?utm_source=ema_2023-03-21_epa_rules_clean_power_signup_&source=ema_2023-03-21_epa_rules_clean_power_signup_&t=6&akid=13298%2E53494%2EexMls4)

clean_body: Sign up to be a Power Player and be the first in the know | | Friend, This past year, we've been urging EPA to go further, faster on critical climate rules. And now, we're finally seeing some movement. Just last week, EPA passed a final Good Neighbor Rule— right in line with the recommendations Evergreen action-takers like you called for. In the next three months, we hope to see EPA make critical progress on seven more regulations that are key to cleaning up pollution from the power sector. This means we have seven more opportunities to shape these key EPA standards. EPA needs to hear from you, so they know that dedicated climate advocates like us expect them to finalize the most ambitious rules possible. Your advocacy has already helped Evergreen secure climate wins and shape bold, actionable policy. Now, in the coming months, here are the seven key power sector rules you can influence so we all have cleaner air, cleaner water, and healthier communities: Carbon Standards for New Power Plants (111(b)) & Carbon Standards for Existing Power Plants (111(d)) Mercury and Air Toxics Standards (MATS) National Soot Standard Closing Startup Shutdown and Malfunction Loopholes Toxic Water Pollution Rule Coal Ash Rule Once you're on our list, you'll be the first to know about opportunities to push for the strongest possible versions of these rules. The U.S. is making progress towards the clean energy future we need, but it's going to take all of us to get there. We're not giving up until the job is done, and we know you aren't either. Onward, Lena Moffitt Executive Director, Evergreen Action P.S. Big Polluters are already gearing up to push back against robust climate rules. They are not going to sit this one out—so we can't either.

clean_body: Friend: Don't miss Wednesday morning's top conservative news! | | | | | | | | | Your input is critical to us and to the future of conservatism in America. We refuse to be silenced, and we hope you do too. and never miss a story. To ensure our email makes it to your inbox daily and not spam, please add our email address to your email contact list. | ## ## ## ## ## ## ## ## | ## ## ## | | | ## ## ## ## You Might Like | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- ## ## ## ##

name: Ron Johnson
subject: Rock bottom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
We ran out of money and barely made it over the finish line.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

The ugly truth is my campaign hit rock bottom.

We ran out of money and barely made it over the finish line.

The only reason we won was the support of brave patriots like you.

After getting hit with massive attacks funded by the Democrats' dark money, we unfortunately had to take on some campaign debt to survive.

And now, _**[we need help to retire our campaign debt.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqa8rrh0t2pal9paish0d8diiitseca00n1egq2o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg66oj6c9h2bs "we need help to retire our campaign debt.")**_

Friend, I hate to ask this, but it has to be done.

_**[Will you help us pay off this debt? Even $5 will be helpful.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3s00k60ppm1fbo4pua83bh1smdfulg8lbjgut1o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg66oj6c9h2bs "Will you help us pay off this debt? Even $5 will be helpful.")**_

The sooner we can retire this debt, the faster we can turn our attention to beating the Democrats again in 2024.

Thank you,

Ron Johnson

---
| | [CHIP IN TO PAY DOWN DEBT >>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zsjguf8o1cuf4ol3301nueme3m6sebb7tv37qn9o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg66oj6c9h2bs "CHIP IN TO PAY DOWN DEBT")
---

PS - I'm a man of my word. My promise to you is that I will always tell the truth and fight for you, your family and for America. **_[Will you help me keep going?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3frf23l3lfr8ekgnfsv3kalss9agrnl4l9gmtkg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg66oj6c9h2bs "Will you help me keep going?")_**

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zjp19q1gitjet6pmhoe5rnjjbfngr58cebd3tjn8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg66oj6c9h2bs "CHIP IN NOW")
---
---

Friend, thanks to you I survived a bruising campaign battle with the Left.

But winning took everything I had, and more. I took on some campaign debt, and now it's time to pay it off.

I hate to ask this, but **_[will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z161c9d793v28ua51d17vc01cpfoomrp5j7dpf38_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg66oj6c9h2bs "will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end")_** so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?

Any amount you can contribute will be helpful. Your help is greatly appreciated.

Thank you,
Ron Johnson

clean_body: We ran out of money and barely made it over the finish line. | | | | | Friend, The ugly truth is my campaign hit rock bottom. We ran out of money and barely made it over the finish line. The only reason we won was the support of brave patriots like you. After getting hit with massive attacks funded by the Democrats' dark money, we unfortunately had to take on some campaign debt to survive. And now, "we need help to retire our campaign debt." Friend, I hate to ask this, but it has to be done. "Will you help us pay off this debt? Even $5 will be helpful." The sooner we can retire this debt, the faster we can turn our attention to beating the Democrats again in 2024. Thank you, Ron Johnson | | "CHIP IN TO PAY DOWN DEBT" PS - I'm a man of my word. My promise to you is that I will always tell the truth and fight for you, your family and for America. "Will you help me keep going?" | | | "CHIP IN NOW" Friend, thanks to you I survived a bruising campaign battle with the Left. But winning took everything I had, and more. I took on some campaign debt, and now it's time to pay it off. I hate to ask this, but "will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end"** so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate? name: Ruben Gallego for AZ
subject: If you knew a $3 donation meant we’d replace Senator Sinema with a real Democrat, wouldn’t it be $3 well-spent?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
By the time you read this, hundreds of people have donated to help us reach our goals before the FEC deadline.
#

$3.
If you knew a $3 donation meant we’d replace Senator Sinema with a real Democrat, wouldn’t it be $3 well-spent?

name: Ron Johnson
subject: I hate to ask you this today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron Johnson For Senate, Inc
body:
But winning took everything I had, and more.

| |
---
| | | Friend,

The ugly truth is my campaign hit rock bottom.

We ran out of money and barely made it over the finish line.

The only reason we won was the support of brave patriots like you.

After getting hit with massive attacks funded by the Democrats' dark money, we unfortunately had to take on some campaign debt to survive.

And now, _**[we need help to retire our campaign debt.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z2d2ehua04275qsio8d35mn2229d54jpto37dt4o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg66oj6cjh2bs "we need help to retire our campaign debt.")**_

Friend, I hate to ask this, but it has to be done.

_**[Will you help us pay off this debt? Even $5 will be helpful.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6vkuct0iiqetkc72iis12reidkom0574pihl4vo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg66oj6cjh2bs "Will you help us pay off this debt? Even $5 will be helpful.")**_

The sooner we can retire this debt, the faster we can turn our attention to beating the Democrats again in 2024.

Thank you,

Ron Johnson

---
| | [CHIP IN TO PAY DOWN DEBT >>](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2znqa5u8fchk2pcunbp0on166h1n9ddc1pc2jcolg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg66oj6cjh2bs "CHIP IN TO PAY DOWN DEBT")
---

PS - I'm a man of my word. My promise to you is that I will always tell the truth and fight for you, your family and for America. **_[Will you help me keep going?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zijailaevq6h30d82fd0kd0jlun13qmqhnbeto28_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg66oj6cjh2bs "Will you help me keep going?")_**

---

---
---

Friend, thanks to you I survived a bruising campaign battle with the Left.

But winning took everything I had, and more. I took on some campaign debt, and now it's time to pay it off.

I hate to ask this, but **_[will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6okoe8nvof7i3q450mdbe878bjrafpe0r2r7qko_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg66oj6cjh2bs "will you help me finally see this campaign through to the end")_** so I can double down on our Conservative efforts in the Senate?

Any amount you can contribute will be helpful. Your help is greatly appreciated.

Thank you,
Ron Johnson

body:

Friend,
As we continue fighting together to help people afford their lives and live with dignity, safety, and respect, it has never been more important for us to continue building our coalition.
Republicans are still doing everything they can to systematically attack reproductive freedom across the country in the wake of the Supreme Court’s Dobbs decision.
I’m keeping my promise to fight back. This month, I joined a lawsuit challenging unnecessary restrictions for dispensing Mifepristone — the leading method for safe and effective abortion in the United States.
None of our efforts would be possible without your continued grassroots support, and with our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of the year coming up on March 31, we can’t slow down for one second.
That’s why I wanted to remind you that, according to our records, you’re still eligible to donate $50 (or $100 for couples) and receive a FULL REFUND with Minnesota’s Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program.
[**Will you take advantage of your PCR and send a refundable $50 contribution to my campaign? She’s a MAGA extremist who quickly rose from fringe congressional candidate to the core of the GOP–she has the ear of Speaker Kevin McCarthy, sits on some of the most powerful committees in Congress, and is a potential vice presidential pick for Donald Trump.

[_**So we’re fighting back–and we need your help. name: DLCC Special Elections Team
subject: We only have six days before our next must-win special election
body:
With only six days until our next must-win election, we must ramp up our momentum. | | |
---
| | **Just this year, state Democrats have won 12 key special elections – including one last night in Georgia! But with six days until our next must-win election, we must ramp up our momentum. Take a look at what we’re up against →** **🗓️ Virginia: March 28, 2023
🗓️ Wisconsin: April 4, 2023
🗓️ New Hampshire: May 16, 2023
🗓️ Florida: May 16, 2023
🗓️ Kentucky: May 16, 2023
🗓️ Pennsylvania: May 16, 2023 ** Special elections at the state level don’t get the same level of attention or funding that races at the federal level receive – when in reality, the outcome of state-level elections affect voters’ day-to-day lives more than other elections. That’s why it’s more urgent than ever that we invest our time, resources, and energy into electing state Democrats _right now._ [ So what do you say? With just six days until polls close in our next must-win special election, will you donate $7 or whatever feels right to you? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mG4J0reDhlzm8Tg9PulpB9Vrrw0Xqoc6t-4EdoJn-fGe1P3aWe9GdCgd-pbRQasmO6omLaJHYXcDB9hKRpUOsrlKX6cyf2rTjlpbhHrNPId16CRhqnUFMi17bHelgPu2zDUHUOo8ULwY8RkyvuCw4BqvmvAVK9SZdVqSKhAzT3T-ra5NrLpzW7bWBxv5oFkaugTqugguQPw4h5sefDfVSpsZHnSVUCFlV2reEonrYPCrPunnWT0Z1ixSKrbrMqs2WgKHiapHHiuEu7U2odKvo671g1GFKn9tWesv4G2972QwpFGb_YiPjsaffhGsNhDIiF5IZwEpQai31uLoYs-kJWqlvg0jKMZtkPU-qluP3szY4A2PllbBXLv6xppGaWfADPVWUeA30sFwR8cbFdOn0OSx_c8_2LKAZbU9LNQY_Y9MqI-p0iq3iTfE-luMoDB41G30YJNw5xNtX0TTqXrFAFAh8QfDkaCAuDsaPwmkl8lE8AvZOMoqc6-y8o0thVyJjIfQjtmCX1ljI5lT5WuDGaxsDM6d5Hmw34rBidGguepoR9bIwuTZBcM_vLbN9xW-L_4DGzswIyVBuX5wO1wuBnxE/3up/e2hFHsT4SpuK21b1SMEyBw/h0/DVDOMuS1v1AdDtLkykNarYuFicgY2DnmzVl9OVT4i90) When Democrats get elected, they pass comprehensive legislation that betters our communities but when state Republicans win, we see the disastrous effects of their far-right agenda take hold of abortion rights, voting rights, and more.**We mean it: 420+ anti-LGBTQ+ bills have already been introduced this year – but we have the ability to lower this number by electing state Democrats into state legislatures across the country!** Special elections are one of the best ways we can expand Democratic power in states like yours. But we don’t stand a chance of defeating the party of extremism without you by our side. [Can you rush $7 right now to give Democrats the resources they need to WIN against Republican extremists in elections across the country? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953zawayJU7NskUpAoU2FWeYrq1lFR55S3_Ci6S1MgB3mG4J0reDhlzm8Tg9PulpB9Vrrw0Xqoc6t-4EdoJn-fGe1P3aWe9GdCgd-pbRQasmO6omLaJHYXcDB9hKRpUOsrlKX6cyf2rTjlpbhHrNPId16CRhqnUFMi17bHelgPu2zDUHUOo8ULwY8RkyvuCw4Bqv9lj6_OEI7H15aZrLAgBbKgTksOWB68FZIkqCOwxidWmCXI8NvqwFMoKwuyNeXhNpwg54cYANqb5CE_k8y6Tc4GqMzFuoKt66LVgY9hT1Xqk4BJQJSTNdBq4ZYMc7wxrhtpPusrS8zWsXFILAyi2oMNnuE33GvoNKTvMuJ0jyEWowT0f55nYN22QHA_9uhQ95AZZvBs6O-88sbUO1hC9N0l1Lmk258bBXu0hQzINXBrL9c0BwUZAlMThOh4Fn4GCbfAg1uwfLVDJzLP1y93wt-cnBvxeML4KgJZnI51WBjyqNml27XffAxgmtWXHfFXw4JrZiKBzDzaPD_jKhopjP5kwiWleJAQQqjZZv78Yr6WMxIg8-C_O1GxIg9I12OlhOT14UqSPLEhUTdmBOeOhsIXOxmFmgE4Ze-0rrs-9QAQVpyUttIRUqrSLUsTxAxxOw/3up/e2hFHsT4SpuK21b1SMEyBw/h1/zO9shPJxmL0OQAlB4KLgJKzdTrpJJWznyG8hcIhS4TA) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

clean_body: With only six days until our next must-win election, we must ramp up our momentum. | | | | | Just this year, state Democrats have won 12 key special elections – including one last night in Georgia! But with six days until our next must-win election, we must ramp up our momentum. Take a look at what we’re up against → 🗓️ Virginia: March 28, 2023 🗓️ Wisconsin: April 4, 2023 🗓️ New Hampshire: May 16, 2023 🗓️ Florida: May 16, 2023 🗓️ Kentucky: May 16, 2023 🗓️ Pennsylvania: May 16, 2023 Special elections at the state level don’t get the same level of attention or funding that races at the federal level receive – when in reality, the outcome of state-level elections affect voters’ day-to-day lives more than other elections. That’s why it’s more urgent than ever that we invest our time, resources, and energy into electing state Democrats right now. When Democrats get elected, they pass comprehensive legislation that betters our communities but when state Republicans win, we see the disastrous effects of their far-right agenda take hold of abortion rights, voting rights, and more.We mean it: 420+ anti-LGBTQ+ bills have already been introduced this year – but we have the ability to lower this number by electing state Democrats into state legislatures across the country! Special elections are one of the best ways we can expand Democratic power in states like yours. But we don’t stand a chance of defeating the party of extremism without you by our side. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thanks for fighting with us, DLCC Special Elections Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: DC Statehood Bill introduced with OVERWHELMING SUPPORT from Dem Senators!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly.

| |
---
| | | **Democrats in the Senate have introduced legislation to make Washington DC a state and they’re seeing OVERWHELMING SUPPORT.**

This is NOT a threat to be taken lightly. DC is a FAR LEFT stronghold. Should it become a state, it would PERMANENTLY give Democrats two more far left Senators that they could use to transform America BEYOND RECOGNITION.

**The following Democrats are in FULL SUPPORT:**

---
| | | _Chuck Schumer (D-N.Y.)
Tom Carper (D-Del.)
Chris Van Hollen (D-Md.)
Tammy Baldwin (D-Wis.)
Michael Bennet (D-Colo.)
Richard Blumenthal (D-Conn.)
Cory Booker (D-N.J.)
Sherrod Brown (D-Ohio)
Maria Cantwell (D-Wash.
Ben Cardin (D-Md.)
Bob Casey (D-Pa.)
Chris Coons (D-Del.)
Catherine Cortez Masto (D-N.M.)
Tammy Duckworth (D-Ill.)
Richard Durbin (D-Ill.)
Dianne Feinstein (D-Calif.)
John Fetterman (D-Pa.)
Maggie Hassan (D-N.H.)
Martin Heinrich (D-N.M.)
John Hickenlooper (D-Colo.)
Mazie Hirono (D-Hawaii)
Tim Kaine (D-Va.)_

---
| _Amy Klobuchar (D-Minn.)
Ben Ray Lujan (D-N.M.)
Ed Markey (D-Mass.)
Bob Menendez (D-N.J.)
Jeff Merkley (D-Ore.)
Chris Murphy (D-Conn.)
Patty Murray (D-Wash.)
Jon Ossoff (D-Ga.)
Alex Padilla (D-Calif.)
Gary Peters (D-Mich.)
Jack Reed (D-R.I.)
Bernie Sanders (I-Vt.)
Brian Schatz (D-Hawaii)
Tina Smith (D-Minn.)
Debbie Stabenow (D-Mich.)
Mark Warner (D-Va.)
Raphael Warnock (D-Ga.)
Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.)
Peter Welch (D-Vt.)
Sheldon Whitehouse (D-R.I.)
Ron Wyden (D-Ore.)._

---
| | [STOP DC STATEHOOD](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653897%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zTyvUfree7umEtjKiJwMeQ&sysid=1)
---

The Democrats are in FULL CONTROL of the Senate and the White House. Chuck Schumer wants this to happen. Joe Biden wants this to happen.

A Republican House is the LAST line of defense.

Democrats know they can’t win with standard tactics so they’re making a power play by trying to flip the game board to their advantage!

It is IMPERATIVE that we stop this radical power grab right here and now. If the Dems get away with this, NOTHING. ELSE. MATTERS.

**[Will you join your fellow patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this blatant Dem scheme for power?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653898%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=AtaZDwM19etLsFE2OlXqKw&sysid=1 "Will you join your fellow
patriots and House Republicans in taking a stand against DC Statehood and this
blatant Dem scheme for power? ")**

---
| | [STOP DC STATEHOOD](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c653897%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zTyvUfree7umEtjKiJwMeQ&sysid=1)
---

Thank you,
Kevin McCarthy

name: Tennessee Voter Project
subject: Kids in Tennessee Deserve Better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TN Voter Project; Isaac Kimes, Esq
body:
https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject [https://www.facebook.com/TNVoterProject]
March 22, 2023
Dear friend,
We've got to do better by kids in Tennessee. Our children deserve state-of-the-art education, safe neighborhoods, and a wealth of opportunities for their future.
A report by the Annie E. Casey Foundation last year ranked Tennessee 36th in the nation for overall child well-being. And our state has long fell behind in how it invests in education. Right now, Republicans in our state legislature are hell-bent on prioritizing everything but our children. This is why TVP will be hyper focused on local races throughout the state.
When we elect Democrats to local office, they stand in the gap for our kids.
HELP TVP SUPPORT CANDIDATES FOCUSED ON EDUCATION AND OPPORTUNITY FOR KIDS [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
In Shelby County, Democrats have made historic investments in education, especially pre-K for families with limited income [https://www.naco.org/blog/shelby-county-outcomes-financing-supports-1000-seats-high-quality-pre-k] . Nashville Mayor John Cooper is proposing funding for three new schools [https://www.nashville.gov/departments/mayor/news/mayor-cooper-builds-historic-investments-education-and-public-safety] this budget season, in addition to the six schools they've funded during his term.
In the upcoming Memphis election, we have an opportunity to elect a Mayor willing to get the City back in the business of investing in Memphis Shelby County Schools.
Can you chip in $23 to help TVP prepare for the 2023 elections and elect Democrats focused on education and opportunity for our kids? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tvpaug17_1]
Thank you for your support,
Tennessee Voter Project Staff

name: Dick Durbin
subject: The GOP’s dangerous new gun bill
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
We should be working for public safety — not catering to the gun lobby.
#
Peter,
As Chair of the Senate Judiciary Committee, I oversaw hearings on the impact of the Supreme Court’s _Bruen_ decision — a ruling that has unleashed pure chaos with regards to our gun laws.
The GOP’s response? New legislation that would codify this backward decision into federal law.
Republicans in states across the country are already using _Bruen_ to justify stripping gun safety measures. For example, judges in Texas are actually allowing domestic abusers to buy firearms.
When the Constitution was drafted, firearms were muskets — not modern assault weapons. I do not believe any of us can argue today’s environment is what our Founding Fathers had in mind.
The Senate should be working for public safety — not catering to the NRA and the gun lobby.
**[If you’re as outraged as I am, I need you standing with me. The Democratic majority will keep working to reform and strengthen our gun laws and fight the dangerous Republican efforts to enshrine a Supreme Court decision that the gun lobby called a “landmark win.” But we need supporters like you behind us. Will you rush in a contribution right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60560147/397493211/1112957568?refcode=dd_em_230322_1_t1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTQ2YzUzYy1iZGM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LpOHC2pqBRzKtSz0kAKTbA5UM7A9JVuSFZBQNgFrRL0=)**
My best,
Dick Durbin

name: Kash Patel
subject: The REAL story of January 6th
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62468859:6KmMKBGNB:m:1:3391001263:1957F8D08DA9408DD241636D7B4B80D1:r)

Peter,

The government and fake news media are lying to you!

They called the January 6th protest a _" deadly insurrection,"_ but the video evidence doesn't back it up.

A small number of people broke windows and attacked police officers, and they should be prosecuted. The majority of the protestors were peaceful.

We need to help those January 6th defendants stand up against the Deep State.

**I 'm launching the _Kash Foundation_ to offer legal help to America First defendants like the ones from the January 6th witch hunts.** I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage President Trump. As the former head of counterterrorism and former senior aide to President Trump, I will do everything in my power to help out.

[_**As a personal favor, can you help me raise $33,000 in the next 48 hours to fund our legal battles for the January 6th defendants in court. Click below to show your support today!**_](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62468859:6KmMKBGNB:m:1:3391001263:1957F8D08DA9408DD241636D7B4B80D1:r)

**Support the January 6th Defendants**

**Goal:** $33,000

[Donate >>](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62468859:6KmMKBGNB:m:1:3391001263:1957F8D08DA9408DD241636D7B4B80D1:r) ****

**

The January 6th Committee lied.
* They lied about how Brian Sicknick died.
* They lied about Rep. Barry Loudermilk taking rioters on a reconnaissance mission.
* They lied about Rep. Josh Hawley running away.
* They lied about Ray Epps.

name: ICYMI News
subject: Restore our traditions of empowered citizenship
body:
Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem

| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zr2usn7dpf01f379vtalhe77j2rikhn49tontug0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg69o76clh2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called "**[American Citizenship and Its Decline](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zccdk26mg8mr3s8igulp3oolb3op0fpn5eih6img_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg69o76clh2bs)** ," and the online course is based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen_.

Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgdg03enr8ot7hlpf4ab2abondn3eunvrg336dd8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg69o76clh2bs)
---
| | The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present--given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

You can receive a DVD box set of "**American Citizenship and Its Decline** " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/citizenship-dvd](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoehduapic5o0jm362iq63dfekmuaq4jfhie5dlo_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg69o76clh2bs)

Best wishes,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z19q3mnlkcsmh8ka2klkjasdfljporspdllkvvfg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkir39tdkmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8o37c1im0or246h22sh2s8i66pr4slg69o76clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z6c9qmku5jn6vnu5rt0b4bbigpmdnfhqk2fe47s0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4slg69o76clh2bs)_

name: Tom Malinowski
subject: The real problem we’re facing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Districts for Democracy
body:
| | Hi folks, it’s Tom Malinowski.

Here’s one for your “believe it or not” file: A children’s textbook publisher recently changed a passage on the great civil rights icon Rosa Parks to appease Ron DeSantis’s school censorship in Florida. The book still says she was ordered to the back of the bus, but without explaining that it was because of her race! [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60563210/397500627/1763729747?amount=10&refcode=EM_NBI_DFD_20230322_FR_DFDLaunch_1_WL_DistrictsforDemocracy_NA_NA_DFDLaunch&refcode2=c596355b-c0c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzYzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTk2MzU1Yi1jMGM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Roc4u39-U1pQmZ1Ze5amq85fU4WEL8suWxlTymq6tCU=) Another publisher changed a social studies textbook to say only that "certain groups of people" were barred from serving on juries during segregation, without mentioning that it was because they were African American.

This isn’t just happening in states where MAGA Republicans have won control. The same extreme groups pushing for censorship in Florida are organizing in New Jersey. In Mendham Township, where they took over the school board recently, they are trying to ban an award-winning graphic novel for high school seniors. They’ve even demanded that their adult members get to sit in classrooms to monitor what teachers say and teach.

[I’m sure you can imagine where this leads. The problem we’re facing is not just individual books being banned — after all, people will probably read those books even more because they are being targeted. It is the climate of fear and intimidation these censorship campaigns are creating for our schools. When MAGA school board members and legislators pass laws criminalizing anything “inappropriate” or “divisive,” teachers and textbook publishers have to worry about every word they utter, lest they fall on the wrong side of these vague standards.

On one level, I get why these extreme groups are targeting our schools. If someone actually believes that the 2020 election was stolen, that vaccines don’t work, or that QAnon is real, then of course that person is going to be threatened by government-run public schools that teach kids how to think critically and to distinguish fact from fiction.

But that’s precisely why our schools are so important to our democracy. That’s why we must stand up for the right of teachers to teach and of students to learn without politicians’ interference and intimidation.

In New Jersey, we have incredible public schools and amazingly bright students. The last thing we need is to bring the chaos and controversy that’s dominated our politics in the last few years into our kids’ lives — not to mention the expensive legal fights these controversies will bring, which taxpayers will have to pay for.

[The book-banning brigade got organized first. But there are a lot more of us, whatever political party we identify with, who want to protect our schools as sanctuaries of freedom of expression and academic rigor, and the democracy that depends on them. Here’s one for your “believe it or not” file: A children’s textbook publisher recently changed a passage on the great civil rights icon Rosa Parks to appease Ron DeSantis’s school censorship in Florida. The book still says she was ordered to the back of the bus, but without explaining that it was because of her race! = Another publisher changed a social studies textbook to say only that "certain groups of people" were barred from serving on juries during segregation, without mentioning that it was because they were African American. This isn’t just happening in states where MAGA Republicans have won control. The same extreme groups pushing for censorship in Florida are organizing in New Jersey. In Mendham Township, where they took over the school board recently, they are trying to ban an award-winning graphic novel for high school seniors. They’ve even demanded that their adult members get to sit in classrooms to monitor what teachers say and teach. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = The problem we’re facing is not just individual books being banned — after all, people will probably read those books even more because they are being targeted. When MAGA school board members and legislators pass laws criminalizing anything “inappropriate” or “divisive,” teachers and textbook publishers have to worry about every word they utter, lest they fall on the wrong side of these vague standards.
