name: Gov. Asa Hutchinson
subject: Have you heard of “doom scrolling?”
body:
| | [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469088:JWq6dBGgN:m:1:3331421248:F2E58D74F17E727A79CB74FB358B0BC8:r)
---
A lot of new folks have joined us recently, so in case I haven't had the opportunity to say 'hi' or introduce myself yet, **_I'm Asa Hutchinson_**. As former Governor of Arkansas, former Reagan-appointed U.S. Attorney, former Under Secretary for Border Security, and former head of the DEA, I know firsthand the challenges America and Americans face when it comes to national security._**From border security to cyber threats, crumbling infrastructure and water quality, we have a lot on our plate. So much so, it 's hard to keep track of. [Would you mind taking a minute to answer my National Security Survey, to answer the question, 'is America still strong and Free?'](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469088:JWq6dBGgN:m:1:3331421248:F2E58D74F17E727A79CB74FB358B0BC8:r) I'm bringing together hundreds-of-thousands of Americans together in common cause, to ensure just that, an America that is strong and free and I value your opinion.**_
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469088:JWq6dBGgN:m:1:3331421248:F2E58D74F17E727A79CB74FB358B0BC8:r)
---
With so much negativity and division in the world, it can be hard to keep a positive outlook. Just scroll on Twitter for twenty seconds - doom scrolling so I'm told - and that point is made abundantly clear. _**Yet I firmly believe that America's best days are ahead, and I'm excited to be working towards a brighter future alongside folks,[hopefully those like you](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469088:JWq6dBGgN:m:1:3331421248:F2E58D74F17E727A79CB74FB358B0BC8:r), ready to lead this nation in a new direction.**_ That's why I'm committed to working with leaders from both sides of the aisle to find common-sense solutions that keep America safe and secure. That's why I founded America Strong & Free! _**[But it is not something we- nor I - can do alone. We need your help. That's why I'm excited to launch this National Security Survey, asking folks if they believe America is still strong and free, asking folks, 'where do we go from here?'](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469088:JWq6dBGgN:m:1:3331421248:F2E58D74F17E727A79CB74FB358B0BC8:r)**_ I want to hear from people like you about your concerns, ideas, and hopes for the future. _**By working together and sharing perspectives, we can unite around real results, not rancor.**_ _**[So please, take a few minutes to fill out our National Security Survey.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469088:JWq6dBGgN:m:1:3331421248:F2E58D74F17E727A79CB74FB358B0BC8:r)**_ Your responses will help shape our policies and bring us closer to a more secure, prosperous future. _**And always remember to keep a positive outlook, even when things get tough.**_ With your continued support, I'm confident that we can overcome any obstacle and create a brighter tomorrow for all Americans. Thank you for all you do!
---
_**Talk soon and God Bless.**_
---
| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469088:JWq6dBGgN:m:1:3331421248:F2E58D74F17E727A79CB74FB358B0BC8:r)
---
Governor Asa Hutchinson
---

|
---

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Derek, we couldn’t have gotten to where we are without your support. But if we’re going to keep building a better America, we need to keep up the momentum.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
I’m asking you to support the DNC’s work to organize across the country, protect the right to vote, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide in the months and years ahead. | |
---
Derek, we have the momentum on our side. With the support of this grassroots team, our administration has helped create 12 million new jobs, capped insulin at $35 a month for many Americans, passed the largest climate investment ever, made historic infrastructure investments, _and_ protected marriage equality in federal law. **But this was just the start of our work --_we have to finish the job_. To build on our progress together, we need to elect more Democrats nationwide. So, I’m asking:** **[Will you renew your DNC membership with a gift of $10 today? clean_body: I’m asking you to support the DNC’s work to organize across the country, protect the right to vote, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot nationwide in the months and years ahead. | | Derek, we have the momentum on our side. With the support of this grassroots team, our administration has helped create 12 million new jobs, capped insulin at $35 a month for many Americans, passed the largest climate investment ever, made historic infrastructure investments, and protected marriage equality in federal law. But this was just the start of our work --we have to finish the job. To build on our progress together, we need to elect more Democrats nationwide. So, I’m asking: Derek, we couldn’t have gotten to where we are without your support. But if we’re going to keep building a better America, we have to keep up the momentum. So, I’m coming to you personally to ask you to support the DNC’s work today. From protecting the right to vote to organizing across the country, the DNC is laying the groundwork to elect Democrats nationwide in the months and years ahead. Thank you for everything, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States Kamala Harris: Adam Schultz / Biden for President Photo. CC BY-NC-SA 2.0 Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . name: =?utf-8?Q?Tyler=20B.=20Jones?=
subject: Under the Dome - Your Update from the Legislature
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/leadershipacademy-8132924?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
|
Dear Friend,

**The Legislature is set to host Conference Weekend this Saturday and Sunday, so lawmakers are preparing to discuss bills that have not yet been resolved. **Legislators are saying that they could potentially end the session a few days early, but everything is still up in the air for the time being.

**Here is what has been going on this week in the Capitol!**

Gov. Tate Reeves has been busy signing and approving bills that have come across his desk.

**Post-partum Medicaid coverage has officially been enacted into law after Reeves signed[SB 2212](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=e6337b4a2f&e=5703353baa). **This bill provides Medicaid coverage to mothers for an entire year after giving birth, compared to the two months of coverage previously provided.

Post-partum coverage will begin in July.

Aside from approving legislation, Reeves has also vetoed a few bills that he believes are not good policies for Mississippi.

**[SB 2224](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0047b18d36&e=5703353baa) would have authorized the Insurance Commissioner to adopt rules and regulations addressing particular provider reimbursement rates. **After passing the Senate unanimously and the House by a vote of 111 to 5, Reeves vetoed the bill, citing it was anti-free market.

Reeves said this bill gives the Commissioner too much power in overseeing healthcare rates and establishing contracts between private parties, and if passed, he feared it would have violated several constitutional provisions.

Reeves vetoed another bill this week that dealt with insurance. **[SB 2622](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=647b131b69&e=5703353baa) focused on the Medicaid program known as the "Mississippi Prior Authorization Reform Act."**

While the bill would force insurance companies to give an answer faster than they had been, Reeves said, it has a few unintended consequences such as increased costs and incorrectly placed administrative hearings.

Along with new bills arriving on the governor's desk daily, lawmakers are still working hard to ensure the final few pieces of legislation survive during the last few weeks of the session.

**[HB 1723](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=103042865c&e=5703353baa) from Rep. Trey Lamar would grant tax credits to businesses that support food banks.** Businesses now can get a dollar-for-dollar credit from the Department of Revenue for donating to one of the state's four food banks.

While we would like to see full income tax elimination when dealing with tax policy, tax credits such as this are a step in the right direction. This bill has passed both chambers and is awaiting approval from the governor.

Mississippi could soon see Safe Haven Baby Box protection in the state. **If[HB 1318](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=3a5e877f93&e=5703353baa) passes out of conference, mothers, as a last resort during desperate times, will have 45 days after birth to drop off their child in a safe location without legal repercussions.** It will also allow for an easier installation process for these boxes.

In a Post-Dobbs era, we believe that having a resource such as this will save the lives of many babies.

**Both[SB 2346](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=09409e7afa&e=5703353baa) and [HB 1315](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=8f1888b3ab&e=5703353baa) would ban minors from accessing pornographic material.** The wording differs in the two bills, with each being taken to conference for further discussion.

Have a great rest of your week!
---
|
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=dfe359afc1&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
All the best,

Tyler B. Jones
Director of Communications and Legislative Affairs

---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/profile?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=d1fa0ce4e3) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=d1fa0ce4e3).

body:
Add your name today. | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60564268/397504437/-820256091?refcode=EM_PET_230322MMSS_N_TK_90DA_4_NG_N_Logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY1NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZmM2NTY4My1jMmM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fFvv9CyeTMosRNemnxQI4rj1szqY-rRxPX7yUhTfpno=)

The GOP wants to raise the retirement age and gut Social Security and Medicare as part of their budget plans – and we can’t let them succeed.

Kevin McCarthy is spending millions to attack Democrats with lies and false narratives, but the GOP are the ones proposing these cuts while Democrats defend Social Security and Medicare.

We know that these cuts would be devastating to seniors in our communities who rely on these services for groceries, housing, and more. That’s why we’re putting together a petition to say NO to Republican cuts to Medicare and Social Security.

**[President Biden will veto any bill that cuts Medicare and Social Security, and we want you to stand with him in this fight. name: Peter DeFazio
subject: Val’s made all the right enemies
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Val Hoyle for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60564900/397507404/553882890?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDQxOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzNlY2ZjYi1jM2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m06MTWHDnPXiJVqN95917c7m3-Zu08eD-kMbbmnGFjI=&emci=d88596d0-31c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=ac3ecfcb-c3c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9636579)
---

| | Peter – Over 35 years in Congress, I always used to say I could tell if I was doing a good job or not by who hated me the most. **I'm thrilled to say Val Hoyle has made all the same enemies as me.** And boy, do the powers-that-be come after you when they feel threatened. But, as I say, that's how you know you're doing the right thing. [**I'm putting everything I've got behind Val – and I'm asking you to do the same. Peter, I'm James Comer, the head of GOP investigations. I haven't sent many emails like this before so please hear me out.
Now that I'm leading the investigations in DC, my good name is being attacked every day by the White House and dark money groups.
| [ **DEFEND COMER** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62468233:6SuBdBGwN:m:1:3365131770:5FF8443A30E6170D085C466F9664475A:r)
---
I'm not kidding, there is a guy at the White House whose entire job is to attack me in the national press every day because I have the courage to shine a light on the failures of the Biden Administration.
[**I 'm working day and night to defend myself from these attacks, and I'm relying on patriots across the country to support my campaign so I can fight back against these attacks.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62468233:6SuBdBGwN:m:1:3365131770:5FF8443A30E6170D085C466F9664475A:r)
The Left has even launched a dark money group called the "Congressional Integrity Project" to undermine our work. They are determined to stop the truth about Joe and Hunter from seeing the light of day.
**[If you're as serious about exposing Biden as I am, I'm asking for your help with a contribution to my campaign.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62468233:6SuBdBGwN:m:1:3365131770:5FF8443A30E6170D085C466F9664475A:r)**
It's crucial that I'm able to fight back against these attacks, my integrity and credibility must be defended.
Thanks for everything you're doing in our movement, I really do appreciate it. Thank you,

# A New Era for Freedom and FUN!
Hello , It's Austin Petersen, thanks for opening my email to you. I know it's been some time since you may have heard from me so I wanted to write you and let you know what I've been up to lately. Firstly let me say I hope you are well and that you and your loved ones are happy and healthy. Thank you again for being a supporter of mine in the past. I am still committed to the fight for liberty in the United States, and I haven't given up hope that the American people can one day be as free as you and I would hope. These days I am the host of the Wake Up America show, which is a liberty talk show that live streams every Monday-Friday from 7-9am central time. You can watch it at [wakeupamericashow.com](https://trk.klclick3.com/ls/click?upn=ASXKvAjcErsqlm4oIu3uV7fzibpMeDNH7yZnW7y9ATY3Ph-2F5p8IPuPvLy9LUSYV89m-2B0rh3YGUUyjQ0j9K2XK3U8RV356GNyX046BDxv-2FiFnUITJAxj7FFUI4S7zFXTpeuJh_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhPNoyNNs9JMNQ4Sbb-2BxTu6BqQxNZE0WdQvERc11eTS28zH-2BsZL7bDy43Q6-2FnD-2FpThBesLgptc1OkbileR4cruA8nkU0mwDXuFLCcSMyh0BLq7xbRijYzO-2FCoIpiZruv1eeBLKmdAREJBNlXHq8CBCTCsVhlMBPSpfUt8Kb9BHTubheojtIndjN8-2FN6hEtGtBVjxe9-2B3RjPngzYwhR1JBdqgaUzjxllTXKoqOQEG3DZWmu-2F9h6wGqfJJj-2BjMNbnt65pbrlnqV43W0n-2Bp1okUtLXkNm8oF7ulkcgg56XgqYFVWD1tCldfgJ5YLUXA-2FT2MSFkJIPN-2B1-2FBiYZyvl0QxygoMXj-2BC-2FTiu7x-2B9h6o0oug3YgYVRO7PbdO2KrED7DvqKE-3D) ## My latest liberty venture
Also I have some great news! I have launched a new ecommerce venture in order to help supply the next wave of patriots with the gear they need to fight back against tyranny in the many states. Have you seen it yet? The website is at [AP4Libertyshop.com](https://trk.klclick3.com/ls/click?upn=ASXKvAjcErsqlm4oIu3uV7boFBX20IZ50-2BuD5QtOcb-2BWy-2Btj4LDm95jOgo3BjpMdVvqTeSVKMFVyFOMsFlKN9gNNEcwnUey5ar9Q1NJgI3S4WygJvDRJX5hXLm51eDaWsAMn_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhPNoyNNs9JMNQ4Sbb-2BxTu6BqQxNZE0WdQvERc11eTS28zH-2BsZL7bDy43Q6-2FnD-2FpThBesLgptc1OkbileR4cruA8nkU0mwDXuFLCcSMyh0BLq7xbRijYzO-2FCoIpiZruv1eeBLKmdAREJBNlXHq8CBCTCsVhlMBPSpfUt8Kb9BHTubheojtIndjN8-2FN6hEtGtBVjxe9-2B3RjPngzYwhR1JBdqr90n2tRAHQu-2BuQ98-2BtPvpDfxgwomw-2Fcu1GkwdBKaIuOWs-2BqKe9MB2lJMDCaNUK9Q6Vw3MO1HKw3kMeGEoTcxrjg8GMd4YZh2X9O2yGxFpoQ5c-2BE8BRGaKlzePprHiUj4dYJ4MyLBSWp8CSK8MnsD5XMlk-2F5jd0UK03n2-2FvjjxYo-3D), and I've been having so much fun making fun, funny, and patriotic items to help educate people about the principles of liberty as well as have a good laugh. I've listed some of the items you can find below and I hope you will enjoy them. As always, I am grateful for your sincere concern for our nation's future, and with your support I will continue the fight in any way that I can. Please feel free to be in touch with your thoughts on what we can do together! Your friend, Austin Petersen

clean_body: Austin Petersen here with an update! | | | | | | Can't see this email? | | | | | | A New Era for Freedom and FUN! Hello , It's Austin Petersen, thanks for opening my email to you. I know it's been some time since you may have heard from me so I wanted to write you and let you know what I've been up to lately. Firstly let me say I hope you are well and that you and your loved ones are happy and healthy. Thank you again for being a supporter of mine in the past. I am still committed to the fight for liberty in the United States, and I haven't given up hope that the American people can one day be as free as you and I would hope. These days I am the host of the Wake Up America show, which is a liberty talk show that live streams every Monday-Friday from 7-9am central time. You can watch it at or the best place to watch it is on my or My latest liberty venture Also I have some great news! I have launched a new ecommerce venture in order to help supply the next wave of patriots with the gear they need to fight back against tyranny in the many states. Have you seen it yet? The website is at , and I've been having so much fun making fun, funny, and patriotic items to help educate people about the principles of liberty as well as have a good laugh. I've listed some of the items you can find below and I hope you will enjoy them. As always, I am grateful for your sincere concern for our nation's future, and with your support I will continue the fight in any way that I can. Please feel free to be in touch with your thoughts on what we can do together! name: Gavin Newsom
subject: The chart the GOP and NRA don’t want you to see
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEWSOM FOR CALIFORNIA – GOVERNOR – 2022
body:
Do you know what the number one killer of kids in America is? It’s not car crashes or cancer.

Friends —
Do you know what the number one killer of kids in America is? It’s not car crashes or cancer.
It’s guns.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/1844?t=1&akid=1173%2E4767699%2E_QES0c)
Meanwhile, in Missouri... which has the 4th highest gun death per capita rate in the country.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/1845?t=2&akid=1173%2E4767699%2E_QES0c)
It’s insane.
Meanwhile, California has one of the lowest per capita rates of gun deaths in America.
The idea that we put up with this in America is ridiculous. We know how to make our communities safer. The Second Amendment is not a suicide pact, folks.
\- Gavin Newsom
* * *

☀️ **Hi. Please don’t go just yet.** ❤️
In California, we’re fighting to pass a ballot measure that will fundamentally transform the mental health system in our state. It’s a plan to take people with acute mental illness and substance abuse problems out of the shadows and encampments and into longer-term housing and treatment. The plan will save lives and give families peace of mind. If that sounds like a good idea to you, please contribute $20 to help us pass it at the ballot box. We can’t get it passed without you.
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $20](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ggm-em-march23-mental-health/?amount=20&refcode=em230322-1-150-3TS&refcode2=1173_4767699__QES0c&akid=1173%2E4767699%2E_QES0c)**

---
| | Friends, As your top law enforcement officer in Kentucky, I know what it means to be tough on crime. I've stood side by side with the brave men and women in uniform to enforce the law and hold criminals accountable.

When a recent attack ad tried to question my record on crime I had to laugh. What will they come up with next? My [_**record of being tough on crime**_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/88045d71e3804cfb/2772ea3689eb5f12c3d6b838967d376c/40933) and upholding the rule of law is proven day in and day out. I have fought for Kentucky and won! Don't just take my word for it, take the word of so many of law enforcement leaders across the state who stand by me and stand by my record. [_**Read their full statement here:**_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/88045d71e3804cfb/3b2e190fb76aa85ac3d6b838967d376c/40933)

---
While my opponent is making up lies to put in another tv ad - I've been out in the community doing the real work to keep our communities safe. [_**Donate $15, $25, $50, $100 or more to stand with law enforcement!**_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/88045d71e3804cfb/cebd62c52ca37334c3d6b838967d376c/40933) Like my friends in law enforcement pointed out, I stood by them when Governor Beshear's Parole Board wanted to relax the rules to give violent criminals serving life-sentences parole hearings and secured a court order to stop the rule from going into effect. I fought for real reform to protect our communities when the Biden administration turned a blind eye to the border crisis and fentanyl infiltrating our state. I've led the way to stop child trafficking and fighting against child abuse working with other law enforcement agencies to do more. [_**Rush my contribution of $15, $25, $50, $100 or more to stand for law and order in Kentucky!**_](http://sendpatriot.campstrategic.com/go/1/5bcfc7c5c9bba8f816f79d307c796b93/40933/88045d71e3804cfb/0c40198080b8976ac3d6b838967d376c/40933)

name: Morgan
subject: Do you have a moment?

body:
Hi Peter,
I'm writing to you today on behalf of Unleash America, a mission dedicated to supporting leaders across America who embody the American spirit.

As Honorary Chairman of Unleash America, Ret. Navy Captain Hung Cao has served for 25 years, and his life's story is a testament to the American Dream. As a refugee from Vietnam in 1975, he and his family came to America the right way - legally - and has since built a life here that is a shining example of what can be accomplished with hard work and dedication.
**
At Unleash America, we believe that our country needs leaders who share these values. We need leaders who will fight for the principles that make our country great - freedom, democracy, and opportunity for all. And we need your help to make this happen.**

That's why we're asking for your support today. Your donation will help us support candidates across America who share our vision for the future of this country. With your help, we can ensure that these leaders have the resources they need to compete in today's political landscape.

Your contribution will go towards supporting these candidates, helping them get their message out to voters and compete against the millions of dollars in funding that the Radical Left has already announced. We can't let them win. We can't let them silence our voices and marginalize our values.
**
By donating to Unleash America, you're making a statement. You're saying that you believe in the American Dream. You're saying that you believe in the future of this country. And you're saying that you're willing to fight for what you believe in.**

So please, take a moment to click on the link below and donate today. Every dollar counts, and we appreciate your support.

**[https://secure.winred.com/unleash-america-pac/join-today](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=ecaa4fa04aad4811965b027c4eb364b9&_e=2Knb_Tt9e4KFoy9OZ0MPYldb-xSe3DCbW1r3HYUi7FiQ10ftWVcwHqnrKw5tFOzbCTJgeV0U1KeQxbdy2KHgWmNGR470hGzEEfayD97xClrsghPXiS7ZhBky1yVa-sWMwltctei_Ov90cMTzICueufZ6eRk_pMu034ce4BL7YcmarSKfKBgkcWjA9V8yocb91zLd4GiCxH8OSjZtVZE6M9_zksY2x_oDsV6asK6pbweTdlHe1UrqcYSwAiMzrVqpfHKyMJLwdEbYqKdy4g9XGaQEUvHs6bnEjg_dRX4hoL7ZmNAp7PtSCIx-TQqxuUk3PrIUqOnOY7UJRuDM-MNB8w%3D%3D)**

Sincerely,

Morgan
Team Unleash America

Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. [www.unleashamericapac.com](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=ecaa4fa04aad4811965b027c4eb364b9&_e=8tCLN3D6RKYArxFIvJSRpTrbBO-QWGtbNnZovjOciCLVPe-0fyCXlMY0THd9qs0Yg0oiFxkYC3rh8TtO-ujlDwTNL0niGikFEso57SggUY1Bd58unVtoVC9b-UFQSMBAtuxXyhFffVT48peswfToUt8t_8IntRDxWcOLaxKyMSh1r2T_ww6-4gW2tXhjBhdTIEx7WQIo4mN2ENRHN0v7MEKvkkRW8uueDsqaJmdOGTiXMsTcMCSqd9_tqigpuU178KlRcnkZ7LRkel393SjWKavytD89F337sQWPFND54LM%3D)

Peter, this is about more than President Trump. This is about the two-tiered justice system Democrats have created: **one for themselves and one to go after their political enemies.** **This is coming, and we need to be ready – we can’t let this go unanswered. ** If they can do this to President Trump, they can do it to any American who disagrees with their radical agenda. Peter, I need your help to fight against this tyranny. body:
Exclusive video inside | America's female gun owners are being TARGETED by gun-grabbers in Washington. Joe Biden is determined to BAN and CONFISCATE law-abiding Americans' firearms...
We are helping NRA fundraise. Questions? 1(800)662-3888

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469315:JSf7HBG8N:m:1:3331421248:CF3DC45E7E70D792EEB8E2DC4A51349B:r)

**[AMERICA'S WOMEN STAND AGAINST BIDEN'S ANTI-GUN AGENDA >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469315:JSf7HBG8N:m:1:3331421248:CF3DC45E7E70D792EEB8E2DC4A51349B:r)**
**[WATCH THE VIDEO»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469315:JSf7HBG8N:m:1:3331421248:CF3DC45E7E70D792EEB8E2DC4A51349B:r)**
Peter,

_Have you seen this video?_

America's female gun owners are being TARGETED by gun-grabbers in Washington. _Joe Biden is determined to BAN and CONFISCATE law-abiding Americans' firearms, but our nation's women are not standing for it._

Following Biden's _deranged_ State of the Union Address, in which he said he wants to BAN America's most popular guns, the NRA released a new video of some of our country's bravest and boldest women who are FIGHTING BACK.
**[WATCH THE VIDEO»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469315:JSf7HBG8N:m:1:3331421248:CF3DC45E7E70D792EEB8E2DC4A51349B:r)**
The courageous women in this video are tired of Joe Biden and Kamala Harris ignoring criminals and pushing unconstitutional firearm bans on law-abiding Americans. _That's why we're continuing to lead the fight to protect our Second Amendment._

Gun-grabbers in Congress and the White House have **armed bodyguards** to protect them. How can they turn around and work to disable everyday Americans from defending themselves? _The NRA will always work to preserve the constitutionally guaranteed rights of ALL AMERICANS._

**[Watch our exclusive video HERE and chip in to help us STOP the Biden Administration from leaving America's women defenseless.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469315:JSf7HBG8N:m:1:3331421248:CF3DC45E7E70D792EEB8E2DC4A51349B:r)**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469315:JSf7HBG8N:m:1:3331421248:CF3DC45E7E70D792EEB8E2DC4A51349B:r)
**[CONTRIBUTE $250»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469316:JSf7HBG8N:m:1:3331421248:CF3DC45E7E70D792EEB8E2DC4A51349B:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $150»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469317:JSf7HBG8N:m:1:3331421248:CF3DC45E7E70D792EEB8E2DC4A51349B:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $50»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469315:JSf7HBG8N:m:1:3331421248:CF3DC45E7E70D792EEB8E2DC4A51349B:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE $23»](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469318:JSf7HBG8N:m:1:3331421248:CF3DC45E7E70D792EEB8E2DC4A51349B:r)**
**[CONTRIBUTE ANY AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469319:JSf7HBG8N:m:1:3331421248:CF3DC45E7E70D792EEB8E2DC4A51349B:r)**
Radical gun-grabbers like to say, without evidence, that the Second Amendment puts everyday Americans in danger. But they're WRONG. **Law-abiding citizens use their firearms to keep their communities safe, like the woman in our video who used her AR-15 to save her kids.** They MUST be allowed to continue to defend themselves.

The NRA is doing everything it can to stave off the gun-grabbers' assault on our Second Amendment. _As the women in the video make clear, these policies are a matter of life and death._ **We NEED to continue to defend gun rights with everything we have, and we can't do it without you.**

**[Donate ANY AMOUNT TODAY to stand with female gun owners across America and help protect their right to self-defense.>>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469315:JSf7HBG8N:m:1:3331421248:CF3DC45E7E70D792EEB8E2DC4A51349B:r)**

Thank you,

The National Rifle Association

| | **Our country is facing a housing crisis. Teachers, nurses, firefighters, and other hard-working Americans can't afford to buy homes.** In fact, as many as 15 million Americans are spending **more than half of their income** to keep a roof over their heads. And more than half a million folks don't have a home at all. It's past time to do something about it. **I have a plan to help get more people into homes and make housing more affordable for working Americans. Here's a quick rundown of what's in it:** →**Increase the supply of affordable housing** by strengthening our tax code to benefit middle-income folks and renters. →**Invest in underserved and low-income communities** , ensuring everyone has access to stable and affordable housing. →**Down payment assistance to first-time home buyers** , so the generation that has been locked out of homeownership can finally achieve its dreams of owning a home. →**Reduce homelessness** by providing a roof over the head of our unhoused neighbors**, and expand services so they can stay housed.** The climb out of housing poverty is nearly impossible to do alone. →**Provide incentives for environmentally friendly land use** and development policies as our communities continue to grow. Housing is a human right. Everyone deserves to have a roof over their head. **This is an essential and ever-evolving conversation. We need everyone's voices.[I want you to join the conversation on Facebook today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60568561/397521632/-863621094?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDgwNjFiMC1jY2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wkSf30b9oYPyYMGPgLS3l0R4uOZmjbl4Dwtv2LdYVu0=&emci=57ffd6a4-0ac8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=048061b0-ccc8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=9818364)** Peter — this Women's History Month we’re _celebrating big_ by recognizing Vice President Kamala Harris for her remarkable leadership and dedication to public service! [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60568921/397522739/-597267033?refcode=em_UTC_PET_WHM-VPHarris_032223_img&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ1ZjViNzMxLWNlYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UQ3TaQ1TOxbrQpr3EOpDJjYl5JBx2MvRtWgAMmd3yqM=&emci=06c1d24f-36c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=d5f5b731-cec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=16951753) As the first Black woman and person of South Asian heritage to hold the position of Vice President, she has paved the way for diversity and representation in government. Plus, she's been kicking butt in office by casting tie-breaking votes that led to the passage of meaningful legislation, including the historic Inflation Reduction Act. And let's not forget that she's a champion for women's healthcare — and promoting human rights and democratic values on the world stage. Vice President Harris is a force to be reckoned with! [What better way to celebrate this trailblazer than by dedicating a special thank you card to show her how much we appreciate her leadership! name: Gov. Asa Hutchinson
subject: Have you heard of “doom scrolling?”
body:
| | [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469089:JrtKhBGnN:m:1:3391001263:45310F3FBFBEDB01F2C11CFE6BD69048:r)
---
A lot of new folks have joined us recently, so in case I haven't had the opportunity to say 'hi' or introduce myself yet, **_I'm Asa Hutchinson_**. As former Governor of Arkansas, former Reagan-appointed U.S. Attorney, former Under Secretary for Border Security, and former head of the DEA, I know firsthand the challenges America and Americans face when it comes to national security._**From border security to cyber threats, crumbling infrastructure and water quality, we have a lot on our plate. So much so, it 's hard to keep track of. [Would you mind taking a minute to answer my National Security Survey, to answer the question, 'is America still strong and Free?'](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469089:JrtKhBGnN:m:1:3391001263:45310F3FBFBEDB01F2C11CFE6BD69048:r) I'm bringing together hundreds-of-thousands of Americans together in common cause, to ensure just that, an America that is strong and free and I value your opinion.**_
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469089:JrtKhBGnN:m:1:3391001263:45310F3FBFBEDB01F2C11CFE6BD69048:r)
---
With so much negativity and division in the world, it can be hard to keep a positive outlook. Just scroll on Twitter for twenty seconds - doom scrolling so I'm told - and that point is made abundantly clear. _**Yet I firmly believe that America's best days are ahead, and I'm excited to be working towards a brighter future alongside folks,[hopefully those like you](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469089:JrtKhBGnN:m:1:3391001263:45310F3FBFBEDB01F2C11CFE6BD69048:r), ready to lead this nation in a new direction.**_ That's why I'm committed to working with leaders from both sides of the aisle to find common-sense solutions that keep America safe and secure. That's why I founded America Strong & Free! _**[But it is not something we- nor I - can do alone. We need your help. That's why I'm excited to launch this National Security Survey, asking folks if they believe America is still strong and free, asking folks, 'where do we go from here?'](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469089:JrtKhBGnN:m:1:3391001263:45310F3FBFBEDB01F2C11CFE6BD69048:r)**_ I want to hear from people like you about your concerns, ideas, and hopes for the future. _**By working together and sharing perspectives, we can unite around real results, not rancor.**_ _**[So please, take a few minutes to fill out our National Security Survey.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469089:JrtKhBGnN:m:1:3391001263:45310F3FBFBEDB01F2C11CFE6BD69048:r)**_ Your responses will help shape our policies and bring us closer to a more secure, prosperous future. _**And always remember to keep a positive outlook, even when things get tough.**_ With your continued support, I'm confident that we can overcome any obstacle and create a brighter tomorrow for all Americans. Thank you for all you do!
---
_**Talk soon and God Bless.**_
---
| [ ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62469089:JrtKhBGnN:m:1:3391001263:45310F3FBFBEDB01F2C11CFE6BD69048:r)
---
Governor Asa Hutchinson
---

|

As former Governor of Arkansas, former Reagan-appointed U.S. Attorney, former Under Secretary for Border Security, and former head of the DEA, I know firsthand the challenges America and Americans face when it comes to national security.From border security to cyber threats, crumbling infrastructure and water quality, we have a lot on our plate. So much so, it 's hard to keep track of. I'm bringing together hundreds-of-thousands of Americans together in common cause, to ensure just that, an America that is strong and free and I value your opinion. | With so much negativity and division in the world, it can be hard to keep a positive outlook. Just scroll on Twitter for twenty seconds - doom scrolling so I'm told - and that point is made abundantly clear. Yet I firmly believe that America's best days are ahead, and I'm excited to be working towards a brighter future alongside folks,, ready to lead this nation in a new direction. That's why I'm committed to working with leaders from both sides of the aisle to find common-sense solutions that keep America safe and secure. That's why I founded America Strong & Free! I want to hear from people like you about your concerns, ideas, and hopes for the future. By working together and sharing perspectives, we can unite around real results, not rancor. Your responses will help shape our policies and bring us closer to a more secure, prosperous future. And always remember to keep a positive outlook, even when things get tough. With your continued support, I'm confident that we can overcome any obstacle and create a brighter tomorrow for all Americans. Thank you for all you do! Talk soon and God Bless. | Governor Asa Hutchinson | This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system February 17, 2023. Hey Peter, Jon Tester here.

I’m not like most of my colleagues in the Senate, and it’s not too hard to see why. All you have to do is look at my $12 flattop haircut and my collection of dirt-stained t-shirts.

**I’m the Senate’s only working farmer, and damn proud of it.**

Yes, it can make for early mornings and late nights during planting and harvest seasons — but it keeps me grounded, and gives me a unique perspective on issues. Like how climate change affects my farm, or how rural communities like mine need high-speed internet.

**These are real challenges that deserve real solutions, and that’s what I’m fighting for in Washington. But political experts rank my seat as one of the most likely to flip red, so I need your help to beat the odds and win this critical race:**

body:
Stop and read this:

| |

---
| | | ** TRUMP ARREST UPDATE **
STOP AND READ THIS:

President Donald J. Trump is expecting his imminent arrest. We now know this entire investigation is about one thing and one thing only:

**It 's an attempt to intimidate Conservatives who stand up to the Radical Left. They want to SCARE you into silence.**

Don't let them silence you! If Conservatives don't speak out now, they'll keep coming for us.

_**[So before President Trump is taken into custody, we're calling on each and every Conservative in America to speak up and condemn this unprecedented investigation.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zu6g6m3fva3ros52nbbvmrkr26hkai503hj52ro8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sli6eo31c9h2bs "So before President Trump is taken into custody, we’re calling on each and every Conservative in America to speak up and condemn this unprecedented investigation.")**_
**CALLING ALL CONSERVATIVES:**
---
| | | [GO ON RECORD: CONDEMN THE WITCH HUNT](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z5hnitapueqs7cqkhefl975ejrabpbj9g6j0q43o_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sli6eo31c9h2bs "GO ON RECORD: CONDEMN THE WITCH HUNT")
---
The Radical Left is hoping you ignore this email and let them finish their investigation...

They're counting on Conservatives not speaking up.

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Add your name if you agree: It's time to pass the Universal School Meals Act and ensure no child in our country goes hungry.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
It is unacceptable that in the wealthiest country in the world a child can be turned away from a meal because they cannot afford it.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=28%2E791427%2EZhL_fb)
Friends -
As you may have seen, last week my home of Minnesota became the 3rd state in the country to pass a universal school meals bill into law.
This now means that Minnesota's students will be able to receive free breakfast and lunch at absolutely zero cost — no matter their family's income, ZIP code, or anything else.
This is truly life-changing for so many kids across our state, and I'm so proud of the local activists and elected officials who organized and mobilized to get this done.
But the truth is, we still have a great deal of work ahead of us on this issue at the federal level — and it's time the entire country follows Minnesota's lead. That's why I'm asking you today:
**[Add your name if you agree — Congress must pass my legislation, the Universal School Meals Act, and ensure that no child in this country goes hungry. This is important, so please make your voice heard on this issue today.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/endorse-universal_school_meals/?source=em230322-ak-g-act-subs&refcode2=28.791427.ZhL_fb&akid=28%2E791427%2EZhL_fb)**
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/endorse-universal_school_meals/?source=em230322-ak-g-act-subs&refcode2=28.791427.ZhL_fb&akid=28%2E791427%2EZhL_fb)**
Right now, 1 in 6 children in the United States face hunger and food insecurity. When I was a child, I was one of them.
That's why in 2020, I was incredibly proud to work closely with Senator Bernie Sanders and pass legislation making school meals universal during the pandemic. In 2021, we introduced a bill to make that change permanent.
We have to ask ourselves: When a child spends all day at school on an empty stomach, how can they be expected to learn? They can't.
Hungry students have more trouble concentrating. They are more likely to be tardy or absent from school entirely. Study after study has proven that access to meals increases student participation, benefits overall health, and improves educational outcomes both inside and outside the classroom.
**Put even simpler, it is morally unacceptable that in the wealthiest country in the world, a child can be turned away from a meal because they cannot afford it.**
If passed, here's just some of what this legislation would accomplish:
* Permanently provide free breakfast, lunch, dinner, and a snack to all school children
* Put an end to "lunch shaming"
* Eliminate the outrage of student meal debt
* Increase reimbursement rates for school meals
* Provide additional incentives to schools for local food procurement
* Provide summer meals to all children and additional summer EBT funds to low-income families

I still believe in an America that puts people first, which is why I'll never stop my fight to make universal school meals a reality for every child in our country.
The only way we'll make that happen is if our movement stands united on this issue, so please:
**[Add your name if you agree — Congress must pass my legislation, the Universal School Meals Act, and ensure that no child in this country goes hungry. This is important, so please make your voice heard on this issue today.](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/endorse-universal_school_meals/?source=em230322-ak-g-act-subs&refcode2=28.791427.ZhL_fb&akid=28%2E791427%2EZhL_fb)**
Thank you for reading, and for adding your name to my petition today.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/endorse-universal_school_meals/?source=em230322-ak-g-act-subs&refcode2=28.791427.ZhL_fb&akid=28%2E791427%2EZhL_fb)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=28%2E791427%2EZhL_fb)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=28%2E791427%2EZhL_fb)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=28%2E791427%2EZhL_fb)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=28_791427_ZhL_fb&akid=28%2E791427%2EZhL_fb)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

name: Conservatives Give
subject: Restore our traditions of empowered citizenship
body:
Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem

| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5a671023f17416db27cd3017ad9aab0&_e=K29yM9Ff8GBkq3VMpDqD-AoYDcl9KKTW15_r1yL1Ab42TPY9Znl7Giy6cNWcX_acn5fgDW20Vsv4gO8vMe3DgzyQcZMZONh76caJsvbFdN5Fk-icq1kcifw9W5aLGnA5bn573zbxW3s2a7O5N7JL2UXpYcJsbrrhf5HT0nrfiT3WByTo8is6Luejdrq_wfXn5NIx9kPIUqNVvRl_2ssfvSOor5PvxHJ6qi_raxqon4kBN3rCpy3m_q2Ix9JIRbO_mKA4j0nkor-JbPEDPM_DeVNlgZUzKGOoCtXKP3sPw4TQoV5XQCJ8LslGC5BC99TnuzMuPYR_tGQduVEVxvHNBkATgO5Szyfup23KQ29zMUe2dc78OyGP78-wt4NfL1A7O3oRMBVUOFHSxj7MvdN0CQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear friend, I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called "**[American Citizenship and Its Decline](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5a671023f17416db27cd3017ad9aab0&_e=K29yM9Ff8GBkq3VMpDqD-AoYDcl9KKTW15_r1yL1Ab42TPY9Znl7Giy6cNWcX_acn5fgDW20Vsv4gO8vMe3DgzyQcZMZONh76caJsvbFdN5Fk-icq1kcifw9W5aLGnA5bn573zbxW3s2a7O5N7JL2UXpYcJsbrrhf5HT0nrfiT3WByTo8is6Luejdrq_wfXn5NIx9kPIUqNVvRl_2ssfvSOor5PvxHJ6qi_raxqon4kBN3rCpy3m_q2Ix9JIRbO_gEVn9nCIZMNqUzQX1NBseghxzNAkNujiKiBi3Sor7YGvroMWKx7LBu6JdwfV2RQri3vGuYcVwY1zFiRTJxtmvgKYEyNOPN9DBPsnbkg6QdmdIPtY4H0b_kNxEKBUhfc8cWI3LG6K-MiS6SMrrMLoyA%3D%3D)** ," and the online course is based on Victor Davis Hanson's book, _The Dying Citizen_.

Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.
---
| [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5a671023f17416db27cd3017ad9aab0&_e=K29yM9Ff8GBkq3VMpDqD-AoYDcl9KKTW15_r1yL1Ab42TPY9Znl7Giy6cNWcX_acn5fgDW20Vsv4gO8vMe3DgzyQcZMZONh76caJsvbFdN5Fk-icq1kcifw9W5aLGnA5bn573zbxW3s2a7O5N7JL2UXpYcJsbrrhf5HT0nrfiT3WByTo8is6Luejdrq_wfXn5NIx9kPIUqNVvRl_2ssfvSOor5PvxHJ6qi_raxqon4kBN3rCpy3m_q2Ix9JIRbO_ieYm5UoMQKJRJKNW6NcwVcot22vj4x11es_ha-dtJLUA32r4ucCU1-BaZKuSAV8HFSWOok65KKOhQqgRJWXlpdkyFKQ6F-0Uq3hQg327IKnjoOUThXS7JatNOUkRwb6A1lfPoUOGu10zEQjflYnBIQ%3D%3D)
---
| | The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present--given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

You can receive a DVD box set of "**American Citizenship and Its Decline** " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link:

[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/citizenship-dvd](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e5a671023f17416db27cd3017ad9aab0&_e=K29yM9Ff8GBkq3VMpDqD-AoYDcl9KKTW15_r1yL1Ab42TPY9Znl7Giy6cNWcX_acn5fgDW20Vsv4gO8vMe3DgzyQcZMZONh76caJsvbFdN5Fk-icq1kcifw9W5aLGnA5bn573zbxW3s2a7O5N7JL2UXpYcJsbrrhf5HT0nrfiT3WByTo8is6Luejdrq_wfXn5NIx9kPIUqNVvRl_2ssfvSOor5PvxHJ6qi_raxqon4kBN3rCpy3m_q2Ix9JIRbO_kBupQ8TUa2MsdWIyWCds-LG07DUO-ty8e-VznCYs8U86ae0HqrOlCmQ7v36A0o5ouy9dwukB5Q0z97P_5Rl_otzrS8_t0WJw5WcHK6vu1b0ZFQ0uPxbexZOF8I052n16arxXgRHOzVLogaeNzbOESw%3D%3D)

Best wishes,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Conservatives Gives

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past. Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot. These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen. In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature. Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed. The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens. You can receive a DVD box set of "American Citizenship and Its Decline " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link: Best wishes, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | Conservatives Gives 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
We ran out of money and barely made it over the finish line.

| | | Friend,

The ugly truth is my campaign hit rock bottom.

We ran out of money and barely made it over the finish line.

The only reason we won was the support of brave patriots like you.

After getting hit with massive attacks funded by the Democrats' dark money, we unfortunately had to take on some campaign debt to survive.

And now, _**[we need help to retire our campaign debt.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=731d1fe15e9142369bfad1073f985542&_e=o98you_kbT5ORo0ZcKD91Vducll2paUxyRIC7aW9FpCv6l2BJjM5Jq5jZL1CVewx57a-HotRQ7r9h31gWdtDnU4VYsZFTizO2DzpHO76n6YqBgb0IiNUBuxbXuX5aDIVot1AI99ESymbQASDHlhWpylymg2Tn3sVzciBeN9Br8hi4pA2WFgndvOmtjpBxOMjdj0d4jtoxOMa41EuvOwk2orZDD4HJKl5Oo0JGEq8y8yIFQ0UNuaPK3QzpuRrwVoGcJTpKZjAoBmxgW4Zzw2OETSfgUS9fGe9o-wRXtIn5JcPO_XRnrKgO0YjZp_mYg0DfFLaWjYSd5CSXYoqTZVV7HgCrSl_nHqjD6sJEosX1QD2mNYTlvfKE5-u65Cw19a2KglIPQU0-dtb0L620RJNKWOCp5ZrU8WLzudRTevCOL8ofV8Y3OJpDCPAw0L8TuN1 "we need help to retire our campaign debt.")**_

clean_body: “Andrea’s reelection is critical to taking back the House, and she has the full support of the EMILY's List community.” = We wanted you to hear this first: EMILY’s List, a group that works to elect pro-choice Democrats, just endorsed Andrea’s reelection campaign, saying: “Rep. Andrea Salinas made history as one of the first Latinas to be elected to Congress from Oregon in 2022, winning her seat just by two points. Her reelection is critical to taking back the House, and she has the full support of the EMILY’s List community.” | Team, reelecting Andrea is necessary if we want to have any chance of taking back the House and protecting abortion access for folks across the country. But to do it, we’re going to need a strong team behind us. That’s why we’re asking: Thank you, Team Salinas | | = Andrea Salinas for Oregon PO Box 230985 Tigard, OR 97281 Paid for by Andrea Salinas for Oregon Andrea is fighting for Oregon, fighting for affordable quality health care, an economy that works for everyone, and clean air, land, and water. Now, Andrea's ready to show Washington what hard work can accomplish – real, meaningful change for all of us. | =_

subject: Arrest Joe Biden?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAST FOR CONGRESS
body:
When I served in the U.S. Army and fought on battlefields in corrupt, war-torn countries overseas, I saw what it looks like when the rule of law is non-existent.

|
---
| |
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf5je8a6af57tb4jemqhg7g9lle0b2s79dotrr28_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sli61o76cph2bs)
---
| Friend,
---
| When I served in the U.S. Army and fought on battlefields in corrupt, war-torn countries overseas, I saw what it looks like when the rule of law is non-existent.

When political enemies are targeted and jailed.

When power is abused for political vengeance and nations are transformed into banana republics.

But friend – I never thought I would see this come right here to the United States of America!

Yet, that’s exactly what is happening right now with reports of a woke, Soros-funded DA in New York **TARGETING PRESIDENT TRUMP FOR ARREST** due to politics, not the law.

Can you imagine if it was Joe Biden being arrested instead? The liberal media would be losing their minds about the end of democracy.

This abuse of power must be met with a swift reaction. That’s why I’m launching the [_America First Defense Fund_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcdl4re1t93bsf8rcarm0csjprikvug8l5vv2va8_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sli61o76cph2bs) effective _immediately_ before the greatest country on Earth is transformed into a lawless banana republic before our very eyes.

Friend, this is urgent... please help!
---
| [SUPPORT THE DEFENSE FUND ASAP!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z358asqi4khr9nibqk3lpk4i0buk9j1dcd3nl3q0_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sli61o76cph2bs "SUPPORT THE DEFENSE FUND ASAP!")

---
| To put an even finer point on this: the radical Soros DA up in New York that we’re talking about here is the same one who downgrades felony charges left and right and allows violent lawbreakers to roam the streets.

_He won’t go after actual criminals – yet he abuses his power to go after political enemies to try to launch his political career!_

That is not the country we know, friend. That is third-world lawlessness. [_I’m asking you to fight back_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zd5t3h6jmv0ejld09np0sa1qt73thgovg8pgnivg_rp22sh2s8i66pr4sli61o76cph2bs) before this becomes the new normal in the United States of America.

Please direct reinforcements to the defense fund below – there isn’t much time before they move to arrest Trump, and we can’t afford to be caught empty-handed at an urgent moment like this!

Adam Schiff in California's 30th Congressional District. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60572286/397534743/1010378950?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg4OGI1NGQtZDZjOC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ggjZDKoH8GX3B7SiMTWhn5CfRM7x088Rv2YU9flJK8E=) Friend,

**I’m proud to announce that I’m running for Congress in California’s 30th District!**

Our community has been so fortunate to have been represented by Adam Schiff in Congress, but with his announcement yesterday to run for U.S. Senate, the 30th District will be vacant. It’s my intention to fill this seat so we can continue upholding our shared progressive values in Washington.

**[Before I explain more about who I am and why I am running, we set a goal of 500 donations to launch our campaign on solid footing. If you're with me, please make a contribution today to become a Founding Donor.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60572287/397534744/1010378950?refcode=em-3.22.23-intros-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg4OGI1NGQtZDZjOC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ggjZDKoH8GX3B7SiMTWhn5CfRM7x088Rv2YU9flJK8E=)**

It has been the privilege of my life to serve this community -- as a Councilmember and Mayor in the City of Glendale, and as your representative in the California State Assembly for the past six years.

**If you know me, you know I’ve always been a fighter for our progressive values --_even when it was tough._**

In the Assembly, I championed bold policies to address climate change, protect our reproductive freedoms, and move our state toward single-payer healthcare -- even though I knew corporate special interests would fight back.

After the Sandy Hook tragedy, I voted to ban the Glendale Gun Show from being held on city property across the street from our schools and community college -- even though it meant facing intimidation and threats.

And when a sexual harassment scandal struck the state government, I led our state’s response and held the perpetrators accountable.

**We're kicking off this race with a long list of early endorsers -- including numerous federal, state and local elected leaders. But our campaign will be free of corporate PAC money, so winning is going to take support from thousands of grassroots donors.

[**If you can, contribute today to become a Founding Donor and help kickstart our campaign with strength.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60572294/397534778/1010378950?refcode=em-3.22.23-intros-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNzg4OGI1NGQtZDZjOC1lZDExLWE4ZTAtMDAyMjQ4MzJlODExIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ggjZDKoH8GX3B7SiMTWhn5CfRM7x088Rv2YU9flJK8E=)**

Laura

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Winnable contest. Small, state race. What could possibly go wrong?
body:
Enormous, horrifying consequences if we lose this one
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te767b15d-473e-451f-b538-5c0191ae0c0a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, _**It’s a winnable contest in a small, statewide race, for a state court. What could possibly go wrong ...**_ _**In barely two weeks, on Tuesday, April 4th, a Supreme Court race will occur that'll not only determine whether millions of women have access to abortion rights, but may determine the future of our democracy.**_ _We've written about the race before, but we're now basically in the final two week stretch. What I said above is not hyperbole._ **_This one race is easily the most important of the year and could determine whether we remain a democracy._** **The Washington Post summed it up:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tdf009da2-5edf-441c-886a-04ee0a41b8d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_The last 30 years we've seen Republicans prioritize these less glamorous races, for offices filled with power, from courts to state Attorneys General and Secretary of State offices. It has allowed them to steal more elections through voter suppression and manipulation than any of us can count._** [**_There is a last minute effort by the Kochs to dump in millions and steal the race (what's new?). Will you join us in defeating this effort by giving Janet Protasiewicz $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfce9e3dd-678a-4d04-8184-44d2bedd9433/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9ebb8b1b-aec7-46e6-8f87-075ff7f21bcd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| _These Republicans fully understand the stakes of this race. I hope we do, or we'll again lose a winnable contest that may not seem like a big deal, but will have ENORMOUS CONSEQUENCES--horrifying ones--for our democracy._ **More from The Washington Post:** [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4e5f8b22-44cc-4a56-bd7c-c4f81b2e78ef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _This one election on April 4th will determine whether there's a MAGA Republican or progressive Democratic majority on this court._ **_It all comes down to this race._** **_Our candidate, Janet Protasiewicz, is ahead in polling, but it's too close to call. She'll legalize abortion for millions of WI women & protect the state from any attempt by Trump, DeSantis, Pence or any other right-wing autocrat to overturn our democracy for their Christian Nationalist beliefs._** [**_Will you stand with us to counter the last minute effort by the Kochs to dump in millions and steal the race? Will you join us in defeating their effort by giving Janet Protasiewicz $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d0ad4f9-0059-4f4a-a289-a197a525e54e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for defending democracy from this right-wing onslaught._ Cliff
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | [**DONATE NOW**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a8b40c4-d63e-4b87-835f-3d378a6db067/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | |
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---
| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/judgeprotasiewiczwisupremecourt3-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T94add46e-850f-403c-8506-d9c68f3478d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---

---

Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect: after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t. When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families. Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Celebrate Ramadan by supporting asylum seekers and refugees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Freedom House Detroit is Michigan’s only temporary home and full-service provider for people seeking humanitarian protection. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvO_t25TLthSaLzh7i5LTG0Pw884ESmkqCUcj5AN1jwPcpQDA7OKl2lEr1_KTu1LR9jo1T0btWpDthYpzESacvt3ufCBBJLI14FkdCuyw8DYpa8AtjhLva1c70aqaNBUuf-JUvns00EItS6iIqkK60XbO4AVSVRKfUrLIS5AWzBi_-H07KSmeFEHiW2Qhbn7GnltuA4vAGOtsyqsE1jr9muDag4vLZjg0rvEQnp0B1ubs/3up/M3hXHTHgQ46j7gBpcN3CfA/h0/wmVYOFQf1iyEb7UZOWpnRHy2tHhuTwOCNsPTkxw9f4o)
---
Friend, Ramadan Kareem to all who are celebrating. Ramadan is the holiest month of the year for our Muslim neighbors here at home and around the world. Muslims are always called to support the most vulnerable among us. But there’s an extra focus during Ramadan on giving charitable donations—known as Zakat—and providing acts of service for our communities. **So to start off Ramadan, I want to lift up an incredible organization in Detroit that could use our support.** Freedom House Detroit has provided 5,000 refugees and asylum seekers with safe refuge and a path to independence. Their clients come from every corner of the globe, all fleeing persecution and violence. Many are survivors of torture. **Freedom House Detroit is Michigan’s only temporary home and full-service provider for people seeking humanitarian protection—providing safe shelter for up to two years, along with food, clothing, legal aid, access to medical and mental healthcare, and support with finding employment and housing. And, this year, it is celebrating 40 years of service to Detroit and all those who come here seeking refuge!** [**Can you help refugees, asylum seekers, and others seeking humanitarian protection on their journey to safety, security, and freedom by donating to Freedom House today?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKfFTR9iq_p2RZu-AJORSjoZO6WdhDQwBDIcjTHyTDdmBd-n6OLf3MK9SoI3du0wbEPrlpGu7jQXVnJt2L7D3lSK23CrRZgf4hkDL_IybXFLr_RCd05Q_9rtqbdqJrgRlW_VjJ6lk479gkbES2pIYnerkNi-ZyKFooZsTFyy-W7kys5f4srzJn9lnELtuIMihifw5ca-D4vDrfp9BudxMISwdkJkeEBR3UiIm7VDpQuPaOc3IMS1uOc23PHBKbxyCLnaNTUUdiC6eMacOpu6TI-yIA2NeewfNiMI3JfzwI9oZxe1N7lWRn3O51vEQkubQVrKkNQR1YqW1gt8VP6r5uLdL_aoIu3FhB3c7AvcQ_UoLybHVaxRSjIfP00J_UicMpdDPWT-5ggYNuri7lGUdbbQ/3up/M3hXHTHgQ46j7gBpcN3CfA/h1/MaUMGyeIGV4hFApDNikfzed48bcxrWEOi_Zmqw9DF1U) | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w1cdrvm2TShU3fAiYbO3lKfFTR9iq_p2RZu-AJORSjoZO6WdhDQwBDIcjTHyTDdmC87hTml9lkpYi_vYovYJfJwmzt_TfHBC_v7USL6c3Gy1aflNK5iLmkwl_C8MhZFDDF8MMkvqCNNnTviQ6w0jHjyY1pzJLJv2I_1Se5GiXae3uEXjG0ZxvukP0jK8bOw9ea10TUJ0aQ0LI8P555B3CZtXInxyFNjixmG9BDlyf7MJKN1RAWgqU9ii5bhr1xnKAGdeNZrqqbhR4KIl77HJ-gjWhPlGHfQZ7cLQxlMUgLUh07unaEWYt_gCmibG-yfRgMUgt5EdeCFbN4N4xWfar6x7zT3RItXdd6yGydBGEMrZB-ONA0c8f3lDIIg4JPxfrxo7cW8xWdRXwXE7n2E9C2lZZJyXuVBxYPt4nt3G7jzA/3up/M3hXHTHgQ46j7gBpcN3CfA/h2/0hxRoGm_UmuCg2xMHG3SXvMeRG-s2E6dIeystxuSSFs)

Most people seeking humanitarian protection are not eligible for employment until six months to one year after they file their claim for protection, and most are not eligible for safety net programs. So, residents of Freedom House Detroit receive all basic needs as well as resources that will help them prepare for independence.
Freedom House Detroit’s FreedomLives program delivers community housing, food, fresh water, clothing, internet access, and, as clients prepare to exit the program, housing literacy which includes linking clients to affordable and safe housing options.
The FreedomAids program delivers legal aid, so clients can successfully navigate the complex and English-only process of applying for humanitarian protection and work authorization.
Freedom House Detroit’s FreedomCares program connects clients to medical and mental health care and health literacy.
The FreedomWorks program delivers employment literacy, including ESL training, job search support, and volunteer experiences to help clients gain experience in the American workplace.
**Approximately 85% of Freedom House Detroit's clients exit with jobs and into independent housing.**

clean_body: Freedom House Detroit is Michigan’s only temporary home and full-service provider for people seeking humanitarian protection. | | | Friend, Ramadan Kareem to all who are celebrating. Ramadan is the holiest month of the year for our Muslim neighbors here at home and around the world. Muslims are always called to support the most vulnerable among us. But there’s an extra focus during Ramadan on giving charitable donations—known as Zakat—and providing acts of service for our communities. So to start off Ramadan, I want to lift up an incredible organization in Detroit that could use our support. Freedom House Detroit has provided 5,000 refugees and asylum seekers with safe refuge and a path to independence. Their clients come from every corner of the globe, all fleeing persecution and violence. Many are survivors of torture. Freedom House Detroit is Michigan’s only temporary home and full-service provider for people seeking humanitarian protection—providing safe shelter for up to two years, along with food, clothing, legal aid, access to medical and mental healthcare, and support with finding employment and housing. And, this year, it is celebrating 40 years of service to Detroit and all those who come here seeking refuge! | Your donation will help families stay safe, like these folks living at Freedom House Detroit: Most people seeking humanitarian protection are not eligible for employment until six months to one year after they file their claim for protection, and most are not eligible for safety net programs. So, residents of Freedom House Detroit receive all basic needs as well as resources that will help them prepare for independence. Freedom House Detroit’s FreedomLives program delivers community housing, food, fresh water, clothing, internet access, and, as clients prepare to exit the program, housing literacy which includes linking clients to affordable and safe housing options. The FreedomAids program delivers legal aid, so clients can successfully navigate the complex and English-only process of applying for humanitarian protection and work authorization. Freedom House Detroit’s FreedomCares program connects clients to medical and mental health care and health literacy. The FreedomWorks program delivers employment literacy, including ESL training, job search support, and volunteer experiences to help clients gain experience in the American workplace. Approximately 85% of Freedom House Detroit's clients exit with jobs and into independent housing. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, with 100% going directly to Freedom House Detroit | | | | | | | | | In solidarity, Rashida P.S. Here are some more photos of people living their lives with dignity at Freedom House—with their faces obscured: Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . I’m never going to back down from telling you the hard truth, Peter, and here it is: It’s dangerous to be a woman in politics. A recent study from Princeton University and the Anti-Defamation League found female officials are _3.4 times more likely_ to be harassed online than their male counterparts. And it’s not just digital threats, either. In the past few years, we’ve witnessed a violent intruder show up to Nancy Pelosi’s home with rope, zip ties, and a hammer; a man with a gun stalk Pramila Jayapal outside her house; and a thwarted plot to kidnap Governor Gretchen Whitmer. **Then there’s what happened to me: A coordinated cyber-attack by far-right political operatives and media outlets designed to shame me out of office. ** After the attack on her husband, Nancy Pelosi said she was worried it would discourage other women from running for office. That’s something I worried about, too — and it’s not unfounded. When we say women running for office need extra support, we mean **every** type of support. There are so many challenges and dangers that come with being a woman in politics, and that’s why I started HER Time: To help women overcome them. **[But I can’t do it alone. name: Whip Jazz Lewis
subject: Sprint to the finish
body:
Jazz Lewis, Democrat for Progress

Friends,

It’s been a busy few days in Annapolis - the annual budget cleared a critical hurdle last week by passing through the House and Monday marked the last day to send legislation over to the Senate for consideration this session.

The budget made a significant investment in public education, nearly $1 billion for this calendar year, providing a down payment for the Blueprint for Maryland’s Future. It also provides $205 million in tax cuts for middle income families. As vice-chair of the Capital Budget subcommittee on Appropriations, I’m proud of the $246 million in capital improvements across the state including over $25 million for improvements to the New Carrollton Metro project.

As a caucus, we have made progress on protecting reproductive rights, standing up the recreational cannabis industry in the state, and establishing a service year alternative for young students upon graduating high school. I’m especially excited about several of our key priorities advancing through the House, including:

HB 2 - Allows working families to deduct union dues from their state taxes.
HB 12 - Provides $5 million in capital grants and revolving loans for equitable and inclusive transit oriented development.
HB 16 - Expands Title IX to include elementary and middle school.

Have you been following the legislative session? Let us know what legislation you are most excited about.

SHARE NOW » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/O2tuhq-SEkqxCTQPWT0TiA2]

With three weeks until the end of session, it'll be a sprint to get everything done but I'm glad you are on our team.

In solidarity,

Jazz

As a proven progressive leader and champion of issues ranging from criminal justice reform to healthcare access and economic equity, Jazz has represented the 24th Legislative District in Maryland’s House of Delegates since 2017. He also serves as Majority Whip of the Maryland House. A lifelong Prince Georgian, Jazz lives in Glenarden with his wife and son.
by authority Friends of Jazz Lewis, Chris Taitt, Treasurer
Friends of Jazz Lewis - State Account
P.O. Box 341854
Bethesda, MD 20827
United States
