name: Delegate John McGuire III
subject: Video: Duane Adams Debate Meltdown
disclaimer_text: Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Team,
"John could not be rattled". We are getting a lot of requests at the doors for this debate video where my three time democrat opponent Duane Adams shows his true colors in less than two minutes during the closing statements. I will not get involved in mudslinging but I will hold my opponent accountable for his record.

High Demand Video [Click Here](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017z9nhhtsxDRso7husF_EJqitBMmIHADvVCvChwvGH4ba_JO0ovSVqIW07hoeGiyTkclJd1IQSGFaJkL9VxaqnjOd5UXhCF0bbvHTEypw13c-8P_jiEZZcmD_CgjpkZd0rPsPCOsjqhe3YvJ2pUwwGQ==&c=nhjFKaM49xrbN_DXRU6D2gZN-7nLKbeWJQxFFg_32iKtSJIGkiT6wg==&ch=c-yXGuoprMADSoCKNJbqajVIdT5a6XEyrzwyajPwzXCTGEByUagKwA==)

---
| On March 16, I attended the Louisa County GOP SD 10 Debate. Joe Thomas did a great job moderating, but it must have seemed like watching paint dry. That is until my "Three Time Democrat House of Delegates candidate" opponent Duane Adams now running against me as a Republican had a Meltdown during the closing comments. My team could not write down his inaccurate statements, such as I ran for five offices in four years, fast enough. You can watch for yourself and see the offensive nuttiness in less than two minutes of this video. We all know Democrats accuse us of doing what they are doing. He says he is no longer a Democrat, but his actions such as constantly raising taxes each year (never lowered the tax rate), mudslinging, name calling, attempts to intimidate, and playing the victim are very much in line with the Democrats. Watch this video and you decide.
Feedback:
" I watched the debate. I am very proud of you. You maintained your integrity and did not stoop to name calling and dirty politics. I am honored to support you any way I can. You are in my prayers.
"For we do not wrestle against flesh and blood, but against principalities, against powers, against the rulers of the darkness of this age, against spiritual hosts of wickedness in the heavenly places." Ephesians [6:12](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0017z9nhhtsxDRso7husF_EJqitBMmIHADvVCvChwvGH4ba_JO0ovSVqIW07hoeGiyT85ZFtVlwruyyvSoZ5VIv7sAqZhsRBbQ_4_k-fo0aKTMOosGo16kvnkzJr4R-D_aBgCMPK47eW9p7c9VJ_RUV8XQKz2rm4HmsxOyyvYgIx_1KCZVQ6jL39rFKwf0EOWuc&c=nhjFKaM49xrbN_DXRU6D2gZN-7nLKbeWJQxFFg_32iKtSJIGkiT6wg==&ch=c-yXGuoprMADSoCKNJbqajVIdT5a6XEyrzwyajPwzXCTGEByUagKwA==)."
-Jack B.
---

My opponent Duane Adams bragged about this flyer during our debate. It is costing him and he should be ashamed.

Powhatan County
---
| Thank you to everyone helping us recruit delegates for the May 6 convention.
---
| I need your help!

We will have a Senate District 10 Convention on May 6. You will not be able to vote for me unless you complete the Delegate Form.
The deadline to turn in delegate forms for Powhatan County is 5pm Friday March 24. Please let your friends know they can go to www.john4va.com and easily print the form. You can then scan the delegate form and email to me john@mcguireforvirgina.com
Please ask/ share this email with friends and family.
At the top of the form for "Unit" put your county. Reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804 588 2646 with questions and to turn in your form.
Delegate Form County Deadlines:

Friday, March 24 - Powhatan
Closed:
Saturday, March 11 - Prince Edward Wednesday, March 15 - Cumberland, Goochland Friday, March 17 - Buckingham, Louisa, Fluvanna, Appomattox Monday, March 20 - Hanover, Amelia

The deadline to turn in delegate forms for Powhatan County is 5pm Friday March 24. Please let your friends know they can go to www.john4va.com and easily print the form. You can then scan the delegate form and email to me john@mcguireforvirgina.com Please ask/ share this email with friends and family. At the top of the form for "Unit" put your county. Reach out to our team at john@mcguireforvirginia.com or call 804 588 2646 with questions and to turn in your form. Delegate Form County Deadlines: Friday, March 24 - Powhatan Closed: Saturday, March 11 - Prince Edward Wednesday, March 15 - Cumberland, Goochland Friday, March 17 - Buckingham, Louisa, Fluvanna, Appomattox Monday, March 20 - Hanover, Amelia | Debate Link/ Democrats | I will not get involved in mudslinging but I will hold my Louisa opponent, who was a three time Democrat and continues to govern like a Democrat by raising taxes, and trying to intimidate others, accountable for his record. | == | I'm running for State Senate so we can un-California Virginia. It starts with election integrity. For a better future, we must win back the Virginia State Senate in 2023 and stop the madness. I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | Seventy Plus Endorsement List == | A Few District Photos | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | God Bless America, Delegate John McGuire Running for == in 2023 Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL Business Owner Pro-Life == Pro-Gun America 1st Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 == NFIB 100 Endorsement List == == == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA Email: john@mcguireforvirginia.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by Friends of John McGuire | | Friends of John McGuire | Friends of John McGuire, PO Box 168, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireforvirginia.com powered by

name: Katie Porter
subject: More than we need
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Asking for $842 billion
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=19797%2E3422442%2EUMGqJ1)
Let me explain this tweet from last week:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230322-1?refcode=EMAF22_1_MLB_20230322_V1_F&refcode2=19797_3422442_UMGqJ1&akid=19797%2E3422442%2EUMGqJ1)
In December, Congress passed a _**record $858 billion**_ defense budget. This was _**$45 billion more**_ than what President Biden had requested. I voted against it, because while I supported the steps it took to pay our troops more fairly, I couldn't support a bill that spends _billions_ more than our Commander in Chief even requested.
But did you know that the Pentagon hasn't passed a single independent audit in _years?_
The lack of financial oversight over the Pentagon means one group of people benefit more and more each year—Big Defense Contractors.
Defense contractors and corporations' pockets are being padded thanks to their influence in politics. **In fact, defense contractors spent $101 million on lobbying in just the first three quarters of 2022.**
Lax Pentagon oversight coupled with a lack of accountability is wasteful, reckless, and unacceptable. As a champion of oversight, I have worked to ensure that taxpayer dollars won't be handouts to private defense contractors—which is why I'm speaking out against the proposed $842 billion Pentagon budget for 2023.
**Until there is financial oversight over how these billions in taxpayer dollars are being spent—and proof that it isn't going straight to defense contractors' pockets—I'm a hard no on increasing the budget.**
By reducing some of this wasteful spending, we could make investments in childcare, education, clean energy, affordable housing, and so much more.
**[If you agree, will you chip in today so I can continue to hold Big Defense Contractors accountable in the U.S. Senate?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230322-1?refcode=EMAF22_1_MLB_20230322_V1_F&refcode2=19797_3422442_UMGqJ1&akid=19797%2E3422442%2EUMGqJ1)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230322-1?refcode=EMAF22_1_MLB_20230322_V1_F&refcode2=19797_3422442_UMGqJ1&akid=19797%2E3422442%2EUMGqJ1)**
If you send me to the U.S. Senate, I'll continue to serve as a tireless advocate for those who serve our country. But we cannot let irresponsible government handouts to private defense contractors come before delivering for taxpayers. We deserve better.
**[We can stop corporate interests from dictating our budgets. Will you pitch in today to send me to the U.S. Senate so I can fight on behalf of working people, not defense contractors?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230322-1?refcode=EMAF22_1_MLB_20230322_V1_F&refcode2=19797_3422442_UMGqJ1&akid=19797%2E3422442%2EUMGqJ1)**
**[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230322-1?refcode=EMAF22_1_MLB_20230322_V1_F&refcode2=19797_3422442_UMGqJ1&akid=19797%2E3422442%2EUMGqJ1)**
Onward,
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAF22_1_MLB_20230322_V1_F&t=2&refcode2=19797_3422442_UMGqJ1&akid=19797%2E3422442%2EUMGqJ1)**
---

* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=19797%2E3422442%2EUMGqJ1)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=19797%2E3422442%2EUMGqJ1)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

name: Jessica Mackler, EMILYs List
subject: [INSIDE] Our game plan to FLIP the House:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | [CRYSTAL BALL] The House majority is a toss-up, Peter [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60577100/397544381/402280152?sourceid=1048800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiNDllMC1kZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i57x_4nOegCKh-NFTp0Hyv7fZJLzyEOUKOXkgklRKQk=&emci=4be0e8d8-dec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=572b49e0-dec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) Republicans hold a narrow five-seat advantage in the House, Peter, and forecasts rate the race for the majority as a toss-up. **We're gearing up for the neck-and-neck races that will make or break the race for the House majority. Are you in? Donate now:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60577104/397544382/402280152?sourceid=1048800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiNDllMC1kZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i57x_4nOegCKh-NFTp0Hyv7fZJLzyEOUKOXkgklRKQk=&emci=4be0e8d8-dec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=572b49e0-dec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)** Peter,

Here's the thing: For Democrats to flip the House majority, we only need to gain **five seats**. To put that in perspective, _more than five_ of the closest House races last cycle were won by _two points or less_.

As of last month, Larry Sabato's _Crystal Ball_ has rated control of the House a _toss-up_ , Peter, which means we _can_ flip the chamber this cycle, but we have our work cut out for us.

[**We're gearing up for the hard races ahead, and I want you on our team, Peter. Donate now to support Democratic pro-choice women who can FLIP Republican seats and regain control of the House this cycle.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60577114/397544389/402280152?sourceid=1048800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiNDllMC1kZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i57x_4nOegCKh-NFTp0Hyv7fZJLzyEOUKOXkgklRKQk=&emci=4be0e8d8-dec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=572b49e0-dec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) The battle for the House is always unpredictable, but after witnessing some of the closest winning margins, we _know_ we can't take any chances.

Last cycle, **four** Democratic pro-choice women, including Reps. **Yadira Caraveo (CO-08)** and **Marie Gluesenkamp Perez (WA-03)** , won their House seats by margins of _less than 2%_. For Republican Reps. Lauren Boebert (CO-03), John Duarte (CA-13), Zach Nunn (IA-03), David Schweikert (AZ-01), and Mike Lawler (NY-17) the margin was even smaller — these **five** anti-choice extremists won by _less than 1% of the vote_.

Make no mistake, House Republicans are already pooling their resources to prepare for races that will be as close, _if not closer_ , than these this cycle. So we're not wasting a single moment either.

**Donate now to support incredible EMILYs List-backed House candidates like Yadira, Marie, and so many more in the fight to DEFEAT House Republicans and FLIP the chamber:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Elect-More-Women-This-March](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60577115/397544390/402280152?sourceid=1048800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiNDllMC1kZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i57x_4nOegCKh-NFTp0Hyv7fZJLzyEOUKOXkgklRKQk=&emci=4be0e8d8-dec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=572b49e0-dec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)**

Thank you, Jessica Mackler (she/her/hers)
Vice President of Federal & Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60577117/397544392/402280152?sourceid=1048800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiNDllMC1kZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i57x_4nOegCKh-NFTp0Hyv7fZJLzyEOUKOXkgklRKQk=&emci=4be0e8d8-dec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=572b49e0-dec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60577118/397544393/210412955?sourceid=1048800&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NzJiNDllMC1kZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i57x_4nOegCKh-NFTp0Hyv7fZJLzyEOUKOXkgklRKQk=&emci=4be0e8d8-dec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=572b49e0-dec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=5177934)

name: Andy Kim
subject: A call for integrity in government
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
Americans across the political spectrum have lost faith in their elected leaders. I believe that the key to healing the divides in our nation begins with rebuilding that trust.

In particular, Americans need to know that politicians aren't profiting off their positions. I've crafted legislation to prevent high-ranking public servants, senior staffers, and their families from buying, selling, or owning individual stocks, serving on corporate boards, and lobbying once they leave office.

All public servants, especially those at the highest levels, owe their undivided attention and loyalty to the people they serve. Leaders shouldn't be worried about how policies that help their constituents will affect their stock portfolios. We must hold ourselves to a higher standard and ensure that the American people know – beyond a shadow of a doubt – that we are in these positions to serve.

Members on both sides of the aisle have been outspoken on this critical issue, and I am hopeful that we can come together to begin to restore trust in our public servants.

Speaker Kevin McCarthy has previously supported the prohibition of public servants from buying, selling, or owning individual stocks. Though he has had many chances, he hasn't brought this important issue to the House floor in his time as Speaker.

I have and will continue to call on Speaker McCarthy to keep his promise and let Congress vote on legislation to ban high-ranking public servants from owning, buying, or selling stocks.

Americans deserve to have complete faith in the people who choose to serve in our government and the people they elect.

More soon,

Andy

| | [**WATCH MY RECENT INTERVIEW**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1a84fec016804a0aa7fd0a25676a65db&_e=C7PR3LbJ_J3FIOcLBBTRLgIsrGMF72Bkw5ZeRWL10uWEuP3xjOBri35DozsJPcm7iiP-aeHa8gyl857QlncV_0s0WfXzO2kIrcPrVIxWI3lkSx7pmjVVgTYlMV0gRr7ULqdCiJ_20hCfTWvQRBO7qkp3aGmHgEbUnzpJv3JZ2IyuL4IHMKyWm_guOrp1JTAi4Zv-kixw6Q50yc64Pr7nWhFU7E5Mz58aEnIg9sunEbpRf6Rhrm6YoAfZ9SebQdyBNnxs9JXxDIbeZOya5J4sgVsPsffva_uks3HWqfdezwNHwthcyBHRUY2-rORkFwi4nGvAkgQ2tMGiO83WCNZ5gw6VclnEHzxJpb1f-0UFcUJO0x-fIAnFg31H__o_tZU6o2euewQmYjJm1qeqQSWArWmXz_qnTXfNgmC9F_MJtn1m-I3tjzfdtubU9inNmrnkdL1QwgZPQzmmbi6EOwfnYoP89DV8BoSRPmJrDcKwNU0%3D)
---
| | **How did I go from the teachers unions to school choice?** Let me tell you my story.

As a first-generation Chilean American, I came to the United States seeking endless opportunities.

I was from a disadvantaged and not well-connected family, which means I grew up in the one-size-fits-all public school system.

**My education suffered as a result.** I struggled in large classroom settings, was often bullied, and found myself stuck in an education system that didn't work for me because of our financial situation.

I realized my story was not uncommon and recognized that **the surest way to attain the American Dream is to gain access to a good education. **

I thought the best way to help fix the education system and the next generation of students attain the American Dream was by working for organizations that support education and teachers.

**But, I quickly learned that this teachers union didn’t have the best interests of students or even teachers in mind.** They seemed more concerned with money and maintaining the status quo of the broken system.

That’s when I knew if I was going to make a difference, I had to make a change.

I founded the **Federación Americana Para Los Niños** , which brings information about school choice to Hispanic communities and joined the American Federation for Children as a Senior Fellow.

After leaving the teachers union and joining the school choice revolution, I never looked back.

[_**Peter, now I’m asking YOU to join the school choice revolution by pledging a donation of $20.23 or an amount of your choice today >>>**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=1a84fec016804a0aa7fd0a25676a65db&_e=C7PR3LbJ_J3FIOcLBBTRLgIsrGMF72Bkw5ZeRWL10uWEuP3xjOBri35DozsJPcm7iiP-aeHa8gyl857QlncV_0s0WfXzO2kIrcPrVIxWI3lkSx7pmjVVgTYlMV0gRr7ULqdCiJ_20hCfTWvQRBO7qkp3aGmHgEbUnzpJv3JZ2IyuL4IHMKyWm_guOrp1JTAi4Zv-kixw6Q50yc64Pr7nWhFU7E5Mz58aEnIg9sunEbpRf6Rhrm6YoAfZ9SebQdyBNnxs9JXxDIbeZOya5J4sgVsPsffva_uks3HWqfdezwNHwthcyBHRUY2-rORkFwi4ekt0Aib4UAxhA02TLEsiKmN2nu4OevnaeU5EqaL3x7PWQqt11vRyCfZ5LZTiJ7th3zTXLdn4s_BKSIpa6nns0SgyQoE-HLh_ccr5QqpL04RMcoYVelJZYw1da3VCMZ7Mbz134TLN6UksIRtHH5-Kl62Ua-QlZb7H1S6EzS2fTLw%3D)

Valeria Gurr

name: Keystone Progress Education Fund
subject: It's been awhile! We're back with new leadership!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www
body:
Back to our roots & living our values—now fully led and staffed by women & POC! | | |
---
# We're Back!

---
## Back to our roots, uniting progressives to
protect and expand our democracy

---
Hi Friend, It's been awhile! We've been shaking things up here at [Keystone Progress Education Fund](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60582648/397547147/-1148132282?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZDk4OTYxLWUyYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GioXeLhzms_3v_yYyJmJtDnX480P6kVxJAFqvdb47zA=) since our last email. Behind the scenes we've been hard at work going back to our roots, laying the foundation to provide the information you need to push for progressive change during this busy election season and beyond! We are updating our civic engagement and reproductive rights programs, and kicking off the planning for our September state-wide summit on protecting democracy****(stay tuned)! As we build our capacity, **we're closely tuned into the ongoing politically-motivated challenges to our democracy and will continue to keep you updated on the latest**. Our eyes are on the upcoming ruling in Texas on access to a medication abortion pill, which would take away access across the US — including for Pennsylvanians. We'll also bring you overviews you need to understand and vote confidently and progressively in on our upcoming local elections. We're also embodying our progressive values and are**thrilled to announce that we are now a fully POC and women led and staffed organization!
**
---
| | Our elected representatives and judges control our access to so many fundamental rights. Working to uniting movements around voting engagement takes staff and resources. **[Please chip in today and support our work for a more progressive Pennsylvania!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60582650/397547148/-1148132282?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZDk4OTYxLWUyYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GioXeLhzms_3v_yYyJmJtDnX480P6kVxJAFqvdb47zA=)**
---
| [Yes! I support Progressive change in PA](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60582653/397547149/-1148132282?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZDk4OTYxLWUyYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GioXeLhzms_3v_yYyJmJtDnX480P6kVxJAFqvdb47zA=)
---
| |
## Meet the new faces of
Keystone Progress Education Fund!

---
| |
---
| Our new Executive Director, Laura Nevitt, has taken the reins to lead our democracy protection, voting access and engagement, and reproductive rights advocacy work. Laura joins us with 25+ years experience in deep community work and leading progressive political campaigns. She's excited to continue her pro-democracy work, leading us forward and combating the never ending obstacles to exercising our fundamental rights.
---
| |
---
| Rebecca Susman, our brand new Communications and Development Director, brings extensive experience working for reproductive rights as the co-director of the Western PA Fund for Choice, in addition to advocating for prison justice, and workers' rights. She's elated to continue to fight for our basic rights to bodily autonomy and to dive into the thick of elections, providing you with the straightforward information you need to feel comfortable voting!
---
| |
---
| We have a new Board Chair, Carmina Taylor. Carmina is the Director of Campus and Community Engagement at Thomas Jefferson University as well as the founder of the “We Can’t Wait” PA Statewide Coalition for Racial Equity and Movement for Black and Brown Lives of Montgomery County. She is a lifelong civil rights activist and is delighted to join KPEF leadership and advance our equity work.
---
| |
---
| Last but not least, we welcome Kelley Clouser as the new Board Chair of [Keystone Progress](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60582656/397547150/657637959?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZDk4OTYxLWUyYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GioXeLhzms_3v_yYyJmJtDnX480P6kVxJAFqvdb47zA=&emci=198ab67c-edc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=51d98961-e2c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2038134), our sister 501c4 organization where we advocate for progressive candidates and hold our elected representatives accountable. Kelley is a former teacher and is currently the President of the PSEA Staff Organization and a Regional Director with the National Staff Organization union. She's excited to lead our direct advocacy work, supporting progressive candidates and policies that further our democracy.

---
| | Keep an eye out for updates, resources, and other exciting projects we have in the pipeline! As always, keep fighting the good fight and keep in touch! In solidarity, Laura Nevitt, Executive Director
---
P.S. Our work is only possible with support from progressive community members like you. If you're able,[ please donate an amount that's meaningful to you ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60582658/397547151/-1148132282?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZDk4OTYxLWUyYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GioXeLhzms_3v_yYyJmJtDnX480P6kVxJAFqvdb47zA=)and together we'll hold our leaders accountable!
---
| | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60582661/397547152/393539709?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZDk4OTYxLWUyYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GioXeLhzms_3v_yYyJmJtDnX480P6kVxJAFqvdb47zA=&emci=198ab67c-edc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=51d98961-e2c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2038134)| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60582662/397547153/1473617521?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZDk4OTYxLWUyYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GioXeLhzms_3v_yYyJmJtDnX480P6kVxJAFqvdb47zA=&emci=198ab67c-edc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=51d98961-e2c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2038134)| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60582664/397547154/2084364585?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxZDk4OTYxLWUyYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=GioXeLhzms_3v_yYyJmJtDnX480P6kVxJAFqvdb47zA=&emci=198ab67c-edc4-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=51d98961-e2c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=2038134)

As we build our capacity, we're closely tuned into the ongoing politically-motivated challenges to our democracy and will continue to keep you updated on the latest. Our eyes are on the upcoming ruling in Texas on access to a medication abortion pill, which would take away access across the US — including for Pennsylvanians. We'll also bring you overviews you need to understand and vote confidently and progressively in on our upcoming local elections. We're also embodying our progressive values and arethrilled to announce that we are now a fully POC and women led and staffed organization! | | Our elected representatives and judges control our access to so many fundamental rights. Working to uniting movements around voting engagement takes staff and resources. =** | = | | Meet the new faces of Keystone Progress Education Fund! | | | Our new Executive Director, Laura Nevitt, has taken the reins to lead our democracy protection, voting access and engagement, and reproductive rights advocacy work. Laura joins us with 25+ years experience in deep community work and leading progressive political campaigns. She's excited to continue her pro-democracy work, leading us forward and combating the never ending obstacles to exercising our fundamental rights. | | | Rebecca Susman, our brand new Communications and Development Director, brings extensive experience working for reproductive rights as the co-director of the Western PA Fund for Choice, in addition to advocating for prison justice, and workers' rights. She's elated to continue to fight for our basic rights to bodily autonomy and to dive into the thick of elections, providing you with the straightforward information you need to feel comfortable voting! | | | We have a new Board Chair, Carmina Taylor. Carmina is the Director of Campus and Community Engagement at Thomas Jefferson University as well as the founder of the “We Can’t Wait” PA Statewide Coalition for Racial Equity and Movement for Black and Brown Lives of Montgomery County. She is a lifelong civil rights activist and is delighted to join KPEF leadership and advance our equity work. | | | Last but not least, we welcome Kelley Clouser as the new Board Chair of , our sister 501c4 organization where we advocate for progressive candidates and hold our elected representatives accountable. Kelley is a former teacher and is currently the President of the PSEA Staff Organization and a Regional Director with the National Staff Organization union. She's excited to lead our direct advocacy work, supporting progressive candidates and policies that further our democracy. | | Keep an eye out for updates, resources, and other exciting projects we have in the pipeline! As always, keep fighting the good fight and keep in touch! In solidarity, Laura Nevitt, Executive Director P.S. Our work is only possible with support from progressive community members like you. If you're able, together we'll hold our leaders accountable! | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Keystone Progress Education Fund, www.kpef.info. Not affiliated with any candidate or candidate's committees.Keystone Progress Education Fund 354 S Atlantic Ave Pittsburgh, PA 15224 United States

body:
[ https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1001&akid=71%2E35263%2EQWlHpa ]TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE

We’ve seen the same question pop up in our inbox a couple times these last
few weeks: It’s only March, so why are you asking folks to pitch in?

It’s a totally valid question,
Peter.

Here’s the honest truth: running a campaign, especially one in a state as
competitive as Wisconsin, takes a lot of time and significant resources.

Early donations allow us to plan ahead, build up our operations, hire
staff, and reach as many voters as we can, as early as we can. In a race
like ours, the work we do early on in our campaign could make the
difference between protecting Tammy’s seat or handing it over to a
dangerous right-wing candidate like David Clarke.

Now, we don’t expect our supporters to give every time we ask, but we
really appreciate it when you do. Because every time you pitch in, you’re
saying you stand with Tammy and helping us build a campaign strong enough
to win in Wisconsin.

subject: The filibuster

body:
Elissa’s stance on the filibuster is resonating with people.
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=66%2E135344%2EVxa-XR)
Elissa’s stance on the filibuster is resonating with people.
Friend —
Elissa shared her thoughts on the filibuster the night she launched her campaign and Senators aren’t just taking notice, _they are agreeing._
[ **[FOLLOW ELISSA ON TWITTER](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/477?t=3&akid=66%2E135344%2EVxa-XR)** The idea that a vocal minority can stop a vote from even getting to the floor for an up-or-down vote, like on issues like gun safety, is unacceptable. Elissa is running to put an end to nonsense like this and vote on legislation that will improve people’s lives. Stay up to date with Elissa on Twitter and here for the latest updates on our race. Team Slotkin
* * *
👋 Hey there, before you click away: Our campaign for Senate isn’t accepting a dime of corporate PAC money. Some people might see it as a disadvantage, especially since Senate campaigns are notoriously expensive. But we know that we can win when everyone is contributing what they can, when they can. But we know that we can win when everyone is contributing what they can, when they can. | ** PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN P.O. Box 4145 East Lansing, MI 48826 This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can . name: Norma at United We Dream Action
subject: Why I became involved with immigrant advocacy
body:
I’m Norma, a lead organizer in Texas with UWDA. | | | Hi Peter: I’m Norma, a lead organizer in Texas with UWDA. I became involved in immigrant advocacy after experiencing the struggles my own undocumented parents faced. Growing up, my parents were afraid to even drive down the street — for fear of being racially profiled by the police. We moved multiple times a year across the state as my parents looked for different jobs and tried their best to maintain some financial stability. Doors are shut when you’re undocumented — everything from financial aid programs and scholarships to housing assistance are out of reach for undocumented people. **All of this is why I first took the 23-hour drive to Washington D.C. to join members of United We Dream Action and demand permanent protections for immigrant youth and all undocumented people.** With United We Dream Action, I’ve found a vehicle to work toward our goals for a pathway to citizenship, but also foster critical community at the same time. We’re fighting for impactful legislation, to defund agencies like ICE that inflict pain on immigrant communities, and to build a network of immigrant youth and allies that spans every corner of the country. Our work is only getting started, but we rely on the grassroots support of allies like you, Peter, to keep up our fight for permanent protections. **So today I’m asking: Will you make a $7 donation to help us win protections for immigrant youth and all undocumented people?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $7](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wQnDd_Nss4mB9Lx5PfYm8aXtEU_xkC0Etcq1aFJB0Ff_ebSc8F9ymAyV4xczJYGVd4BdcfxsS1Q3xKVlCqUdsIdkOJlmioyBPuJb7lbfUM5FwoPV4m5zhqLzjyulek7xLnPf6rRtSW3hzg4m2IQNubmmiHR3amsJAKxkwsVX_3zk8aO39Uo6ucv5hgrBSVH2QuykLOMeAvj1qnFh4Add6pTpOa1lzyXlzBJErtx9ftMPEE4lM5lxk_LF8PEnXyNdo43OKhMyrDWz70-grsT0NMkcRYk0kzF9_4Clgk5roCcxLQk8xjLP2KGruSMbelo601Y90qxQ0kg3Wf58QYHT_rY_ySgoMY9gvCpHaUvoQ_fMggpIbNrH7yvldzhzEQKR14AVPJT1NKDCSAEf44aQmNHjXrjqfMY9R2JKBzPgdTBvCEp2_wjKz07B_nJlLdBxU/3up/-UV_NDZHSpyX56_pdJAghw/h0/wt6D_HcFA_srRnz_ApqKJZUIfK4PzSiID3dVsiXLWUU)

clean_body: Peter, I’m appalled: = As you’re reading this, Trump is spreading outrageous conspiracy theories and calling on his supporters to "protest" and "take back our nation." And after the violence of January 6, I refuse to take his threats lying down. = | = = = = = Frankly, Peter, I’m disgusted. I know we are better than this as a country. I know you deserve so much more than another 4 years of Trump. And I know that if we all band together, we can keep Trump and his MAGA allies from EVER holding power over us again. = | **= = = = = =** Thank you, Raja | Raja represents Illinois in Congress. name: Sen. Jon Tester (via Democrats.org)
subject: The end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is next week, and as one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, I need your immediate support as we work to build the strongest possible campaign.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
There are very real issues that deserve our attention -- and more importantly, folks deserve solutions. I’m fighting for those solutions every day in Washington, but I’ll need your help to keep it up. | |
---
Derek, If there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this: **My values are shaped by where I come from.** Folks who come from places like where I do face challenges that most people don’t even realize. The issues we face aren’t abstract -- and they’re not some political game, either. When I’m spending 16 hours on a tractor, it gives me the opportunity to sort through those issues in solitude. I’m thinking about climate change and the catastrophic droughts we’re seeing on farms like mine. I’m thinking about the rural towns near mine that need access to high-speed internet. And over the last couple of weeks especially, I’m thinking about a woman’s right to make her own medical decisions and how politics interferes with that choice. **These aren’t just talking points. They’re very real issues that deserve our attention -- and more importantly, folks deserve solutions. I’m fighting for those solutions every day in Washington, but I’ll need your help to keep it up.** **[The end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is next week, and as one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection, I need your immediate support as we work to build the strongest possible campaign. Control of the U.S. Senate could come down to this race, so I have to ask: Can you split $10 between my campaign and the DNC to help us hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goals and to support Democrats like myself running for office in 2023, 2024, and beyond?](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wqViRx_KJZZ4A5VULdsAMszMBNiuFxPmuo7SyzGBLrz1ktvdjDtt7hwL5PtD39HzhHkyvgLJRxQoJkSyrvLlIKmtAaXkW8adbaGl6_feTGgbu0w5O09FrRqh1lgP0_ui_QUwQ3xVhdBrEiEZiMm7PfXIMkcbVoy2v3tbHa9RecG-0sSI6zwdMHkF8OpoGzDPJPxAS8Vc1Ct0UHEoKxXPb7GhTGPB3oWL0OuMjT85naCvfSvhG2oA6EwQMCkyKb7AKLkSdUvBqPfO1Lt-9D7PbitvXfFdjPDAEc2rlbSfdsZdg-JWXp0VhvV_YHgn6V1uAco0AFJ4isL94Q8P5YQhydMPsutFs3hVPOYW1l6rTh6SyYs7QhMBofk-GL4xL_fkwdmYBN7P7InJGpEJv5K_YMcp-rQI6mX3SwsP_K2X3Ku7Et1FUaQERUGu5-3nZ0Elp6hqt_KrWEM7YjfetyaIfx7mZ4YXzrGQ7-1tiFc7yIRjsGpdFwMeakU-WmlzZMCO7S3xG7UcIG66MJKxOUhd5JxUYAIUnRDfycvcAhppvTZMfqrcKPYw0LTlJ5nekav3bbxYznsbg-OjiMPZKQo5MUtLGJcIC41UC74uCLAPhV_LkOu_AIyVHheTpkMJmsDc8K-oYv5Jw1b--7HABLqgUQja4XT935O7WzcXazzvBjThxYB3DgWsbdxNg7pzYEFofz34eXuGlqgIw6t9TCUKH13Uh6J4ZzhsGre3KB2j5WfgQTG9v8AAvPH-GPICDBsuJWLPLSeVhB2czQYK8ga6mDlqqfW_59XAa0kTROJK5FaA/3up/5N1kJmwrQxupKaUIP4os2A/h0/jkhQ7JUmjsbZmmYD_mbG6Rvf9NOBO39GmqhEtThlCTw)**

clean_body: There are very real issues that deserve our attention -- and more importantly, folks deserve solutions. I’m fighting for those solutions every day in Washington, but I’ll need your help to keep it up. | | Derek, If there’s one thing you should know about me, it’s this: My values are shaped by where I come from. Folks who come from places like where I do face challenges that most people don’t even realize. The issues we face aren’t abstract -- and they’re not some political game, either. When I’m spending 16 hours on a tractor, it gives me the opportunity to sort through those issues in solitude. I’m thinking about climate change and the catastrophic droughts we’re seeing on farms like mine. I’m thinking about the rural towns near mine that need access to high-speed internet. And over the last couple of weeks especially, I’m thinking about a woman’s right to make her own medical decisions and how politics interferes with that choice. These aren’t just talking points. They’re very real issues that deserve our attention -- and more importantly, folks deserve solutions. I’m fighting for those solutions every day in Washington, but I’ll need your help to keep it up. I can’t tell you enough how much I appreciate your support. Jon Jon Tester U.S. Senator, Montana The DNC's Congressional Split Series helps fundraise for and raise awareness around down-ballot Democrats in some of the most important races across the country. When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit folks on the ballot this cycle -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. As the son of a pastor, and one of ten children, I am grateful to my parents for teaching us to work together, to sacrifice, and most important, to serve.

They taught me to abide by the golden rule: treating others the way you want to be treated.

Our commitment to one another is essential to building a stronger Chicago, Peter. And it will take all of us — from working families, to immigrant families, to our LGBTQ siblings and people in all corners of our city — to work as partners for the change we all need. That’s why I’m reaching out today.

[If you can spare a few bucks today, please split a donation between my campaign and The Collective PAC by clicking here. We urgently need the resources to reach more Chicago voters before the April 4th runoff election, and we’re counting on supporters like you.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yscVJVvN-r4bukDGstILwIHi4J0_IHAsfJTkrbuQGEqJB3T2yTqm4zV-AeeS4G84RyDwRprMgV1ZtTNAK44FR79aVuyTOT7G6t3chVjhw7KVl-UcOEf-sy7SH6YPqEgHEXGXWM0QsmQI-O20VJpsYVg2jAkTh7fh-2SS6FO_yCcT6SHrc4-f25SM-AtQT-DSvi-IHc_17AsYBGTN5WYOmV_fz6WCJcp5C2JOk24CzXr3DaJzM6YBALDxSaDJjxLJJBAEfMiXj5OC09CvBzS5FNeHW6_TFP-cVRoLvOmaJIp1ec6iLDh0P-IivmXoqzsGHS_UY16C3HMZHzn8sSKYpicg7bhOIJ9TTzk9xR8b_ZoDxEEJhoFUmk6PQjE6pDlF-j2i0r_0bI89zs5Xxo5nST0wgPpII43nuzrMudgTxnxBrUn3xAqgdWnAKfzy35w6RmAANR1zsc2jQdN5LMHdzUVByNAuTPVbzL4eoJ-CM2pg/3up/EPo7TRKbSEiYEwZAVW008A/h4/iR6zMv481U12co7HO6qTJcj1QsJosXS226Q8q7PQY00)

We all know Chicagoans deserve better.

My wife and I are raising our three children on the West Side of Chicago, so our family experiences firsthand the effects of generational disinvestment. Hunger, homelessness and unemployment are right outside our front door. Gun violence is not only on the news; it traumatizes our neighborhood.

As a teacher, I also experienced the painful impact of disinvestment on my students and their families.

**We cannot make Chicago whole until all of us are whole.** _That’s why we’re going to invest in people._

Safe and vibrant neighborhoods, affordable housing, health care for all, fully-funded schools — the life I want for my family and my neighbors is the same life I want for all Chicagoans. That’s why I’m in this race.

[But I can’t win this fight alone, so please, Peter: will you split a donation between our campaign and The Collective PAC today? Whether you chip in $5 or $50 or $500, you’re making a huge difference in a mayoral race that could come down to just a few thousand votes.](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yscVJVvN-r4bukDGstILwIHi4J0_IHAsfJTkrbuQGEqJB3T2yTqm4zV-AeeS4G84RyDwRprMgV1ZtTNAK44FR79aVuyTOT7G6t3chVjhw7KVl-UcOEf-sy7SH6YPqEgHEXGXWM0QsmQI-O20VJpsYVg2jAkTh7fh-2SS6FO_yCcT6SHrc4-f25SM-AtQT-DSvFANVsY_dYhYgZpqLu4yyygJOgXHPDnvNFG-PgGH03FkHOqg5reiRsA_pZDgV0HT_MMEtmyOWAIdcTEYm8u5HiI5SVNef_y8pH37MkpMZ57wOjW91TeZPgR12IwTib9vW6ewBcHSeh-gIGXPq3cuusl6879yIaLr-ugHla0xHZOsibY5PwUQNIvFrs1QCzwsQogk9mOMHig3mkD4ygTg4_9--XFC78LzIsE4NEsnm38mB__J-5yC05sMwNfpHKGULyLR0XK3BbDAqSAsfJRblzkY6eWQRByt36kQizV2RJ6w/3up/EPo7TRKbSEiYEwZAVW008A/h11/X0V7-hY0hdUmRVv6yBlctWKhZ76yL4k8mOUornY4c-w)

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Peter, Because of supporters like you, we’re going to an April 4th runoff in the race to become Chicago’s next mayor — and now I’m counting on your help to win. | | As the son of a pastor, and one of ten children, I am grateful to my parents for teaching us to work together, to sacrifice, and most important, to serve. They taught me to abide by the golden rule: treating others the way you want to be treated. Our commitment to one another is essential to building a stronger Chicago, Peter. And it will take all of us — from working families, to immigrant families, to our LGBTQ siblings and people in all corners of our city — to work as partners for the change we all need. That’s why I’m reaching out today. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Brandon Johnson and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | We all know Chicagoans deserve better. My wife and I are raising our three children on the West Side of Chicago, so our family experiences firsthand the effects of generational disinvestment. Hunger, homelessness and unemployment are right outside our front door. Gun violence is not only on the news; it traumatizes our neighborhood. As a teacher, I also experienced the painful impact of disinvestment on my students and their families. We cannot make Chicago whole until all of us are whole. That’s why we’re going to invest in people. Safe and vibrant neighborhoods, affordable housing, health care for all, fully-funded schools — the life I want for my family and my neighbors is the same life I want for all Chicagoans. That’s why I’m in this race. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately and split between Brandon Johnson and The Collective PAC. | | | | | | I know a better Chicago is possible. Together, anything is. Onward, Brandon The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: VADEMS
subject: Common Sense Gun Safety Reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Virginia, www
body:
The future of Virginia’s safety rests on your support.

|
---
Derek, Republicans in office have worked to dismantle every precaution we’ve put in place to keep Virginia safe. Youngkin claimed he took a “hands-off approach” to gun safety. Yet, he has vowed to roll back existing gun safety laws. This year we have the unique opportunity to rectify these mistakes. This November, 140 General Assembly, and Senate seats are on the ballot. Democrats are fired up and ready to do whatever it takes to make Virginia safe again. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: I’m up for re-election and need your help, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by BACKROADS PAC, and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
Ohio is already shaping up to be a must-win battleground.

| I’m up for re-election in 2024, Peter, and as one of just three Democrats in states Trump won and the only remaining statewide-elected Democrat in Ohio, I’m a prime target for Mitch McConnell and the GOP. (_There’s already a wealthy Republican state senator considering running against me._)

NBC says my race could be “even nastier and more expensive” than this year’s Senate race in Ohio -- and that race was one of the most expensive in the country with over $200 million spent.

In fact, 2023 has just begun and already an opponent has jumped into the race and the NRSC is running attack ads against me.

[_**Peter, this is going to be my toughest race yet, but if we work together, we can win in Ohio. Will you split a contribution between my campaign and BACKROADS PAC before the FEC deadline?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60585634/397554241/1298411240?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230322-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGE3OTlmYi1lN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SiSdppN9-TtuGV15mzGWvI75jnU2dHfdqhS4XwtdXEg=)

I grew up in Mansfield, Ohio. I went to school with the sons and daughters of ironworkers, carpenters, autoworkers, and electricians. Eventually, those jobs disappeared as one big plant after another left town. Every day, I fight in the U.S. Senate to bring those jobs back to our state and to put money back in the pockets of hardworking families.

I wear a canary pin that a steelworker gave to me years ago – a reminder that workers used to have to take a canary with them to the coal mines in case there was dangerous gas. The pin is a symbol of the progress we’ve made on workers’ rights and the work we still have left to do.

Like raising wages. Making sure everyone has good job opportunities in their hometowns. Rewarding companies that invest in American jobs instead of shipping them overseas. Ensuring no one needs a second or third job just to get by.

That’s what the Dignity of Work is all about, Peter. No matter who you are, where you live, or what kind of work you do – whether you punch a clock or swipe a badge, earn a salary or make tips – your work has dignity and I’ll fight for you.

[_**I need you in this fight, too, Peter. It won’t be easy, but if we organize, work hard, and start early, I know we can do this. Please consider chipping in our average online contribution of $26 – or whatever amount makes the most sense for you.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60585637/397554244/1298411240?refcode=BLU-BRP-20230322-1-EM&amount=26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODM2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOGE3OTlmYi1lN2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SiSdppN9-TtuGV15mzGWvI75jnU2dHfdqhS4XwtdXEg=)

With gratitude,

Sherrod
---

Hi friend,
We're less than ten days from our end-of-quarter deadline, so I wanted to take this opportunity to thank you for your continued support of our campaign for the Virginia State Senate.
We are at a critical make-or-break moment as we look toward the next few months leading up to our June primary, and having you on this team is something I don't take for granted. We're facing unprecedented challenges and divisions in our Commonwealth, but we can build bridges together and work towards lasting progressive solutions that uplift ALL families.
Your support has been a critical component of our success so far, and I ask that you continue to stand with me in this effort. With your help, we can make headway on the issues that matter most to Virginia's communities — improving health care access, urgent reforms to our justice system, common sense gun safety solutions, and so much more.
Please consider donating to my campaign before the end-of-quarter. Every little bit makes a difference, and I am so grateful for your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/airdemail2023?refcode=em_fr_3.22.2023_LA_all&amount=25]

Lashrecse Aird

body:
We’re asking Lateefah Simon’s strongest supporters to personally endorse her campaign.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=4%2E1163%2EhVQaY3)
Did you see our email this week?
**We’re asking Lateefah Simon’s strongest supporters to personally endorse her campaign.**
**[If you haven’t yet, there’s still time for you to sign on and endorse Lateefah Simon for Congress!](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/email_20230320_endorsement?source=em20230322&t=2&akid=4%2E1163%2EhVQaY3)**
Personal endorsements like these have a real impact on campaigns like ours.
First, they show the power of our movement — they demonstrate to everyone that we’re the real deal and we have what it takes to win. Showing strength early can go a long way toward establishing Lateefah Simon as the front-runner in this race.
Second, we know that the folks who sign on to endorse Lateefah now are our strongest supporters. Seeing who raises their hand now will let us know who we can rely on down the road when it comes time to start organizing, recruiting volunteers, etc.
**[If you want to help send Lateefah Simon to Congress, the best thing you can do right now is personally endorse her campaign today. It will only take one minute!](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/email_20230320_endorsement?source=em20230322&t=3&akid=4%2E1163%2EhVQaY3)**
**[Endorse Lateefah »](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/email_20230320_endorsement?source=em20230322&t=4&akid=4%2E1163%2EhVQaY3)**
Thank you so much!
Team Lateefah

The filing was made by U.S. Attorney David Weiss on behalf of the Department of Defense and the Department of Health and Human Services, arguing that the federal [...] READ MORE]() ---|--- | #### [ Trump WANTS To Be Handcuffed for Court Appearance In Stormy Daniels Case Former US President Donald Trump has reportedly told his advisers that he wants to be handcuffed and subjected to a “perp walk” when he makes an appearance in court, should he be indicted by a Manhattan grand jury for his alleged role in paying hush money to adult film actress Stormy Daniels. subject: Smoky Mountain Spying 🔍
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Burchett for Congress** [Unsubscribe](http://links
body:
| | | |

| | [](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3838c31b2e914328a06679660d5b0557&_e=GfxxbMbzxB48ACliyGt02r99al-Jnt8xtnvPBryxZsa1wLOaS_YbhRDgQYZETwj8lnS-Ubud2TY7ghluaJlj9ICYS7_NiODD8HCbkwlixWeB_2TfmR9IYPRNQ6jYh_TKHPTR164vewf7rq0zyLmiNwyeEOup8yvsfQEVO0RUFcD195pLc4b6UCFEu2Lb-UFRrQo9EyAl3oJ-JDd6J0-0pIdG9LdRoLU_kER2zZ7fSt58NW7Q9hky5JJ7rZDv0Nnxbp8-45xQQMB1ZTD6WEtZAVVRr2RoC0C3-IISszFBdbKAhStGNo455b4flFTbcoFVBubBzgzuBFwRFXWXgvasOQ%3D%3D)

| | Friend, As usual, our government overlords are trying to weasel their way into our everyday lives and invade any shred of privacy we have left. Even in the Great Smoky Mountains, America’s most popular national park, we’re witnessing a HUGE overstep. It’s been [reported](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3838c31b2e914328a06679660d5b0557&_e=GfxxbMbzxB48ACliyGt02iPtIVq06i4FJ59N4MhgWs8TeJqFDxQfwFyIr7qhQhmElrMX0v57xvNgo7GvtZEZ9UoNbNpJIujmXgnLDR50SGp2beQevSYbKTZoH5g1FN7Ja8-bEh1Ik8LjEbGvxX_UhoE3cFPA77wkhvtw9Vvd8YKF1iZN8jWU6a86Qi8bn3jU6saSnKxTKBYRotPiDWi8MY4zdz8RVOM5mMi2-4FkDHRXeiDvGQStMZzBJY6FelMa6Y1VEaJBPMWmka54fl9-t_ls_7YOA-Ev4HMIF_wCVLaXfu40v22cf9YBfjH1jwcP7Xy_hQ25hl91Y44nJqP9bxUgHnuI0HqzJ7-VvwIqcGlwrAT1fDC6-sNIlERsuxHsa3g5YJAouaK05Yjl7Z3s9uAzTplPom3OTNONU3--F7s%3D) that Automatic License Plate Readers (ALPRs) were installed in two different locations at the park. After the story sparked concern, the park removed one at the Sugarlands Visitor Center—but the Townsend entrance ALPR remains. **Let’s cut to the chase and call this what it is...** These are cameras that are gathering details about you and your whereabouts WITHOUT YOUR CONSENT. Who has access to the data? Where are they using this information? What is the whole dadgum point of this alarming addition to our treasured national park? I know folks who travel through the Smokies every day and they deserve better, which is exactly why I wrote a letter to the National Park Service demanding answers. There’s no place for this overreach. Every ALPR should be thrown out, never to see the light of day. **[Can I count on your support as I stand up for our right to privacy?](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=3838c31b2e914328a06679660d5b0557&_e=GfxxbMbzxB48ACliyGt02r99al-Jnt8xtnvPBryxZsa1wLOaS_YbhRDgQYZETwj8lnS-Ubud2TY7ghluaJlj9ICYS7_NiODD8HCbkwlixWeB_2TfmR9IYPRNQ6jYh_TKHPTR164vewf7rq0zyLmiNwyeEOup8yvsfQEVO0RUFcAGr6T8NwRLcJ-8_r_hRMN02GY5tyS7Udkuo-K-424Ur0k_BwOGL26tkG7HAaK0i4ou7-wDJ0eAwY8UvbOcNch34w1qrtwUdYfTM65ZwRjbpcPgEYVww3mH-nJvqJ3KFKNwGA6Vsfp7oIUnpCcWeaHuuCGFCegpeLKzI-RRX5U94w%3D%3D)** Sincerely, Tim Burchett

A Trump-appointed judge in Texas is set to make a ruling _any day now_ that could ban the use of a safe and effective abortion pill nationwide. This lawsuit could make accessing abortion care even more difficult for women in every state.

\----------Begin Forwarded Message----------
Sender: Team Schrier
Subject: Have you heard about the abortion pill lawsuit?
Date: Friday, March 3, 2023
| Texas judge to rule on abortion pill used by millions of Americans

"A federal judge in Texas is set to rule on a lawsuit that seeks to restrict access to one of the two drugs typically used to induce a medicated abortion. The decision could impact 40 million women nationwide, making it the most consequential legal ruling since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade."
---
Peter,

A federal judge in Texas is set to make a ruling any day that could dramatically affect women's access to abortion care nationwide.

A lawsuit has been brought by anti-choice extremists challenging the FDA approval of a safe and effective abortion pill – mifepristone. If this Trump-appointed judge rules in their favor, the supply of this safe medication will be halted in _all_ states – including Washington.

With the Supreme Court overturning _Roe v. Wade_ last year, abortion pills have been instrumental in helping women receive the care they need – even in states where abortions are outlawed or restricted. This lawsuit could make accessing abortion care even more difficult for women in every state.

As a doctor and as a congresswoman, Kim knows that deeply personal health care decisions should be between a patient and her doctor, only. That's why she's fighting back against extremist attacks on abortion care. Are you with her?

clean_body: A Trump-appointed judge in Texas is set to make a ruling any day that could ban the use of a safe and effective abortion pill nationwide. We wanted to make sure you saw this, Peter. A Trump-appointed judge in Texas is set to make a ruling any day now that could ban the use of a safe and effective abortion pill nationwide. This lawsuit could make accessing abortion care even more difficult for women in every state. \----------Begin Forwarded Message---------- Sender: Team Schrier Subject: Have you heard about the abortion pill lawsuit? Date: Friday, March 3, 2023 | Texas judge to rule on abortion pill used by millions of Americans "A federal judge in Texas is set to rule on a lawsuit that seeks to restrict access to one of the two drugs typically used to induce a medicated abortion. The decision could impact 40 million women nationwide, making it the most consequential legal ruling since the Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade." Peter, A federal judge in Texas is set to make a ruling any day that could dramatically affect women's access to abortion care nationwide. A lawsuit has been brought by anti-choice extremists challenging the FDA approval of a safe and effective abortion pill – mifepristone. If this Trump-appointed judge rules in their favor, the supply of this safe medication will be halted in all states – including Washington. With the Supreme Court overturning Roe v. Wade last year, abortion pills have been instrumental in helping women receive the care they need – even in states where abortions are outlawed or restricted. This lawsuit could make accessing abortion care even more difficult for women in every state. As a doctor and as a congresswoman, Kim knows that deeply personal health care decisions should be between a patient and her doctor, only. That's why she's fighting back against extremist attacks on abortion care. Are you with her? Thanks, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat in 2024. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

In 2016, Obama-Biden government officials fraudulently obtained warrants through FISA courts to SPY on our campaign. While I was in the White House, government officials routinely and selectively leaked information to the Fake News to keep pushing the phony Russia collusion hoax. In 2020, bureaucrats from the FBI and DHS colluded with Big Tech companies to CENSOR Americans during the 2020 elections. Now, Joe Biden has weaponized the federal government to target and persecute conservatives, Christians, and the Left’s political enemies like never before. But our plan will completely overhaul the federal agencies that have created this political weaponization and clean house of these corrupt faceless bureaucrats. I will declassify and publish every single document on Deep State spying, censorship, and government abuse of power. Our second Trump Administration will weed out corruption in ANY form and make Washington bureaucrats accountable to patriotic Americans once again. But now that I have officially unveiled my plan to DESTROY the corrupt Deep State, they’re going to keep coming after us like never before. Thank you, | Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. name: Updates @ Sharice For Congress
subject: Check out what Sharice has been working on
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| Hi — Did you see this?

Sharice has been working hard in Congress, securing funds for important local projects, bringing the voices of Kansans to her committees, and embarking on her Farm Bill Listening Tour. Read our team’s message below for the highlights of what Sharice has been working on.

* * *
**_Begin Forwarded Message:_**

Sharice has been working hard in Congress, fighting to deliver for Kansas families.

In the last session of Congress, Sharice led on major issues — from fighting against climate change and improving supply chains to lowering healthcare costs and protecting marriage equality — and worked with members of both parties to achieve results for Kansans.

**As the new Congress picks up, Sharice is fighting to keep getting things done. Check out what Sharice has been working on below!**
|
* Sharice was the only member of the Kansas congressional delegation who voted to cap the cost of insulin at $35 per month for people on Medicare and has called repeatedly for this provision to be extended to all Americans. **Now, the top three largest insulin producers in our country have listened to Sharice and Democrats and are substantially lowering their prices.** This is a major victory in our fight to lower the cost of healthcare and prescription drugs for all.

* Through the Bipartisan Safer Communities Act, Sharice secured nearly **$2.5 million** in funding to support youth mental health programs at the University of Kansas Medical Center!

* **Sharice has been making stops throughout the district on her Farm Bill Listening Tour.** Have you run into her? Already, she’s made stops at family-owned farms across Kansas, from Bauman’s Cedar Valley Farm in Anderson County to the KC Farm School in Wyandotte County.

* Sharice is continuing to champion sustainable infrastructure, securing **$4 million** in federal funds to acquire and replace electric buses in the Kansas City area, as well as **$1.28 million** to make roads more friendly to pedestrians and bikers, and nearly **$7 million** for affordable housing.

* Sharice hosted Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg in De Soto to tour the planned Panasonic Energy manufacturing site which will **create 20,000 new jobs and provide sustainable economic opportunities** in our district.

* **Sharice was named to the House Transportation & Infrastructure, Small Business, and Agriculture Committees in the 118th Congress!** All of these committees provide important opportunities for Sharice to bring the voices of Kansans to the table as she works to invest in our infrastructure and support local businesses and agriculture industries.

* Sharice was named to the DCCC Frontline program — a list of the most competitive Democratic seats in 2024 — and is now **officially a top Republican target.** That means National Republicans are getting ready to pour money into Kansas to try and flip Sharice’s seat and expand their slim House majority.

---

This was just some of what’s been going on with Team Sharice.

Everyone who has supported Sharice through volunteering, donating, attending an event, or anything else is the reason she has been able to get so much done.

**Now, as we face our first public FEC fundraising deadline of the year, we need your help to have a strong report.** **[Can you chip in $20 or any amount right now so Shrarice can keep delivering for Kansans in Congress?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60587027/397561524/-1334289778?amount=20&contactdata=v5CFPkBgWK3cxXTpxp2TsCGxBamrZiQ88Ao08iaRHsFrLj4pcoUWcTA0JmVpS0K4jb7qBZETJ31tOtk66Fi8Gi1JbADGjRb748DhjnXLiaOAuSRX/WC7myh8k8OWenlCQR84sB2pGkmmLS+03dnSZg==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230322_AW_1.2_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTEwMDlkZC1lY2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ti4sM1AqtZYAc0W0aE1sAYNSsPlPUm1dVoELnsDC0Tc=)** | [Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60587028/397561527/-1334289778?amount=20&contactdata=v5CFPkBgWK3cxXTpxp2TsCGxBamrZiQ88Ao08iaRHsFrLj4pcoUWcTA0JmVpS0K4jb7qBZETJ31tOtk66Fi8Gi1JbADGjRb748DhjnXLiaOAuSRX/WC7myh8k8OWenlCQR84sB2pGkmmLS+03dnSZg==&source=EM_NBI_SD_20230322_AW_1.2_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTEwMDlkZC1lY2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ti4sM1AqtZYAc0W0aE1sAYNSsPlPUm1dVoELnsDC0Tc=)

Click the buttons below to follow Sharice on social media and sign up to volunteer closer to the election! | [Volunteer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60587029/397561528/-1889928666?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230322_AW_1.2_0_3MO_campaign_NA_NA_newsletter&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYTEwMDlkZC1lY2M4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ti4sM1AqtZYAc0W0aE1sAYNSsPlPUm1dVoELnsDC0Tc=&emci=7cf64a60-c2c8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=fa1009dd-ecc8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=22117458)

This was just some of what’s been going on with Team Sharice. Everyone who has supported Sharice through volunteering, donating, attending an event, or anything else is the reason she has been able to get so much done. Now, as we face our first public FEC fundraising deadline of the year, we need your help to have a strong report. = | = Click the buttons below to follow Sharice on social media and sign up to volunteer closer to the election! | We will win in 2024 if our grassroots supporters continue to help us fight back against the onslaught of misleading attack ads that we expect to drop in KS-03. — Team Sharice * Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS Sharice for Congress 13851 W. 63rd St. #303 Shawnee, KS 66216 United States

name: Team AOC
subject: Trump’s favorite political tactic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
When he loses or his authority is questioned, he incites violence.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20230322-4030-header&t=1&akid=4030%2E2526796%2EtTuwEp)
Former President Trump has been leaning on some familiar rhetoric since announcing that he might soon be arrested as part of Manhattan District Attorney Alvin Bragg’s investigation into hush money payments Trump made in the lead-up to the 2016 election.
From his Truth Social account, the twice-impeached former President called on his supporters to ‘take our nation back’, ‘save America’, and ‘PROTEST, PROTEST, PROTEST’.
**This is Trump's favorite political tactic: when he loses or his authority is questioned, he incites violence.** On January 6, 2021, he incited violence against our electoral system. Now, he’s doing it to our judicial system. He is trying to intimidate our courts out of pursuing justice.
[Alexandria has never been afraid to call for Trump to be held to account for his actions. Despite continually being made a target by Trump and the right, she will continue to demand that criminal behavior from our elected officials be investigated. If you can, please support Alexandria and her mission to speak truth to power today with a $3 donation.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230322.PeypV3&refcode=em20230322-4030-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4030%2E2526796%2EtTuwEp)
In the days since announcing his impending arrest, Trump has raised over $1.5 million in donations for his 2024 presidential campaign. We have to be prepared to push back – another Trump term would be unacceptable. The fight against President Trump starts today.
We will keep you posted as the situation unfolds.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20230322.PeypV3&refcode=em20230322-4030-P_FND_EGR_MIS&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4030%2E2526796%2EtTuwEp)**

---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=24&akid=4030%2E2526796%2EtTuwEp) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=25&akid=4030%2E2526796%2EtTuwEp) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=26&akid=4030%2E2526796%2EtTuwEp)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: SethMagaziner.com
subject: re: Seth’s updates
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
|

Peter — Did you see Seth’s email? He has hit the ground running in Congress and is focused on delivering for the middle class and those working hard to join it.

From lowering costs and protecting Social Security to protecting abortion rights and expanding access to affordable healthcare, there is a lot of work to get done.

**[Can you fill Seth in on your top priorities by completing our quick survey today? We’re sending Seth the responses tonight and want to make sure your answers are recorded.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60587258/397563331/1212879991?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230322_SV_priorities.1.2_0_6MO_website_NA_NA_priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBkNzI1Yy1lZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2BhnT9H00tdL1Rl23ifCuPS5Y6neJqcHlythpdJNgY=&emci=5f261455-eec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c30d725c-eec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15384964)**

Thanks,
All of us @ Seth Magaziner for Congress

* * *
**_Begin Forwarded Message:_**

Hi Peter,

It’s Seth Magaziner. I’m a few months into my first term representing Rhode Island’s 2nd district in Congress and I wanted to check in and share some updates with you.

I’ve been named to the House Natural Resources and Homeland Security Committees.

**On the Natural Resources Committee, my work will focus on how affordable clean energy will impact the economy in Rhode Island.** I’m looking forward to working with my colleagues to invest in Rhode Island’s Blue Economy and the transition to affordable clean energy.

**And on the Homeland Security Committee, I will work tirelessly to defend our democracy and combat violent domestic extremism.** Ensuring the safety and security of our nation and every American is central to my work, and I take the responsibility I’ve been given seriously as I begin my work on this critical committee, including in my role as Ranking Member on the Counterterrorism and Intelligence Subcommittee.

**I’m excited to bring the voices of Rhode Islanders to these two very important committees and will be sure to keep you updated on my work.**

Along with serving on these committees, my team and I have hit the ground running, focusing on strengthening our economy, lowering costs for working people, expanding access to healthcare, and making Rhode Island communities safer. I’ve already co-sponsored a national ban on assault weapons and bipartisan legislation that would ban Members of Congress from trading stocks.

**During my first remarks on the House floor, I made clear my commitment to delivering for Rhode Island’s working people.** I’m focused on fighting for all Rhode Islanders to have access to a middle-class life, the security of a dignified retirement plan, and the promise of a better future for the next generation. That’s what I want for my young son, Max, and what I’m fighting for every day in Congress.

**[These are my priorities, and now I want to hear what you are thinking about. Peter, can you take two minutes to share your thoughts on the most pressing issues facing Rhode Island’s families? Your input is critical to my work.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60587259/397563332/1212879991?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230322_SV_priorities.1.2_0_6MO_website_NA_NA_priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBkNzI1Yy1lZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2BhnT9H00tdL1Rl23ifCuPS5Y6neJqcHlythpdJNgY=&emci=5f261455-eec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c30d725c-eec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15384964)**
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60587260/397563333/199758967?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230322_SV_priorities.1.2_0_6MO_website_NA_NA_priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBkNzI1Yy1lZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2BhnT9H00tdL1Rl23ifCuPS5Y6neJqcHlythpdJNgY=&emci=5f261455-eec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c30d725c-eec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15384964)[SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60587261/397563334/1212879991?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230322_SV_priorities.1.2_0_6MO_website_NA_NA_priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBkNzI1Yy1lZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2BhnT9H00tdL1Rl23ifCuPS5Y6neJqcHlythpdJNgY=&emci=5f261455-eec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c30d725c-eec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15384964)
---

Thank you so much for your continued support,
Seth

* * *
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60587262/397563335/1683961242?source=EM_NBI_SM_20230322_SV_priorities.1.2_0_6MO_website_NA_NA_priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBkNzI1Yy1lZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2BhnT9H00tdL1Rl23ifCuPS5Y6neJqcHlythpdJNgY=&emci=5f261455-eec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=c30d725c-eec8-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&ceid=15384964)[DONATE NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/60587263/397563336/1770123581?amount=25&source=EM_NBI_SM_20230322_SV_priorities.1.2_0_6MO_website_NA_NA_priorities&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzBkNzI1Yy1lZWM4LWVkMTEtYThlMC0wMDIyNDgzMmU4MTEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=D2BhnT9H00tdL1Rl23ifCuPS5Y6neJqcHlythpdJNgY=)

clean_body: It takes resources to expand the electorate. = | Fellow activist, we hate to send emails like this, but the New Pennsylvania Project is facing a critical fundraising shortfall. So far this year, we’ve raised less than one-sixth as much as we did by this point last year. The New Pennsylvania Project is one of the ONLY organizations conducting year-round, consistent voter registration and civic education. Our organizers have been registering voters in the communities we center across PA since January, including in the snow and rain - but we simply cannot keep doing this important work with less than a sixth of the budget. = = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. = = = = In solidarity, Team NPP = | The New Pennsylvania Project was founded in May 2021 to expand Pennsylvania’s electorate, so it reflects the Commonwealth’s demographically changing population. In the next four years, NPP will engage and empower young residents and those living in underrepresented immigrant communities and communities of color. name: Katie Hobbs
subject: In 2022 I was elected Arizona’s first Democratic governor in 15 years
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
and in 2024 we’ll have another once-in-a-lifetime opportunity
|
---

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60588165/397566513/1153222191?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230322_FR_3P_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMmM4NTc2LWYyYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sKvgA1cUo4MGALLJeOBbe4RFaPWrOeOe45fH9biNooE=)

Team, last November I was elected Arizona’s first Democratic governor in 15 years. Now, as we look to the future, we have the once-in-a-lifetime opportunity to flip the legislature blue in 2024 for the first time in decades.

**[_That’s why I’m asking you to join me in supporting an organization that fights to elect state-level Democrats all across the country: the National Democratic Redistricting Committee. Will you make a donation of any amount to help power the NDRC’s work?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60588168/397566516/1153222191?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230322_FR_3P_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMmM4NTc2LWYyYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sKvgA1cUo4MGALLJeOBbe4RFaPWrOeOe45fH9biNooE=)

Last year, the NDRC supported me and nearly 500 other Democracy Defender candidates in critical races.** Many of us were up against dangerous extremists and election deniers like my opponent, Kari Lake, who has repeatedly advocated for overturning Arizona’s 2020 election results.

With the help of the NDRC and their team of grassroots supporters, Democracy Defenders like me defeated extreme Republicans in states like Arizona, Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and others in 2022. As a result, for the first time in _years_ , more Americans now live in a state with a Democratic Governor and legislature rather than in one fully controlled by the GOP – and we’re counting on your support to do it again in 2024.

**These crucial victories paved the way for Democrats to pass legislation on issues like voting rights, reproductive freedom, gun safety, and more. They also helped ensure the 2024 election will be fought on a fair playing field – and that’s an opportunity we absolutely cannot squander.**

MAGA Republicans have already started making plans for the next election. That means we need to get to work now to ensure Democrats up and down the ballot will have the resources necessary to defeat them.

[**_The NDRC has a proven track record of helping elect pro-democracy leaders across the country, and they’re building an unstoppable grassroots movement. Will you join their fight with a quick contribution to the NDRC today?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/60588169/397566518/1153222191?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230322_FR_3P_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjJlMmM4NTc2LWYyYzgtZWQxMS1hOGUwLTAwMjI0ODMyZTgxMSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sKvgA1cUo4MGALLJeOBbe4RFaPWrOeOe45fH9biNooE=)
